## File: dashboard/index.html
````html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en" data-theme="light">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>CREXI Deal Finder — Command Center</title>

  <!-- Chart.js -->
  <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/Chart.js/4.5.0/chart.umd.min.js"></script>
  <!-- D3.js -->
  <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/d3/7.9.0/d3.min.js"></script>
  <!-- Lucide Icons -->
  <script src="https://unpkg.com/lucide@0.576.0/dist/umd/lucide.min.js"></script>

  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

  <style>
    /* ============================================
       DESIGN SYSTEM — Warm Cream Professional
       ============================================ */
    :root {
      /* Core Palette */
      --bg-primary: #FAF7F2;
      --bg-secondary: #F5F0E8;
      --bg-card: #FFFFFF;
      --bg-card-hover: #FEFCF9;
      --bg-sidebar: #2C2418;
      --bg-sidebar-hover: #3D3225;
      --bg-sidebar-active: #4A3D2E;

      /* Text */
      --text-primary: #1A1510;
      --text-secondary: #6B5E4F;
      --text-tertiary: #9C8E7C;
      --text-inverse: #FAF7F2;
      --text-sidebar: #C4B8A8;
      --text-sidebar-active: #FAF7F2;

      /* Pipeline Stage Colors */
      --color-scrape: #3B82F6;
      --color-scrape-bg: #EFF6FF;
      --color-scrape-border: #BFDBFE;
      --color-analyze: #8B5CF6;
      --color-analyze-bg: #F5F3FF;
      --color-analyze-border: #DDD6FE;
      --color-score: #F59E0B;
      --color-score-bg: #FFFBEB;
      --color-score-border: #FDE68A;
      --color-outreach: #10B981;
      --color-outreach-bg: #ECFDF5;
      --color-outreach-border: #A7F3D0;

      /* Lead Tiers */
      --color-hot: #EF4444;
      --color-hot-bg: #FEF2F2;
      --color-warm: #F59E0B;
      --color-warm-bg: #FFFBEB;
      --color-cold: #6B7280;
      --color-cold-bg: #F9FAFB;

      /* Status */
      --color-active: #10B981;
      --color-idle: #9C8E7C;
      --color-running: #3B82F6;
      --color-error: #EF4444;

      /* Borders & Shadows */
      --border-light: #E8E0D4;
      --border-medium: #D4C9B8;
      --shadow-sm: 0 1px 2px rgba(26, 21, 16, 0.04);
      --shadow-md: 0 4px 12px rgba(26, 21, 16, 0.06);
      --shadow-lg: 0 8px 24px rgba(26, 21, 16, 0.08);
      --shadow-glow: 0 0 20px rgba(212, 163, 115, 0.15);

      /* Radius */
      --radius-sm: 6px;
      --radius-md: 10px;
      --radius-lg: 14px;
      --radius-xl: 20px;

      /* Typography */
      --font-sans: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif;
      --font-mono: 'JetBrains Mono', 'SF Mono', monospace;
    }

    /* ============================================
       RESET & BASE
       ============================================ */
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

    body {
      font-family: var(--font-sans);
      background: var(--bg-primary);
      color: var(--text-primary);
      line-height: 1.6;
      -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
    }

    /* ============================================
       LAYOUT — Sidebar + Main
       ============================================ */
    .app {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 260px 1fr;
      height: 100vh;
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    /* ============================================
       SIDEBAR
       ============================================ */
    .sidebar {
      background: var(--bg-sidebar);
      padding: 24px 16px;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      gap: 8px;
      position: sticky;
      top: 0;
      height: 100vh;
      overflow-y: auto;
    }

    .sidebar-brand {
      padding: 8px 12px 24px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
      margin-bottom: 8px;
    }

    .sidebar-brand h1 {
      font-size: 18px;
      font-weight: 700;
      color: var(--text-sidebar-active);
      letter-spacing: -0.02em;
    }

    .sidebar-brand p {
      font-size: 11px;
      color: var(--text-sidebar);
      margin-top: 2px;
      font-weight: 400;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    }

    .sidebar-section {
      padding: 12px 12px 4px;
      font-size: 10px;
      font-weight: 600;
      color: var(--text-sidebar);
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 0.1em;
    }

    .sidebar-link {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 10px;
      padding: 10px 12px;
      border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
      color: var(--text-sidebar);
      text-decoration: none;
      font-size: 13px;
      font-weight: 500;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: all 0.15s ease;
    }

    .sidebar-link:hover {
      background: var(--bg-sidebar-hover);
      color: var(--text-sidebar-active);
    }

    .sidebar-link.active {
      background: var(--bg-sidebar-active);
      color: var(--text-sidebar-active);
    }

    .sidebar-link .lucide { width: 18px; height: 18px; }

    .sidebar-link .badge {
      margin-left: auto;
      font-size: 10px;
      font-weight: 600;
      padding: 2px 7px;
      border-radius: 99px;
      background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
    }

    .sidebar-link .badge.hot { background: var(--color-hot); color: white; }
    .sidebar-link .badge.warm { background: var(--color-warm); color: white; }

    .sidebar-spacer { flex: 1; }

    /* ============================================
       MAIN CONTENT
       ============================================ */
    .main {
      padding: 32px;
      overflow-y: auto;
    }

    .main-header {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      margin-bottom: 28px;
    }

    .main-header h2 {
      font-size: 22px;
      font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: -0.02em;
    }

    .main-header-actions {
      display: flex;
      gap: 8px;
    }

    /* ============================================
       BUTTONS
       ============================================ */
    .btn {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 6px;
      padding: 8px 16px;
      border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
      font-size: 13px;
      font-weight: 600;
      font-family: var(--font-sans);
      border: none;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: all 0.15s ease;
    }

    .btn .lucide { width: 16px; height: 16px; }

    .btn-primary {
      background: var(--bg-sidebar);
      color: var(--text-inverse);
    }
    .btn-primary:hover { background: var(--bg-sidebar-hover); box-shadow: var(--shadow-md); }

    .btn-secondary {
      background: var(--bg-card);
      color: var(--text-primary);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-light);
    }
    .btn-secondary:hover { background: var(--bg-secondary); }

    .btn-danger {
      background: var(--color-hot);
      color: white;
    }

    .btn-stage-scrape { background: var(--color-scrape); color: white; }
    .btn-stage-analyze { background: var(--color-analyze); color: white; }
    .btn-stage-score { background: var(--color-score); color: white; }
    .btn-stage-outreach { background: var(--color-outreach); color: white; }

    /* ============================================
       CARDS
       ============================================ */
    .card {
      background: var(--bg-card);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-light);
      border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
      box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
      overflow: hidden;
      transition: box-shadow 0.2s ease;
    }

    .card:hover { box-shadow: var(--shadow-md); }

    .card-header {
      padding: 16px 20px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-light);
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
    }

    .card-header h3 {
      font-size: 14px;
      font-weight: 600;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
    }

    .card-header h3 .lucide { width: 16px; height: 16px; color: var(--text-tertiary); }

    .card-body { padding: 20px; }
    .card-body.flush { padding: 0; }

    /* ============================================
       STAT CARDS (KPI Row)
       ============================================ */
    .stats-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
      gap: 16px;
      margin-bottom: 24px;
    }

    .stat-card {
      background: var(--bg-card);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-light);
      border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
      padding: 20px;
      box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
      transition: all 0.2s ease;
    }

    .stat-card:hover { box-shadow: var(--shadow-md); transform: translateY(-1px); }

    .stat-card-icon {
      width: 36px;
      height: 36px;
      border-radius: var(--radius-md);
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      margin-bottom: 12px;
    }

    .stat-card-icon .lucide { width: 18px; height: 18px; }

    .stat-card-icon.scrape { background: var(--color-scrape-bg); color: var(--color-scrape); }
    .stat-card-icon.analyze { background: var(--color-analyze-bg); color: var(--color-analyze); }
    .stat-card-icon.score { background: var(--color-score-bg); color: var(--color-score); }
    .stat-card-icon.outreach { background: var(--color-outreach-bg); color: var(--color-outreach); }

    .stat-card .value {
      font-size: 28px;
      font-weight: 800;
      letter-spacing: -0.03em;
      line-height: 1;
    }

    .stat-card .label {
      font-size: 12px;
      font-weight: 500;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      margin-top: 4px;
    }

    /* ============================================
       GRID LAYOUTS
       ============================================ */
    .grid-2 { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 20px; margin-bottom: 24px; }
    .grid-3 { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr; gap: 20px; margin-bottom: 24px; }
    .grid-2-1 { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr; gap: 20px; margin-bottom: 24px; }
    .grid-1-2 { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 2fr; gap: 20px; margin-bottom: 24px; }
    .mb-24 { margin-bottom: 24px; }

    /* ============================================
       PIPELINE TRACKER
       ============================================ */
    .pipeline {
      display: flex;
      gap: 4px;
      padding: 20px;
    }

    .pipeline-stage {
      flex: 1;
      text-align: center;
      padding: 16px 12px;
      border-radius: var(--radius-md);
      position: relative;
    }

    .pipeline-stage.scrape { background: var(--color-scrape-bg); border: 1px solid var(--color-scrape-border); }
    .pipeline-stage.analyze { background: var(--color-analyze-bg); border: 1px solid var(--color-analyze-border); }
    .pipeline-stage.score { background: var(--color-score-bg); border: 1px solid var(--color-score-border); }
    .pipeline-stage.outreach { background: var(--color-outreach-bg); border: 1px solid var(--color-outreach-border); }

    .pipeline-stage .stage-icon {
      width: 40px;
      height: 40px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      margin: 0 auto 8px;
    }

    .pipeline-stage .stage-icon .lucide { width: 20px; height: 20px; }

    .pipeline-stage.scrape .stage-icon { background: var(--color-scrape); color: white; }
    .pipeline-stage.analyze .stage-icon { background: var(--color-analyze); color: white; }
    .pipeline-stage.score .stage-icon { background: var(--color-score); color: white; }
    .pipeline-stage.outreach .stage-icon { background: var(--color-outreach); color: white; }

    .pipeline-stage .stage-name {
      font-size: 13px;
      font-weight: 600;
      color: var(--text-primary);
    }

    .pipeline-stage .stage-count {
      font-size: 22px;
      font-weight: 800;
      margin-top: 4px;
    }

    .pipeline-stage .stage-status {
      font-size: 11px;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      margin-top: 2px;
    }

    .pipeline-arrow {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      color: var(--border-medium);
      font-size: 20px;
      padding: 0 4px;
    }

    /* ============================================
       TABLES
       ============================================ */
    .data-table {
      width: 100%;
      border-collapse: collapse;
      font-size: 13px;
    }

    .data-table th {
      text-align: left;
      padding: 10px 16px;
      font-size: 11px;
      font-weight: 600;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 0.05em;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      background: var(--bg-secondary);
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-light);
    }

    .data-table td {
      padding: 12px 16px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-light);
      vertical-align: middle;
    }

    .data-table tr:hover td { background: var(--bg-card-hover); }
    .data-table tr:last-child td { border-bottom: none; }

    /* ============================================
       TAGS / BADGES
       ============================================ */
    .tag {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 4px;
      padding: 3px 8px;
      border-radius: 99px;
      font-size: 11px;
      font-weight: 600;
    }

    .tag-hot { background: var(--color-hot-bg); color: var(--color-hot); }
    .tag-warm { background: var(--color-warm-bg); color: var(--color-warm); }
    .tag-cold { background: var(--color-cold-bg); color: var(--color-cold); }
    .tag-scrape { background: var(--color-scrape-bg); color: var(--color-scrape); }
    .tag-analyze { background: var(--color-analyze-bg); color: var(--color-analyze); }
    .tag-score { background: var(--color-score-bg); color: var(--color-score); }
    .tag-outreach { background: var(--color-outreach-bg); color: var(--color-outreach); }
    .tag-active { background: #ECFDF5; color: var(--color-active); }
    .tag-idle { background: #F5F0E8; color: var(--text-tertiary); }

    .score-bar {
      width: 60px;
      height: 6px;
      background: var(--bg-secondary);
      border-radius: 99px;
      overflow: hidden;
      display: inline-block;
      vertical-align: middle;
      margin-left: 6px;
    }

    .score-bar-fill {
      height: 100%;
      border-radius: 99px;
      transition: width 0.5s ease;
    }

    /* ============================================
       AGENT STATUS CARDS
       ============================================ */
    .agent-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(5, 1fr);
      gap: 12px;
    }

    .agent-card {
      background: var(--bg-card);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-light);
      border-radius: var(--radius-md);
      padding: 16px;
      text-align: center;
      transition: all 0.2s ease;
    }

    .agent-card:hover { box-shadow: var(--shadow-md); }

    .agent-card .agent-avatar {
      width: 44px;
      height: 44px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      margin: 0 auto 10px;
      border: 2px solid var(--border-light);
    }

    .agent-card .agent-avatar .lucide { width: 20px; height: 20px; }

    .agent-card .agent-name { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; }
    .agent-card .agent-role { font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-tertiary); margin-top: 2px; }
    .agent-card .agent-stats { font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-secondary); margin-top: 8px; }

    /* ============================================
       TEAM PROFILES
       ============================================ */
    .team-hero {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #2C2418 0%, #4A3D2E 100%);
      border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
      padding: 32px;
      color: var(--text-inverse);
      margin-bottom: 24px;
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
    }
    .team-hero::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      top: -50px; right: -50px;
      width: 220px; height: 220px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: rgba(212, 163, 115, 0.07);
      pointer-events: none;
    }
    .team-hero::after {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      bottom: -30px; left: 200px;
      width: 140px; height: 140px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: rgba(212, 163, 115, 0.04);
      pointer-events: none;
    }
    .team-hero-eyebrow {
      font-size: 10px;
      font-weight: 700;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 0.12em;
      color: rgba(212, 184, 168, 0.6);
      margin-bottom: 10px;
    }
    .team-hero-title {
      font-size: 24px;
      font-weight: 800;
      letter-spacing: -0.5px;
      margin-bottom: 10px;
      line-height: 1.2;
    }
    .team-hero-sub {
      font-size: 13px;
      color: rgba(212, 184, 168, 0.75);
      line-height: 1.7;
      max-width: 580px;
    }
    .team-hero-badges {
      display: flex;
      gap: 8px;
      margin-top: 22px;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
    }
    .hero-badge {
      padding: 5px 13px;
      border-radius: 99px;
      font-size: 11px;
      font-weight: 600;
      border: 1px solid rgba(212, 163, 115, 0.25);
      color: rgba(212, 184, 168, 0.85);
      background: rgba(212, 163, 115, 0.08);
    }

    .profile-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
      gap: 16px;
      margin-bottom: 24px;
    }
    @media (max-width: 1100px) { .profile-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); } }
    @media (max-width: 680px) { .profile-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }

    .profile-card {
      background: var(--bg-card);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-light);
      border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
      overflow: hidden;
      transition: all 0.2s ease;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
    }
    .profile-card:hover {
      box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg);
      border-color: var(--border-medium);
      transform: translateY(-2px);
    }

    .profile-card-top {
      padding: 18px 18px 14px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-light);
    }
    .profile-card-header {
      display: flex;
      align-items: flex-start;
      gap: 13px;
      margin-bottom: 12px;
    }
    .profile-avatar {
      width: 54px;
      height: 54px;
      border-radius: 13px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      flex-shrink: 0;
      border: 2px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.06);
    }
    .profile-avatar .lucide { width: 22px; height: 22px; }

    .profile-meta { flex: 1; min-width: 0; }
    .profile-title-text {
      font-size: 12.5px;
      font-weight: 700;
      color: var(--text-primary);
      line-height: 1.3;
      margin-bottom: 3px;
    }
    .profile-dept {
      font-size: 11px;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      margin-bottom: 7px;
    }
    .profile-badges { display: flex; gap: 5px; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center; }
    .profile-id-badge {
      font-size: 10px;
      font-weight: 600;
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      background: var(--bg-secondary);
      padding: 2px 7px;
      border-radius: 4px;
      border: 1px solid var(--border-light);
    }
    .profile-status-badge {
      font-size: 10px;
      font-weight: 600;
      padding: 2px 8px;
      border-radius: 99px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 5px;
    }
    .profile-status-badge.idle { background: #F3F4F6; color: #6B7280; }
    .profile-status-badge.active { background: #ECFDF5; color: #059669; }
    .profile-status-badge.running { background: #EFF6FF; color: #2563EB; }
    .profile-status-badge::before {
      content: '';
      width: 5px; height: 5px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: currentColor;
    }

    .profile-bio {
      font-size: 11.5px;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
      line-height: 1.65;
    }

    .profile-card-mid {
      padding: 11px 18px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-light);
      background: var(--bg-primary);
    }
    .profile-contact-row {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 7px;
      font-size: 11px;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
      margin-bottom: 5px;
    }
    .profile-contact-row:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }
    .profile-contact-row .lucide { width: 11px; height: 11px; color: var(--text-tertiary); flex-shrink: 0; }
    .profile-contact-row a { color: var(--color-scrape); text-decoration: none; }
    .profile-contact-row a:hover { text-decoration: underline; }

    .profile-card-bottom { padding: 12px 18px; }
    .profile-skills-label {
      font-size: 9.5px;
      font-weight: 700;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 0.07em;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      margin-bottom: 7px;
    }
    .profile-skills { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 4px; }
    .profile-skill-tag {
      font-size: 10px;
      font-weight: 500;
      padding: 3px 8px;
      border-radius: 5px;
      background: var(--bg-secondary);
      color: var(--text-secondary);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-light);
    }

    .soa-card {
      background: var(--bg-card);
      border: 1px solid var(--border-light);
      border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
      overflow: hidden;
    }
    .soa-card-header {
      padding: 16px 20px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-light);
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
    }
    .soa-card-header h3 {
      font-size: 14px;
      font-weight: 600;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
    }
    .soa-card-header h3 .lucide { width: 15px; height: 15px; color: var(--text-tertiary); }
    .soa-doc-id {
      font-size: 11px;
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
    }
    .soa-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    }
    @media (max-width: 800px) { .soa-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; } }
    .soa-section {
      padding: 18px 20px;
      border-right: 1px solid var(--border-light);
    }
    .soa-section:last-child { border-right: none; }
    .soa-label {
      font-size: 9.5px;
      font-weight: 700;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 0.07em;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      margin-bottom: 7px;
    }
    .soa-value {
      font-size: 13px;
      color: var(--text-primary);
      font-weight: 600;
      margin-bottom: 3px;
    }
    .soa-sub {
      font-size: 11px;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
      line-height: 1.55;
    }
    .soa-deliverables { list-style: none; }
    .soa-deliverables li {
      font-size: 11px;
      color: var(--text-secondary);
      padding: 2px 0;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 6px;
    }
    .soa-deliverables li::before {
      content: '';
      width: 4px; height: 4px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: var(--color-outreach);
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }

    /* ============================================
       ACTIVITY FEED
       ============================================ */
    .activity-list { list-style: none; }

    .activity-item {
      display: flex;
      gap: 12px;
      padding: 12px 16px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-light);
      align-items: flex-start;
      font-size: 13px;
    }

    .activity-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }

    .activity-dot {
      width: 8px;
      height: 8px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      margin-top: 6px;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }

    .activity-dot.scrape { background: var(--color-scrape); }
    .activity-dot.analyze { background: var(--color-analyze); }
    .activity-dot.score { background: var(--color-score); }
    .activity-dot.outreach { background: var(--color-outreach); }
    .activity-dot.system { background: var(--text-tertiary); }

    .activity-time {
      font-size: 11px;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
      margin-top: 2px;
    }

    /* ============================================
       DIRECTORY TREE
       ============================================ */
    .tree {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 12px;
      line-height: 1.8;
      padding: 16px;
    }

    .tree-item {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 6px;
      padding: 2px 0;
      cursor: pointer;
    }

    .tree-item:hover { color: var(--color-scrape); }
    .tree-item .lucide { width: 14px; height: 14px; color: var(--text-tertiary); }
    .tree-folder > .lucide { color: var(--color-score); }
    .tree-indent { padding-left: 20px; }

    /* ============================================
       CHART CONTAINERS
       ============================================ */
    .chart-container { position: relative; width: 100%; }
    .chart-container canvas { max-height: 280px; }

    /* ============================================
       SECTION VIEWS (tab panels)
       ============================================ */
    .view { display: none; }
    .view.active { display: block; }

    /* ============================================
       EMPTY STATE
       ============================================ */
    .empty-state {
      text-align: center;
      padding: 48px 24px;
      color: var(--text-tertiary);
    }

    .empty-state .lucide { width: 48px; height: 48px; margin-bottom: 16px; opacity: 0.4; }
    .empty-state h3 { font-size: 16px; color: var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom: 4px; }
    .empty-state p { font-size: 13px; }

    /* ============================================
       RESPONSIVE
       ============================================ */
    @media (max-width: 1200px) {
      .stats-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
      .agent-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); }
      .grid-2, .grid-2-1, .grid-1-2 { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    }

    @media (max-width: 768px) {
      .app { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
      .sidebar { display: none; }
      .stats-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
      .agent-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="app">

  <!-- ============================================
       SIDEBAR
       ============================================ -->
  <nav class="sidebar">
    <div class="sidebar-brand">
      <h1>CREXI Finder</h1>
      <p>Command Center</p>
    </div>

    <div class="sidebar-section">Overview</div>
    <a class="sidebar-link active" onclick="showView('dashboard')">
      <i data-lucide="layout-dashboard"></i> Dashboard
    </a>
    <a class="sidebar-link" onclick="showView('pipeline')">
      <i data-lucide="git-branch"></i> Pipeline
    </a>

    <div class="sidebar-section">Research</div>
    <a class="sidebar-link" onclick="showView('leads')">
      <i data-lucide="target"></i> Leads
      <span class="badge hot" id="sidebar-hot-count">0</span>
    </a>
    <a class="sidebar-link" onclick="showView('outreach')">
      <i data-lucide="phone-outgoing"></i> Outreach
    </a>
    <a class="sidebar-link" onclick="showView('watchlist')">
      <i data-lucide="eye"></i> Watchlist
    </a>

    <div class="sidebar-section">System</div>
    <a class="sidebar-link" onclick="showView('agents')">
      <i data-lucide="users"></i> Our Team
    </a>
    <a class="sidebar-link" onclick="showView('activity')">
      <i data-lucide="activity"></i> Activity
    </a>
    <a class="sidebar-link" onclick="showView('project')">
      <i data-lucide="folder-tree"></i> Project Files
    </a>

    <div class="sidebar-spacer"></div>

    <a class="sidebar-link" onclick="loadData()">
      <i data-lucide="refresh-cw"></i> Refresh Data
    </a>
  </nav>

  <!-- ============================================
       MAIN CONTENT AREA
       ============================================ -->
  <main class="main">

    <!-- ========== DASHBOARD VIEW ========== -->
    <div class="view active" id="view-dashboard">
      <div class="main-header">
        <h2>Dashboard</h2>
        <div class="main-header-actions">
          <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="showView('pipeline')">
            <i data-lucide="play"></i> Run Pipeline
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- KPI Stats Row -->
      <div class="stats-grid">
        <div class="stat-card">
          <div class="stat-card-icon scrape"><i data-lucide="database"></i></div>
          <div class="value" id="kpi-scraped">0</div>
          <div class="label">Listings Scraped</div>
        </div>
        <div class="stat-card">
          <div class="stat-card-icon analyze"><i data-lucide="bar-chart-3"></i></div>
          <div class="value" id="kpi-analyzed">0</div>
          <div class="label">Analyzed</div>
        </div>
        <div class="stat-card">
          <div class="stat-card-icon score"><i data-lucide="flame"></i></div>
          <div class="value" id="kpi-hot">0</div>
          <div class="label">Hot Leads</div>
        </div>
        <div class="stat-card">
          <div class="stat-card-icon outreach"><i data-lucide="send"></i></div>
          <div class="value" id="kpi-outreach">0</div>
          <div class="label">Outreach Ready</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Pipeline + Agent Status -->
      <div class="grid-2">
        <!-- Pipeline Status -->
        <div class="card">
          <div class="card-header">
            <h3><i data-lucide="git-branch"></i> Pipeline Status</h3>
          </div>
          <div class="pipeline">
            <div class="pipeline-stage scrape">
              <div class="stage-icon"><i data-lucide="download"></i></div>
              <div class="stage-name">Scrape</div>
              <div class="stage-count" id="pipe-scrape-count">0</div>
              <div class="stage-status" id="pipe-scrape-status">Idle</div>
            </div>
            <div class="pipeline-arrow">&rarr;</div>
            <div class="pipeline-stage analyze">
              <div class="stage-icon"><i data-lucide="microscope"></i></div>
              <div class="stage-name">Analyze</div>
              <div class="stage-count" id="pipe-analyze-count">0</div>
              <div class="stage-status" id="pipe-analyze-status">Idle</div>
            </div>
            <div class="pipeline-arrow">&rarr;</div>
            <div class="pipeline-stage score">
              <div class="stage-icon"><i data-lucide="star"></i></div>
              <div class="stage-name">Score</div>
              <div class="stage-count" id="pipe-score-count">0</div>
              <div class="stage-status" id="pipe-score-status">Idle</div>
            </div>
            <div class="pipeline-arrow">&rarr;</div>
            <div class="pipeline-stage outreach">
              <div class="stage-icon"><i data-lucide="phone"></i></div>
              <div class="stage-name">Outreach</div>
              <div class="stage-count" id="pipe-outreach-count">0</div>
              <div class="stage-status" id="pipe-outreach-status">Idle</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Deal Score Distribution -->
        <div class="card">
          <div class="card-header">
            <h3><i data-lucide="pie-chart"></i> Lead Distribution</h3>
          </div>
          <div class="card-body">
            <div class="chart-container">
              <canvas id="chart-lead-dist"></canvas>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Charts Row -->
      <div class="grid-2">
        <div class="card">
          <div class="card-header">
            <h3><i data-lucide="trending-up"></i> Cap Rate by Property Type</h3>
          </div>
          <div class="card-body">
            <div class="chart-container">
              <canvas id="chart-caprate"></canvas>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="card">
          <div class="card-header">
            <h3><i data-lucide="map-pin"></i> Listings by State</h3>
          </div>
          <div class="card-body">
            <div class="chart-container">
              <canvas id="chart-states"></canvas>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Recent Activity + Top Leads -->
      <div class="grid-2-1">
        <div class="card">
          <div class="card-header">
            <h3><i data-lucide="flame"></i> Top Opportunities</h3>
            <button class="btn btn-secondary" onclick="showView('leads')">View All</button>
          </div>
          <div class="card-body flush">
            <table class="data-table">
              <thead>
                <tr>
                  <th>Property</th>
                  <th>Type</th>
                  <th>Price</th>
                  <th>Cap Rate</th>
                  <th>Score</th>
                  <th>Tier</th>
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody id="top-leads-table">
                <tr>
                  <td colspan="6">
                    <div class="empty-state">
                      <i data-lucide="search"></i>
                      <h3>No leads yet</h3>
                      <p>Run /hunt to start finding deals</p>
                    </div>
                  </td>
                </tr>
              </tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="card">
          <div class="card-header">
            <h3><i data-lucide="activity"></i> Recent Activity</h3>
          </div>
          <div class="card-body flush">
            <ul class="activity-list" id="recent-activity">
              <li class="activity-item">
                <span class="activity-dot system"></span>
                <div>
                  <div>Project initialized</div>
                  <div class="activity-time">Just now</div>
                </div>
              </li>
            </ul>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ========== PIPELINE VIEW ========== -->
    <div class="view" id="view-pipeline">
      <div class="main-header">
        <h2>Pipeline</h2>
        <div class="main-header-actions">
          <button class="btn btn-stage-scrape"><i data-lucide="download"></i> Scrape</button>
          <button class="btn btn-stage-analyze"><i data-lucide="microscope"></i> Analyze</button>
          <button class="btn btn-stage-score"><i data-lucide="star"></i> Score</button>
          <button class="btn btn-stage-outreach"><i data-lucide="phone"></i> Outreach</button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Pipeline Visual -->
      <div class="card mb-24">
        <div class="card-header"><h3><i data-lucide="git-branch"></i> Pipeline Flow</h3></div>
        <div class="pipeline">
          <div class="pipeline-stage scrape">
            <div class="stage-icon"><i data-lucide="download"></i></div>
            <div class="stage-name">1. Scrape</div>
            <div class="stage-count" id="pipe2-scrape">0</div>
            <div class="stage-status">data-collector agent</div>
          </div>
          <div class="pipeline-arrow">&rarr;</div>
          <div class="pipeline-stage analyze">
            <div class="stage-icon"><i data-lucide="microscope"></i></div>
            <div class="stage-name">2. Analyze</div>
            <div class="stage-count" id="pipe2-analyze">0</div>
            <div class="stage-status">market-analyst agent</div>
          </div>
          <div class="pipeline-arrow">&rarr;</div>
          <div class="pipeline-stage score">
            <div class="stage-icon"><i data-lucide="star"></i></div>
            <div class="stage-name">3. Score</div>
            <div class="stage-count" id="pipe2-score">0</div>
            <div class="stage-status">deal-scout agent</div>
          </div>
          <div class="pipeline-arrow">&rarr;</div>
          <div class="pipeline-stage outreach">
            <div class="stage-icon"><i data-lucide="phone"></i></div>
            <div class="stage-name">4. Outreach</div>
            <div class="stage-count" id="pipe2-outreach">0</div>
            <div class="stage-status">outreach-specialist agent</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Run History -->
      <div class="card">
        <div class="card-header"><h3><i data-lucide="history"></i> Run History</h3></div>
        <div class="card-body flush">
          <table class="data-table">
            <thead>
              <tr><th>Date</th><th>Type</th><th>Stage</th><th>Listings</th><th>Duration</th><th>Status</th></tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody id="run-history-table">
              <tr><td colspan="6"><div class="empty-state"><i data-lucide="clock"></i><h3>No runs yet</h3><p>Pipeline runs will appear here</p></div></td></tr>
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ========== LEADS VIEW ========== -->
    <div class="view" id="view-leads">
      <div class="main-header">
        <h2>Leads</h2>
        <div class="main-header-actions">
          <button class="btn btn-secondary"><i data-lucide="filter"></i> Filter</button>
          <button class="btn btn-secondary"><i data-lucide="download"></i> Export CSV</button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Lead tier summary -->
      <div class="stats-grid">
        <div class="stat-card">
          <div class="stat-card-icon" style="background:var(--color-hot-bg);color:var(--color-hot)"><i data-lucide="flame"></i></div>
          <div class="value" id="leads-hot">0</div>
          <div class="label">Hot Leads (70+)</div>
        </div>
        <div class="stat-card">
          <div class="stat-card-icon" style="background:var(--color-warm-bg);color:var(--color-warm)"><i data-lucide="sun"></i></div>
          <div class="value" id="leads-warm">0</div>
          <div class="label">Warm Leads (50-69)</div>
        </div>
        <div class="stat-card">
          <div class="stat-card-icon" style="background:var(--color-cold-bg);color:var(--color-cold)"><i data-lucide="snowflake"></i></div>
          <div class="value" id="leads-cold">0</div>
          <div class="label">Cold Leads (&lt;50)</div>
        </div>
        <div class="stat-card">
          <div class="stat-card-icon" style="background:#EFF6FF;color:var(--color-scrape)"><i data-lucide="list"></i></div>
          <div class="value" id="leads-total">0</div>
          <div class="label">Total Scored</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Leads Table -->
      <div class="card">
        <div class="card-header"><h3><i data-lucide="target"></i> All Leads</h3></div>
        <div class="card-body flush">
          <table class="data-table">
            <thead>
              <tr>
                <th>Property</th>
                <th>Type</th>
                <th>Location</th>
                <th>Price</th>
                <th>Cap Rate</th>
                <th>DOM</th>
                <th>Score</th>
                <th>Tier</th>
                <th>Financing</th>
              </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody id="all-leads-table">
              <tr><td colspan="9"><div class="empty-state"><i data-lucide="search"></i><h3>No leads found</h3><p>Run /hunt or /scrape to start collecting leads</p></div></td></tr>
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ========== OUTREACH VIEW ========== -->
    <div class="view" id="view-outreach">
      <div class="main-header">
        <h2>Outreach</h2>
        <div class="main-header-actions">
          <button class="btn btn-stage-outreach"><i data-lucide="phone"></i> Generate Scripts</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="card">
        <div class="card-header"><h3><i data-lucide="phone-outgoing"></i> Outreach Queue</h3></div>
        <div class="card-body flush">
          <table class="data-table">
            <thead>
              <tr><th>Property</th><th>Seller Type</th><th>Broker</th><th>Score</th><th>Phone Script</th><th>Email</th><th>Status</th></tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody id="outreach-table">
              <tr><td colspan="7"><div class="empty-state"><i data-lucide="phone-off"></i><h3>No outreach yet</h3><p>Score leads first, then generate outreach scripts</p></div></td></tr>
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ========== WATCHLIST VIEW ========== -->
    <div class="view" id="view-watchlist">
      <div class="main-header">
        <h2>Watchlist</h2>
        <div class="main-header-actions">
          <button class="btn btn-primary"><i data-lucide="plus"></i> Add Watch</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="card">
        <div class="card-header"><h3><i data-lucide="eye"></i> Active Watches</h3></div>
        <div class="card-body flush">
          <table class="data-table">
            <thead>
              <tr><th>Property Type</th><th>Keyword</th><th>Location</th><th>Last Checked</th><th>New Listings</th><th>Actions</th></tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody id="watchlist-table">
              <tr><td colspan="6"><div class="empty-state"><i data-lucide="eye-off"></i><h3>No watches set</h3><p>Run /watch to monitor for new listings</p></div></td></tr>
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ========== AGENTS VIEW ========== -->
    <div class="view" id="view-agents">
      <div class="main-header">
        <h2>Our Team</h2>
        <div class="main-header-actions">
          <span class="tag tag-outreach" style="font-size:11px;padding:5px 12px;">9 Active Members</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Hero Banner -->
      <div class="team-hero">
        <div class="team-hero-eyebrow">Human-Augmented Intelligence Team</div>
        <div class="team-hero-title">One Principal. Nine Extensions.</div>
        <div class="team-hero-sub">
          Every team member is a direct extension of the human principal — bringing specialized intelligence
          to bear across every phase of deal discovery. Each operates within a defined scope, governed by
          a service agreement, and available 24/7 to surface commercial real estate opportunities.
        </div>
        <div class="team-hero-badges">
          <span class="hero-badge">Commercial Real Estate Intelligence</span>
          <span class="hero-badge">Owner-Financed Acquisitions</span>
          <span class="hero-badge">AI-Augmented Research</span>
          <span class="hero-badge">24/7 Availability</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Team Profile Grid -->
      <div class="profile-grid">

        <!-- AGT-001: Lead Researcher -->
        <div class="profile-card">
          <div class="profile-card-top">
            <div class="profile-card-header">
              <div class="profile-avatar" style="background:var(--color-scrape-bg);color:var(--color-scrape)">
                <i data-lucide="crown"></i>
              </div>
              <div class="profile-meta">
                <div class="profile-title-text">Director of Research Operations</div>
                <div class="profile-dept">Strategy &amp; Intelligence</div>
                <div class="profile-badges">
                  <span class="profile-id-badge">AGT-001</span>
                  <span class="profile-status-badge idle" id="agent-lead-status">Idle</span>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="profile-bio">
              Orchestrates the full deal-discovery pipeline across all research phases. Delegates to specialists, synthesizes multi-agent findings, and surfaces the highest-quality investment opportunities. The strategic core of the team.
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="profile-card-mid">
            <div class="profile-contact-row"><i data-lucide="mail"></i> director@[yourdomain].com</div>
            <div class="profile-contact-row"><i data-lucide="phone"></i> +1 (314) 555-0001</div>
          </div>
          <div class="profile-card-bottom">
            <div class="profile-skills-label">Core Capabilities</div>
            <div class="profile-skills">
              <span class="profile-skill-tag">Pipeline Strategy</span>
              <span class="profile-skill-tag">Team Coordination</span>
              <span class="profile-skill-tag">Market Research</span>
              <span class="profile-skill-tag">Report Synthesis</span>
              <span class="profile-skill-tag">CRE Intelligence</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- AGT-002: Data Collector -->
        <div class="profile-card">
          <div class="profile-card-top">
            <div class="profile-card-header">
              <div class="profile-avatar" style="background:var(--color-scrape-bg);color:var(--color-scrape)">
                <i data-lucide="database"></i>
              </div>
              <div class="profile-meta">
                <div class="profile-title-text">Sr. Data Intelligence Analyst</div>
                <div class="profile-dept">Data Operations</div>
                <div class="profile-badges">
                  <span class="profile-id-badge">AGT-002</span>
                  <span class="profile-status-badge idle" id="agent-data-status">Idle</span>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="profile-bio">
              Gathers structured listing data from CREXI.com at scale. Handles browser automation, multi-parameter searches, and pagination to deliver clean, validated JSON datasets to the analysis pipeline.
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="profile-card-mid">
            <div class="profile-contact-row"><i data-lucide="mail"></i> data@[yourdomain].com</div>
            <div class="profile-contact-row"><i data-lucide="phone"></i> +1 (314) 555-0002</div>
          </div>
          <div class="profile-card-bottom">
            <div class="profile-skills-label">Core Capabilities</div>
            <div class="profile-skills">
              <span class="profile-skill-tag">Web Scraping</span>
              <span class="profile-skill-tag">Browser Automation</span>
              <span class="profile-skill-tag">Data Extraction</span>
              <span class="profile-skill-tag">Pagination</span>
              <span class="profile-skill-tag">JSON Structuring</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- AGT-003: Market Analyst -->
        <div class="profile-card">
          <div class="profile-card-top">
            <div class="profile-card-header">
              <div class="profile-avatar" style="background:var(--color-analyze-bg);color:var(--color-analyze)">
                <i data-lucide="bar-chart-2"></i>
              </div>
              <div class="profile-meta">
                <div class="profile-title-text">Senior Market Analyst</div>
                <div class="profile-dept">Market Intelligence</div>
                <div class="profile-badges">
                  <span class="profile-id-badge">AGT-003</span>
                  <span class="profile-status-badge idle" id="agent-market-status">Idle</span>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="profile-bio">
              Enriches raw listings with market intelligence — comparable sales, cap rate benchmarks, price-per-unit analysis, and regional economic indicators. Contextualizes every deal within its local market.
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="profile-card-mid">
            <div class="profile-contact-row"><i data-lucide="mail"></i> analysis@[yourdomain].com</div>
            <div class="profile-contact-row"><i data-lucide="phone"></i> +1 (314) 555-0003</div>
          </div>
          <div class="profile-card-bottom">
            <div class="profile-skills-label">Core Capabilities</div>
            <div class="profile-skills">
              <span class="profile-skill-tag">Cap Rate Analysis</span>
              <span class="profile-skill-tag">Comp Research</span>
              <span class="profile-skill-tag">Price Benchmarking</span>
              <span class="profile-skill-tag">NOI Modeling</span>
              <span class="profile-skill-tag">Regional Economics</span>
            </div>

        </div>

        <!-- AGT-004: Deal Scout -->
        <div class="profile-card">
          <div class="profile-card-top">
            <div class="profile-card-header">
              <div class="profile-avatar" style="background:var(--color-score-bg);color:var(--color-score)">
                <i data-lucide="star"></i>
              </div>
              <div class="profile-meta">
                <div class="profile-title-text">Investment Associate</div>
                <div class="profile-dept">Deal Evaluation</div>
                <div class="profile-badges">
                  <span class="profile-id-badge">AGT-004</span>
                  <span class="profile-status-badge idle" id="agent-deal-status">Idle</span>
                </div>

          <div class="profile-card-mid">
            <div class="profile-contact-row"><i data-lucide="mail"></i> scout@[yourdomain].com</div>

          </div>
          <div class="profile-card-bottom">
            <div class="profile-skills-label">Core Capabilities</div>
            <div class="profile-skills">

              <span class="profile-skill-tag">Risk Assessment</span>
              <span class="profile-skill-tag">Investment Ranking</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- AGT-005: Outreach Specialist -->
        <div class="profile-card">
          <div class="profile-card-top">
            <div class="profile-card-header">
              <div class="profile-avatar" style="background:var(--color-outreach-bg);color:var(--color-outreach)">
                <i data-lucide="phone-outgoing"></i>
              </div>
              <div class="profile-meta">
                <div class="profile-title-text">Director of Business Development</div>
                <div class="profile-dept">Business Development</div>
                <div class="profile-badges">
                  <span class="profile-id-badge">AGT-005</span>
                  <span class="profile-status-badge idle" id="agent-outreach-status">Idle</span>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

            </div>

          <div class="profile-card-mid">
            <div class="profile-contact-row"><i data-lucide="mail"></i> biz@[yourdomain].com</div>
            <div class="profile-contact-row"><i data-lucide="phone"></i> +1 (314) 555-0005</div>
          </div>
          <div class="profile-card-bottom">
            <div class="profile-skills-label">Core Capabilities</div>
            <div class="profile-skills">
              <span class="profile-skill-tag">Outreach Scripting</span>

              <span class="profile-skill-tag">Pitch Personalization</span>
              <span class="profile-skill-tag">Negotiation Strategy</span>
              <span class="profile-skill-tag">CRM Management</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- AGT-006: Prediction Market Intel -->
        <div class="profile-card">
          <div class="profile-card-top">
            <div class="profile-card-header">
              <div class="profile-avatar" style="background:#F5F3FF;color:#7C3AED">
                <i data-lucide="trending-up"></i>
              </div>
              <div class="profile-meta">
                <div class="profile-title-text">Economic Intelligence Analyst</div>
                <div class="profile-dept">Forecasting &amp; Intelligence</div>
                <div class="profile-badges">

          <div class="profile-card-mid">
            <div class="profile-contact-row"><i data-lucide="mail"></i> intel@[yourdomain].com</div>

          </div>
          <div class="profile-card-bottom">

                <i data-lucide="book-open"></i>
              </div>

                <div class="profile-dept">Knowledge Management</div>

        <!-- AGT-008: Notebook Reporter -->
        <div class="profile-card">
          <div class="profile-card-top">
            <div class="profile-card-header">
              <div class="profile-avatar" style="background:#FFF1F2;color:#BE123C">
                <i data-lucide="file-text"></i>
              </div>
              <div class="profile-meta">
                <div class="profile-title-text">Communications &amp; Publishing Analyst</div>

                <div class="profile-badges">

          </div>
          <div class="profile-card-mid">
            <div class="profile-contact-row"><i data-lucide="mail"></i> reports@[yourdomain].com</div>
            <div class="profile-contact-row"><i data-lucide="phone"></i> +1 (314) 555-0008</div>
          </div>
          <div class="profile-card-bottom">
            <div class="profile-skills-label">Core Capabilities</div>
            <div class="profile-skills">
              <span class="profile-skill-tag">Report Generation</span>
              <span class="profile-skill-tag">Investor Presentations</span>
              <span class="profile-skill-tag">Slide Decks</span>
              <span class="profile-skill-tag">Audio Briefings</span>
              <span class="profile-skill-tag">Data Visualization</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- AGT-009: Notebook Uploader -->
        <div class="profile-card">
          <div class="profile-card-top">
            <div class="profile-card-header">
              <div class="profile-avatar" style="background:#F0F9FF;color:#0284C7">
                <i data-lucide="upload-cloud"></i>
              </div>
              <div class="profile-meta">
                <div class="profile-title-text">Data Operations Specialist</div>
                <div class="profile-dept">Knowledge Management</div>
                <div class="profile-badges">
                  <span class="profile-id-badge">AGT-009</span>
                  <span class="profile-status-badge idle">Idle</span>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="profile-bio">
              Ingests pipeline outputs, research findings, and web sources into the team's knowledge graph. Maintains institutional memory and ensures all data is current, organized, and searchable.
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="profile-card-mid">
            <div class="profile-contact-row"><i data-lucide="mail"></i> ops@[yourdomain].com</div>
            <div class="profile-contact-row"><i data-lucide="phone"></i> +1 (314) 555-0009</div>
          </div>
          <div class="profile-card-bottom">
            <div class="profile-skills-label">Core Capabilities</div>
            <div class="profile-skills">
              <span class="profile-skill-tag">Source Ingestion</span>
              <span class="profile-skill-tag">Knowledge Base Mgmt</span>
              <span class="profile-skill-tag">Pipeline Integration</span>
              <span class="profile-skill-tag">Data Currency</span>
              <span class="profile-skill-tag">Archive Management</span>
            </div>

        </div>

      </div><!-- /profile-grid -->

      <!-- Service Agreement -->
      <div class="soa-card">
        <div class="soa-card-header">
          <h3><i data-lucide="file-check-2"></i> Team Service Agreement</h3>
          <span class="soa-doc-id">SOA-2026-001 · Effective 2026-01-01</span>
        </div>
        <div class="soa-grid">
          <div class="soa-section">
            <div class="soa-label">Principal</div>
            <div class="soa-value">Human Operator</div>
            <div class="soa-sub">All agents operate as direct extensions of the human principal. Final acquisition decisions require human approval.</div>
          </div>
          <div class="soa-section">
            <div class="soa-label">Scope of Work</div>
            <div class="soa-value">Deal Discovery Pipeline</div>
            <div class="soa-sub">
              <ul class="soa-deliverables">
                <li>CREXI listing scraping &amp; extraction</li>
                <li>Market analysis &amp; comp research</li>
                <li>Investment scoring &amp; ranking</li>
                <li>Personalized outreach scripting</li>
                <li>Investor-ready reporting</li>
              </ul>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="soa-section">
            <div class="soa-label">Service Level</div>
            <div class="soa-value">24/7 · On-Demand</div>
            <div class="soa-sub">Each agent activates on command with no delay. Pipeline runs complete within minutes. All outputs are validated before delivery to the principal.</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>

    <!-- ========== ACTIVITY VIEW ========== -->
    <div class="view" id="view-activity">
      <div class="main-header">
        <h2>Activity Log</h2>
        <div class="main-header-actions">
          <button class="btn btn-secondary" onclick="loadData()"><i data-lucide="refresh-cw"></i> Refresh</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="card">
        <div class="card-header"><h3><i data-lucide="scroll-text"></i> All Activity</h3></div>
        <div class="card-body flush">
          <ul class="activity-list" id="full-activity">
            <li class="activity-item">
              <span class="activity-dot system"></span>
              <div>
                <div>Project scaffolding created — 5 agents, 5 skills, 7 commands, 5 hooks, 4 rules</div>
                <div class="activity-time">2026-03-03</div>
              </div>
            </li>
          </ul>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ========== PROJECT FILES VIEW ========== -->
    <div class="view" id="view-project">
      <div class="main-header">
        <h2>Project Files</h2>
      </div>

      <div class="grid-2">
        <div class="card">
          <div class="card-header"><h3><i data-lucide="folder-tree"></i> Directory Structure</h3></div>
          <div class="card-body">
            <div class="tree">
              <div class="tree-item"><i data-lucide="folder" class="tree-folder"></i> <strong>__crexi/</strong></div>
              <div class="tree-indent">
                <div class="tree-item"><i data-lucide="file-text"></i> CLAUDE.md</div>
                <div class="tree-item"><i data-lucide="file-text"></i> CLAUDE.local.md</div>
                <div class="tree-item"><i data-lucide="file"></i> .gitignore</div>
                <div class="tree-item"><i data-lucide="folder" class="tree-folder"></i> <strong>.claude/</strong></div>
                <div class="tree-indent">
                  <div class="tree-item"><i data-lucide="file-cog"></i> settings.json</div>
                  <div class="tree-item"><i data-lucide="file-cog"></i> settings.local.json</div>
                  <div class="tree-item"><i data-lucide="folder" class="tree-folder"></i> <strong>agents/</strong> <span class="tag tag-scrape">5 agents</span></div>
                  <div class="tree-indent">
                    <div class="tree-item"><i data-lucide="bot"></i> lead-researcher.md</div>
                    <div class="tree-item"><i data-lucide="bot"></i> data-collector.md</div>
                    <div class="tree-item"><i data-lucide="bot"></i> market-analyst.md</div>
                    <div class="tree-item"><i data-lucide="bot"></i> deal-scout.md</div>
                    <div class="tree-item"><i data-lucide="bot"></i> outreach-specialist.md</div>
                  </div>
                  <div class="tree-item"><i data-lucide="folder" class="tree-folder"></i> <strong>skills/</strong> <span class="tag tag-analyze">5 skills</span></div>
                  <div class="tree-indent">
                    <div class="tree-item"><i data-lucide="sparkles"></i> crexi-scraper/</div>
                    <div class="tree-item"><i data-lucide="sparkles"></i> crexi-analyzer/</div>
                    <div class="tree-item"><i data-lucide="sparkles"></i> deal-finder/</div>
                    <div class="tree-item"><i data-lucide="sparkles"></i> outreach-composer/</div>
                    <div class="tree-item"><i data-lucide="sparkles"></i> seller-profiler/</div>
                  </div>
                  <div class="tree-item"><i data-lucide="folder" class="tree-folder"></i> <strong>commands/</strong> <span class="tag tag-score">7 commands</span></div>
                  <div class="tree-indent">
                    <div class="tree-item"><i data-lucide="terminal"></i> hunt.md</div>
                    <div class="tree-item"><i data-lucide="terminal"></i> scrape.md</div>
                    <div class="tree-item"><i data-lucide="terminal"></i> analyze.md</div>
                    <div class="tree-item"><i data-lucide="terminal"></i> score.md</div>
                    <div class="tree-item"><i data-lucide="terminal"></i> outreach.md</div>
                    <div class="tree-item"><i data-lucide="terminal"></i> report.md</div>
                    <div class="tree-item"><i data-lucide="terminal"></i> watch.md</div>
                  </div>
                  <div class="tree-item"><i data-lucide="folder" class="tree-folder"></i> <strong>hooks/</strong> <span class="tag tag-outreach">5 hooks</span></div>
                  <div class="tree-indent">
                    <div class="tree-item"><i data-lucide="shield"></i> validate-command.sh</div>
                    <div class="tree-item"><i data-lucide="shield"></i> validate-data.sh</div>
                    <div class="tree-item"><i data-lucide="shield"></i> agent-report.sh</div>
                    <div class="tree-item"><i data-lucide="shield"></i> session-summary.sh</div>
                    <div class="tree-item"><i data-lucide="shield"></i> preserve-context.sh</div>
                  </div>
                  <div class="tree-item"><i data-lucide="folder" class="tree-folder"></i> <strong>rules/</strong> <span class="tag tag-hot">4 rules</span></div>
                  <div class="tree-indent">
                    <div class="tree-item"><i data-lucide="scale"></i> data-quality.md</div>
                    <div class="tree-item"><i data-lucide="scale"></i> ethical-research.md</div>
                    <div class="tree-item"><i data-lucide="scale"></i> scraping-safety.md</div>
                    <div class="tree-item"><i data-lucide="scale"></i> cre-conventions.md</div>
                  </div>
                  <div class="tree-item"><i data-lucide="folder" class="tree-folder"></i> <strong>agent-memory/</strong> <span class="tag tag-idle">5 agents</span></div>
                </div>

                <div class="tree-item"><i data-lucide="folder" class="tree-folder"></i> <strong>data/</strong></div>
                <div class="tree-indent">
                  <div class="tree-item"><i data-lucide="folder"></i> raw/</div>
                  <div class="tree-item"><i data-lucide="folder"></i> processed/</div>
                  <div class="tree-item"><i data-lucide="folder"></i> exports/</div>
                  <div class="tree-item"><i data-lucide="folder"></i> comps/</div>
                  <div class="tree-item"><i data-lucide="file"></i> watchlist.json</div>
                </div>
                <div class="tree-item"><i data-lucide="folder" class="tree-folder"></i> <strong>docs/</strong></div>
                <div class="tree-item"><i data-lucide="folder" class="tree-folder"></i> <strong>scripts/</strong></div>
                <div class="tree-item"><i data-lucide="folder" class="tree-folder"></i> <strong>templates/</strong></div>
              </div>
````
