````html
            cursor: not-allowed;
        }
        
        .pagination-btn.active {
            background: var(--accent);
            color: white;
            border-color: var(--accent);
        }
        
        /* Loading State */
        .loading {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            padding: 3rem;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
        }
        
        .spinner {
            border: 3px solid var(--border);
            border-top: 3px solid var(--accent);
            border-radius: 50%;
            width: 40px;
            height: 40px;
            animation: spin 0.8s linear infinite;
            margin-right: 1rem;
        }
        
        @keyframes spin {
            to { transform: rotate(360deg); }
        }
        
        /* Responsive */
        @media (max-width: 1200px) {
            .header-top {
                flex-wrap: wrap;
            }
            
            .search-container {
                max-width: 100%;
                min-width: auto;
            }
            
            .charts-container {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
            }
        }
        
        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .header {
                padding: 1rem;
            }
            
            .header-top {
                flex-direction: column;
                gap: 1rem;
                margin-bottom: 1rem;
            }
            
            .logo {
                font-size: 1.25rem;
            }
            
            .header-controls {
                width: 100%;
                flex-direction: column;
            }
            
            .filter-group {
                width: 100%;
                min-width: auto;
            }
            
            .filter-select {
                width: 100%;
            }
            
            .charts-container {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }
            
            .detail-grid {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }
            
            .table-container {
                max-height: 400px;
            }
            
            th, td {
                padding: 0.5rem;
                font-size: 0.8rem;
            }
            
            .stat-value {
                font-size: 1.5rem;
            }
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <!-- Header -->
    <div class="header">
        <div class="header-container">
            <div class="header-top">
                <div class="logo">
                    <svg fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                        <path d="M12 2C6.48 2 2 6.48 2 12s4.48 10 10 10 10-4.48 10-10S17.52 2 12 2zm0 18c-4.42 0-8-3.58-8-8s3.58-8 8-8 8 3.58 8 8-3.58 8-8 8zm3.5-9c.83 0 1.5-.67 1.5-1.5S16.33 8 15.5 8 14 8.67 14 9.5s.67 1.5 1.5 1.5zm-7 0c.83 0 1.5-.67 1.5-1.5S9.33 8 8.5 8 7 8.67 7 9.5 7.67 11 8.5 11zm3.5 6.5c2.33 0 4.31-1.46 5.11-3.5H6.89c.8 2.04 2.78 3.5 5.11 3.5z"/>
                    </svg>
                    CREXI Deal Finder
                </div>
                
                <div class="search-container">
                    <svg class="search-icon" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                        <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M21 21l-6-6m2-5a7 7 0 11-14 0 7 7 0 0114 0z"></path>
                    </svg>
                    <input type="text" class="search-input" id="searchInput" placeholder="Search properties...">
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="header-controls">
                <div class="filter-group">
                    <label class="filter-label">Tier</label>
                    <select class="filter-select" id="tierFilter">
                        <option value="">All Tiers</option>
                        <option value="A">Tier A</option>
                        <option value="B">Tier B</option>
                        <option value="C">Tier C</option>
                        <option value="D">Tier D</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
                
                <div class="filter-group">
                    <label class="filter-label">State</label>
                    <select class="filter-select" id="stateFilter">
                        <option value="">All States</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
                
                <div class="filter-group">
                    <label class="filter-label">Type</label>
                    <select class="filter-select" id="typeFilter">
                        <option value="">All Types</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
                
                <div class="filter-group">
                    <label class="filter-label">Price</label>
                    <select class="filter-select" id="priceFilter">
                        <option value="">All Prices</option>
                        <option value="0-100000">Under $100k</option>
                        <option value="100000-500000">$100k - $500k</option>
                        <option value="500000-1000000">$500k - $1M</option>
                        <option value="1000000-5000000">$1M - $5M</option>
                        <option value="5000000-999999999">$5M+</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
    
    <!-- Main Content -->
    <div style="max-width: 1600px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 2rem 1rem;">
        <!-- Stats Row -->
        <div class="stats-row">
            <div class="stat-card">
                <div class="stat-label">Total Listings</div>
                <div class="stat-value" id="totalListings">0</div>
            </div>
            <div class="stat-card">
                <div class="stat-label">Avg Price</div>
                <div class="stat-value" id="avgPrice">—</div>
                <div class="stat-sub" id="priceRange"></div>
            </div>
            <div class="stat-card">
                <div class="stat-label">Avg Days on Market</div>
                <div class="stat-value" id="avgDom">—</div>
                <div class="stat-sub" id="domRange"></div>
            </div>
            <div class="stat-card">
                <div class="stat-label">Avg Score</div>
                <div class="stat-value" id="avgScore">—</div>
            </div>
            <div class="stat-card">
                <div class="stat-label">Tier A Deals</div>
                <div class="stat-value" id="tierACount">0</div>
            </div>
            <div class="stat-card">
                <div class="stat-label">Tier B Deals</div>
                <div class="stat-value" id="tierBCount">0</div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <!-- Charts -->
        <div class="charts-container">
            <div class="chart-card">
                <div class="chart-title">Days on Market Distribution</div>
                <canvas id="domChart" class="chart-canvas"></canvas>
            </div>
            <div class="chart-card">
                <div class="chart-title">Property Types</div>
                <canvas id="typeChart" class="chart-canvas"></canvas>
            </div>
            <div class="chart-card">
                <div class="chart-title">Score Distribution</div>
                <canvas id="scoreChart" class="chart-canvas"></canvas>
            </div>
            <div class="chart-card">
                <div class="chart-title">Top 15 States by Listings</div>
                <canvas id="stateChart" class="chart-canvas"></canvas>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <!-- Map -->
        <div class="map-section">
            <div class="map-card" id="mapContainer">
                <div id="map"></div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <!-- Table -->
        <div class="table-section">
            <div class="table-header">
                <div class="table-title">All Listings</div>
                <div class="table-pagination">
                    <span id="tableCount">Showing 0 of 0</span>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="table-container">
                <table id="listingsTable">
                    <thead>
                        <tr>
                            <th class="sortable" data-sort="name">Property Name</th>
                            <th class="sortable" data-sort="price">Price</th>
                            <th class="sortable" data-sort="dom">DOM</th>
                            <th class="sortable" data-sort="score">Score</th>
                            <th class="sortable" data-sort="tier">Tier</th>
                            <th class="sortable" data-sort="city">City</th>
                            <th class="sortable" data-sort="state">State</th>
                            <th class="sortable" data-sort="type">Type</th>
                            <th class="sortable" data-sort="sqft">SqFt</th>
                        </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody id="tableBody">
                    </tbody>
                </table>
            </div>
            
            <div class="pagination" id="pagination">
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
    
    <!-- Scripts -->
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js@4.5.0/dist/chart.umd.min.js"></script>
    <script src="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.js"></script>
    <script src="https://unpkg.com/leaflet.markercluster@1.5.3/dist/leaflet.markercluster.js"></script>
    
    <script>
        // ====== Application State ======
        const state = {
            allListings: [],
            filteredListings: [],
            currentPage: 1,
            itemsPerPage: 50,
            sortField: 'score',
            sortDir: 'desc',
            expandedRow: null,
            charts: {},
            map: null,
            markers: null,
            search: '',
            filters: {
                tier: '',
                state: '',
                type: '',
                price: '',
            }
        };
        
        // ====== Load Data ======
        const EMBEDDED_DATA = [{"id":"1762142","name":"Savannah GA Freestanding Restaurant        
        async function loadData() {
            try {
                state.allListings = EMBEDDED_DATA;
                
                console.log(`Loaded ${state.allListings.length} listings`);
                
                // Initialize filters
                populateFilters();
                applyFilters();
                initCharts();
                initMap();
                renderTable();
                updateStats();
            } catch (error) {
                console.error('Error loading data:', error);
                document.getElementById('tableBody').innerHTML = `
                    <tr><td colspan="9" style="text-align: center; padding: 2rem; color: #D4A574;">
                        Error loading data. Ensure data/all_listings.json exists.
                    </td></tr>
                `;
            }
        }
        
        // ====== Populate Filter Dropdowns ======
        function populateFilters() {
            // States
            const states = [...new Set(state.allListings.map(l => l.state))].sort();
            const stateSelect = document.getElementById('stateFilter');
            states.forEach(s => {
                const option = document.createElement('option');
                option.value = s;
                option.textContent = s;
                stateSelect.appendChild(option);
            });
            
            // Types
            const types = [...new Set(state.allListings.map(l => l.type))].sort();
            const typeSelect = document.getElementById('typeFilter');
            types.forEach(t => {
                const option = document.createElement('option');
                option.value = t;
                option.textContent = t;
                typeSelect.appendChild(option);
            });
        }
        
        // ====== Filtering & Search ======
        function applyFilters() {
            state.filteredListings = state.allListings.filter(listing => {
                // Search
                if (state.search) {
                    const q = state.search.toLowerCase();
                    const searchFields = [listing.name, listing.city, listing.state, listing.type].join(' ').toLowerCase();
                    if (!searchFields.includes(q)) return false;
                }
                
                // Tier
                if (state.filters.tier && listing.tier !== state.filters.tier) return false;
                
                // State
                if (state.filters.state && listing.state !== state.filters.state) return false;
                
                // Type
                if (state.filters.type && listing.type !== state.filters.type) return false;
                
                // Price range
                if (state.filters.price) {
                    const [min, max] = state.filters.price.split('-').map(Number);
                    if (listing.price < min || listing.price > max) return false;
                }
                
                return true;
            });
            
            state.currentPage = 1;
            state.expandedRow = null;
        }
        
        // ====== Debounced Search ======
        let searchTimeout;
        document.getElementById('searchInput').addEventListener('input', (e) => {
            clearTimeout(searchTimeout);
            state.search = e.target.value;
            searchTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
                applyFilters();
                renderTable();
                updateStats();
            }, 300);
        });
        
        // ====== Filter Listeners ======
        document.getElementById('tierFilter').addEventListener('change', (e) => {
            state.filters.tier = e.target.value;
            applyFilters();
            renderTable();
            updateStats();
        });
        
        document.getElementById('stateFilter').addEventListener('change', (e) => {
            state.filters.state = e.target.value;
            applyFilters();
            renderTable();
            updateStats();
        });
        
        document.getElementById('typeFilter').addEventListener('change', (e) => {
            state.filters.type = e.target.value;
            applyFilters();
            renderTable();
            updateStats();
        });
        
        document.getElementById('priceFilter').addEventListener('change', (e) => {
            state.filters.price = e.target.value;
            applyFilters();
            renderTable();
            updateStats();
        });
        
        // ====== Sorting ======
        document.querySelectorAll('th.sortable').forEach(th => {
            th.addEventListener('click', () => {
                const field = th.dataset.sort;
                if (state.sortField === field) {
                    state.sortDir = state.sortDir === 'asc' ? 'desc' : 'asc';
                } else {
                    state.sortField = field;
                    state.sortDir = field === 'score' ? 'desc' : 'asc';
                }
                
                // Update header classes
                document.querySelectorAll('th.sortable').forEach(h => {
                    h.classList.remove('sort-asc', 'sort-desc');
                });
                th.classList.add(state.sortDir === 'asc' ? 'sort-asc' : 'sort-desc');
                
                renderTable();
            });
        });
        
        // ====== Stats ======
        function updateStats() {
            const listings = state.filteredListings;
            
            document.getElementById('totalListings').textContent = listings.length.toLocaleString();
            
            if (listings.length > 0) {
                const prices = listings.map(l => l.price);
                const avgPrice = prices.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / prices.length;
                document.getElementById('avgPrice').textContent = '$' + Math.round(avgPrice / 1000) + 'k';
                document.getElementById('priceRange').textContent = `$${Math.min(...prices).toLocaleString()} - $${Math.max(...prices).toLocaleString()}`;
                
                const doms = listings.map(l => l.dom);
                const avgDom = Math.round(doms.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / doms.length);
                document.getElementById('avgDom').textContent = avgDom;
                document.getElementById('domRange').textContent = `${Math.min(...doms)} - ${Math.max(...doms)} days`;
                
                const scores = listings.map(l => l.score);
                const avgScore = Math.round(scores.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / scores.length);
                document.getElementById('avgScore').textContent = avgScore;
                
                document.getElementById('tierACount').textContent = listings.filter(l => l.tier === 'A').length;
                document.getElementById('tierBCount').textContent = listings.filter(l => l.tier === 'B').length;
            } else {
                document.getElementById('avgPrice').textContent = '—';
                document.getElementById('avgDom').textContent = '—';
                document.getElementById('avgScore').textContent = '—';
                document.getElementById('tierACount').textContent = '0';
                document.getElementById('tierBCount').textContent = '0';
                document.getElementById('priceRange').textContent = '';
                document.getElementById('domRange').textContent = '';
            }
        }
        
        // ====== Charts ======
        function initCharts() {
            const listings = state.allListings;
            
            // DOM Distribution
            const domBuckets = {
                '0-90': 0, '90-180': 0, '180-365': 0, '365-730': 0, '730+': 0
            };
            listings.forEach(l => {
                if (l.dom <= 90) domBuckets['0-90']++;
                else if (l.dom <= 180) domBuckets['90-180']++;
                else if (l.dom <= 365) domBuckets['180-365']++;
                else if (l.dom <= 730) domBuckets['365-730']++;
                else domBuckets['730+']++;
            });
            
            state.charts.dom = new Chart(document.getElementById('domChart'), {
                type: 'bar',
                data: {
                    labels: Object.keys(domBuckets),
                    datasets: [{
                        label: 'Listings',
                        data: Object.values(domBuckets),
                        backgroundColor: '#D4A574',
                        borderColor: '#C4955F',
                        borderWidth: 1,
                    }]
                },
                options: {
                    responsive: true,
                    maintainAspectRatio: true,
                    plugins: { legend: { display: false } },
                    scales: { y: { beginAtZero: true } }
                }
            });
            
            // Property Types
            const typeCount = {};
            listings.forEach(l => {
                typeCount[l.type] = (typeCount[l.type] || 0) + 1;
            });
            
            const colors = [
                '#059669', '#2563EB', '#D97706', '#DC2626', '#7C3AED',
                '#DB2777', '#0891B2', '#EA580C', '#4F46E5', '#15803D'
            ];
            
            state.charts.type = new Chart(document.getElementById('typeChart'), {
                type: 'doughnut',
                data: {
                    labels: Object.keys(typeCount),
                    datasets: [{
                        data: Object.values(typeCount),
                        backgroundColor: colors.slice(0, Object.keys(typeCount).length),
                    }]
                },
                options: {
                    responsive: true,
                    maintainAspectRatio: true,
                    plugins: {
                        legend: {
                            position: 'bottom',
                            labels: { font: { family: "'Inter', sans-serif", size: 11 }, padding: 10 }
                        }
                    }
                }
            });
            
            // Score Distribution
            const scoreBuckets = {
                '0-20': 0, '20-40': 0, '40-60': 0, '60-80': 0, '80-100': 0
            };
            listings.forEach(l => {
                if (l.score <= 20) scoreBuckets['0-20']++;
                else if (l.score <= 40) scoreBuckets['20-40']++;
                else if (l.score <= 60) scoreBuckets['40-60']++;
                else if (l.score <= 80) scoreBuckets['60-80']++;
                else scoreBuckets['80-100']++;
            });
            
            state.charts.score = new Chart(document.getElementById('scoreChart'), {
                type: 'bar',
                data: {
                    labels: Object.keys(scoreBuckets),
                    datasets: [{
                        label: 'Listings',
                        data: Object.values(scoreBuckets),
                        backgroundColor: '#2563EB',
                        borderColor: '#1D4ED8',
                        borderWidth: 1,
                    }]
                },
                options: {
                    responsive: true,
                    maintainAspectRatio: true,
                    plugins: { legend: { display: false } },
                    scales: { y: { beginAtZero: true } }
                }
            });
            
            // Top States
            const stateCount = {};
            listings.forEach(l => {
                stateCount[l.state] = (stateCount[l.state] || 0) + 1;
            });
            
            const topStates = Object.entries(stateCount)
                .sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1])
                .slice(0, 15);
            
            state.charts.state = new Chart(document.getElementById('stateChart'), {
                type: 'bar',
                data: {
                    labels: topStates.map(s => s[0]),
                    datasets: [{
                        label: 'Listings',
                        data: topStates.map(s => s[1]),
                        backgroundColor: '#D97706',
                        borderColor: '#B45309',
                        borderWidth: 1,
                    }]
                },
                options: {
                    indexAxis: 'y',
                    responsive: true,
                    maintainAspectRatio: true,
                    plugins: { legend: { display: false } },
                    scales: { x: { beginAtZero: true } }
                }
            });
        }
        
        // ====== Map ======
        function initMap() {
            state.map = L.map('map').setView([39.8, -98.5], 4);
            
            L.tileLayer('https://{s}.tile.openstreetmap.org/{z}/{x}/{y}.png', {
                attribution: '© OpenStreetMap',
                maxZoom: 19
            }).addTo(state.map);
            
            state.markers = L.markerClusterGroup({
                maxClusterRadius: 80,
                showCoverageOnHover: false,
            });
            
            state.allListings.forEach(listing => {
                if (listing.lat && listing.lng) {
                    const marker = L.marker([listing.lat, listing.lng]);
                    
                    const tier = listing.tier || 'D';
                    const tierColors = { A: '#059669', B: '#2563EB', C: '#D97706', D: '#DC2626' };
                    
                    const html = `
                        <div class="map-popup-content">
                            <div class="map-popup-name">${listing.name.substring(0, 40)}${listing.name.length > 40 ? '...' : ''}</div>
                            <div class="map-popup-detail"><strong>$${(listing.price / 1000).toFixed(0)}k</strong></div>
                            <div class="map-popup-detail">DOM: ${listing.dom} days</div>
                            <div class="map-popup-detail">Score: ${listing.score}</div>
                            <div class="map-popup-detail">Tier: <span style="font-weight: 600; color: ${tierColors[tier]}">${tier}</span></div>
                            <div class="map-popup-detail">${listing.city}, ${listing.state}</div>
                            <a href="${listing.url}" target="_blank" style="color: #D4A574; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 600;">View on CREXI →</a>
                        </div>
                    `;
                    
                    marker.bindPopup(html);
                    state.markers.addLayer(marker);
                }
            });
            
            state.map.addLayer(state.markers);
        }
        
        // ====== Table Rendering ======
        function renderTable() {
            const sorted = [...state.filteredListings].sort((a, b) => {
                const aVal = a[state.sortField];
                const bVal = b[state.sortField];
                
                if (typeof aVal === 'string') {
                    return state.sortDir === 'asc' 
                        ? aVal.localeCompare(bVal)
                        : bVal.localeCompare(aVal);
                }
                
                return state.sortDir === 'asc' ? aVal - bVal : bVal - aVal;
            });
            
            const start = (state.currentPage - 1) * state.itemsPerPage;
            const end = start + state.itemsPerPage;
            const page = sorted.slice(start, end);
            
            const tbody = document.getElementById('tableBody');
            tbody.innerHTML = '';
            
            if (page.length === 0) {
                tbody.innerHTML = `<tr><td colspan="9" style="text-align: center; padding: 2rem; color: #6B7280;">No listings found</td></tr>`;
                document.getElementById('pagination').innerHTML = '';
                document.getElementById('tableCount').textContent = 'Showing 0 of 0';
                return;
            }
            
            page.forEach((listing, idx) => {
                const tr = document.createElement('tr');
                tr.className = `tier-${listing.tier.toLowerCase()}`;
                tr.id = `row-${listing.id}`;
                
                const isExpanded = state.expandedRow === listing.id;
                
                tr.innerHTML = `
                    <td><strong>${listing.name}</strong></td>
                    <td class="price-cell">$${(listing.price / 1000).toFixed(0)}k</td>
                    <td>${listing.dom}</td>
                    <td class="score-cell">${listing.score}</td>
                    <td><span class="tier-badge tier-${listing.tier.toLowerCase()}">${listing.tier}</span></td>
                    <td>${listing.city}</td>
                    <td>${listing.state}</td>
                    <td>${listing.type}</td>
                    <td>${listing.sqft ? listing.sqft.toLocaleString() : '—'}</td>
                `;
                
                tr.addEventListener('click', () => toggleDetail(listing.id, listing));
                tbody.appendChild(tr);
                
                if (isExpanded) {
                    const detailRow = document.createElement('tr');
                    detailRow.className = `tier-${listing.tier.toLowerCase()}`;
                    detailRow.innerHTML = `
                        <td colspan="9">
                            <div class="detail-panel active">
                                <div class="detail-grid">
                                    <div class="detail-item">
                                        <div class="detail-label">Property Name</div>
                                        <div class="detail-value">${listing.name}</div>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="detail-item">
                                        <div class="detail-label">Price</div>
                                        <div class="detail-value">$${listing.price.toLocaleString()}</div>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="detail-item">
                                        <div class="detail-label">Days on Market</div>
                                        <div class="detail-value">${listing.dom}</div>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="detail-item">
                                        <div class="detail-label">Score</div>
                                        <div class="detail-value">${listing.score}</div>
                                        <div class="score-bar">
                                            <div class="score-bar-fill" style="width: ${listing.score}%"></div>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="detail-item">
                                        <div class="detail-label">Tier</div>
                                        <div class="detail-value"><span class="tier-badge tier-${listing.tier.toLowerCase()}">${listing.tier}</span></div>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="detail-item">
                                        <div class="detail-label">Address</div>
                                        <div class="detail-address">${listing.city}, ${listing.state} ${listing.zip}</div>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="detail-item">
                                        <div class="detail-label">Property Type</div>
                                        <div class="detail-value">${listing.type}</div>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="detail-item">
                                        <div class="detail-label">Square Footage</div>
                                        <div class="detail-value">${listing.sqft ? listing.sqft.toLocaleString() : '—'}</div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                                <a href="${listing.url}" target="_blank" class="detail-link">View on CREXI</a>
                            </div>
                        </td>
                    `;
                    tbody.appendChild(detailRow);
                }
            });
            
            document.getElementById('tableCount').textContent = `Showing ${start + 1} - ${Math.min(end, sorted.length)} of ${sorted.length}`;
            
            // Pagination
            const totalPages = Math.ceil(sorted.length / state.itemsPerPage);
            const paginationDiv = document.getElementById('pagination');
            paginationDiv.innerHTML = '';
            
            const prevBtn = document.createElement('button');
            prevBtn.className = 'pagination-btn';
            prevBtn.textContent = 'Previous';
            prevBtn.disabled = state.currentPage === 1;
            prevBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
                if (state.currentPage > 1) {
                    state.currentPage--;
                    renderTable();
                    document.querySelector('.table-container').scrollTop = 0;
                }
            });
            paginationDiv.appendChild(prevBtn);
            
            for (let i = 1; i <= Math.min(totalPages, 5); i++) {
                const pageBtn = document.createElement('button');
                pageBtn.className = 'pagination-btn' + (i === state.currentPage ? ' active' : '');
                pageBtn.textContent = i;
                pageBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
                    state.currentPage = i;
                    renderTable();
                    document.querySelector('.table-container').scrollTop = 0;
                });
                paginationDiv.appendChild(pageBtn);
            }
            
            if (totalPages > 5) {
                const dots = document.createElement('span');
                dots.style.padding = '0.5rem 0';
                dots.textContent = '...';
                paginationDiv.appendChild(dots);
            }
            
            const nextBtn = document.createElement('button');
            nextBtn.className = 'pagination-btn';
            nextBtn.textContent = 'Next';
            nextBtn.disabled = state.currentPage === totalPages;
            nextBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
                if (state.currentPage < totalPages) {
                    state.currentPage++;
                    renderTable();
                    document.querySelector('.table-container').scrollTop = 0;
                }
            });
            paginationDiv.appendChild(nextBtn);
        }
        
        function toggleDetail(id, listing) {
            state.expandedRow = state.expandedRow === id ? null : id;
            renderTable();
        }
        
        // ====== Initialize ======
        loadData();
    </script>
</body>
</html>
````

## File: docs/site/index.html
````html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Deal Intelligence — The Most Intelligent Way to Acquire Cash-Flowing Properties</title>
<meta name="description" content="A proprietary six-year intelligence system for finding and closing owner-financed commercial real estate — zero bank dependency, automated from search to signed LOI.">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,700;0,900;1,400&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800;900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root {
    --navy: #0d1b2a;
    --navy-2: #1a2f4a;
    --navy-3: #0a1520;
    --teal: #00c2a0;
    --teal-2: #00a88a;
    --gold: #f5a623;
    --red: #e63946;
    --white: #ffffff;
    --off-white: #f8f9fb;
    --border: #e5e8ec;
    --text-1: #0d1b2a;
    --text-2: #3a4a5c;
    --text-3: #6b7a8d;
  }

  * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

  body {
    font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif;
    color: var(--text-1);
    background: white;
    -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
    overflow-x: hidden;
  }

  /* ── NAV ─────────────────────────────────── */
  nav {
    position: fixed;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    right: 0;
    z-index: 100;
    background: rgba(13,27,42,0.95);
    backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
    padding: 0 40px;
    height: 64px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
  }

  .nav-brand {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    text-decoration: none;
  }

  .nav-logo {
    width: 36px;
    height: 36px;
    background: var(--teal);
    border-radius: 8px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 900;
    color: var(--navy);
  }

  .nav-name {
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: white;
    letter-spacing: 0.3px;
  }

  .nav-links {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 32px;
    list-style: none;
  }

  .nav-links a {
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 500;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6);
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: color 0.2s;
  }

  .nav-links a:hover { color: white; }

  .nav-cta {
    background: var(--teal);
    color: var(--navy) !important;
    font-weight: 700 !important;
    padding: 8px 20px;
    border-radius: 8px;
    font-size: 13px !important;
    transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.2s !important;
  }

  .nav-cta:hover {
    background: var(--teal-2) !important;
    transform: translateY(-1px);
    color: var(--navy) !important;
  }

  /* ── HERO ─────────────────────────────────── */
  .hero {
    background: var(--navy-3);
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    padding: 120px 40px 80px;
  }

  .hero-bg {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background:
      radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 50% at 70% 50%, rgba(0,194,160,0.12) 0%, transparent 70%),
      radial-gradient(ellipse 40% 60% at 20% 80%, rgba(245,166,35,0.06) 0%, transparent 60%);
  }

  .hero-grid-lines {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background-image:
      linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,0.02) 1px, transparent 1px),
      linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.02) 1px, transparent 1px);
    background-size: 60px 60px;
  }

  .hero-inner {
    max-width: 1200px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    width: 100%;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 80px;
    align-items: center;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
  }

  .hero-eyebrow {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--teal);
    margin-bottom: 20px;
  }

  .hero-eyebrow::before {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 20px;
    height: 2px;
    background: var(--teal);
  }

  .hero-title {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 60px;
    font-weight: 900;
    color: white;
    line-height: 1.05;
    margin-bottom: 22px;
  }

  .hero-title em {
    color: var(--teal);
    font-style: normal;
  }

  .hero-subtitle {
    font-size: 17px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55);
    line-height: 1.65;
    margin-bottom: 36px;
    max-width: 480px;
  }

  .hero-actions {
    display: flex;
    gap: 14px;
    align-items: center;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }

  .btn-primary {
    background: var(--teal);
    color: var(--navy);
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 700;
    padding: 14px 28px;
    border-radius: 10px;
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.2s;
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
  }

  .btn-primary:hover { background: var(--teal-2); transform: translateY(-2px); }

  .btn-secondary {
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7);
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 500;
    padding: 14px 20px;
    border-radius: 10px;
    text-decoration: none;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15);
    transition: border-color 0.2s, color 0.2s;
  }

  .btn-secondary:hover { border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4); color: white; }

  .hero-stats {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 1px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
    border-radius: 16px;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .hero-stat {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03);
    padding: 28px 24px;
    text-align: center;
  }

  .hero-stat-value {
    font-size: 44px;
    font-weight: 900;
    letter-spacing: -2px;
    line-height: 1;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
    color: white;
  }

  .hero-stat-value.teal { color: var(--teal); }
  .hero-stat-value.gold { color: var(--gold); }

  .hero-stat-label {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
  }

  /* ── SECTION COMMONS ───────────────────── */
  section {
    padding: 96px 40px;
  }

  .container {
    max-width: 1200px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    width: 100%;
  }

  .section-eyebrow {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--teal);
    margin-bottom: 12px;
  }

  .section-title {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 40px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--navy);
    line-height: 1.2;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }

  .section-title.light { color: white; }

  .section-desc {
    font-size: 17px;
    color: var(--text-2);
    line-height: 1.65;
    max-width: 580px;
  }

  .section-desc.light { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); }

  /* ── THE PROBLEM ────────────────────────── */
  .problem {
    background: var(--off-white);
  }

  .problem-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 24px;
    margin-top: 52px;
  }

  .problem-card {
    background: white;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 16px;
    padding: 28px 24px;
  }

  .problem-icon {
    width: 44px;
    height: 44px;
    border-radius: 10px;
    background: var(--navy);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 20px;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }

  .problem-card h3 {
    font-size: 17px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--navy);
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    line-height: 1.3;
  }

  .problem-card p {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: var(--text-2);
    line-height: 1.65;
  }

  /* ── HOW IT WORKS ───────────────────────── */
  .how-it-works {
    background: var(--navy);
  }

  .phases {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(5, 1fr);
    gap: 16px;
    margin-top: 52px;
    position: relative;
  }

  .phases::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 32px;
    left: 32px;
    right: 32px;
    height: 2px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    z-index: 0;
  }

  .phase {
    text-align: center;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
  }

  .phase-num {
    width: 64px;
    height: 64px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 20px;
    font-weight: 900;
    color: white;
    margin: 0 auto 16px;
    transition: background 0.3s;
  }

  .phase:hover .phase-num {
    background: var(--teal);
    color: var(--navy);
    border-color: var(--teal);
  }

  .phase h4 {
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: white;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    line-height: 1.3;
  }

  .phase p {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.45);
    line-height: 1.6;
  }

  /* ── DEALS ──────────────────────────────── */
  .deals {
    background: white;
  }

  .deals-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
    gap: 16px;
    margin-top: 52px;
  }

  .deal-card {
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 16px;
    padding: 22px 18px;
    background: white;
    transition: box-shadow 0.2s, transform 0.2s;
    cursor: default;
  }

  .deal-card:hover {
    box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(13,27,42,0.1);
    transform: translateY(-3px);
  }

  .deal-card-header {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
  }

  .deal-num {
    width: 28px;
    height: 28px;
    border-radius: 7px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 800;
    color: white;
  }

  .deal-score {
    font-size: 22px;
    font-weight: 900;
    letter-spacing: -1px;
  }

  .deal-name {
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--navy);
    margin-bottom: 4px;
    line-height: 1.3;
  }

  .deal-market {
    font-size: 11px;
    color: var(--text-3);
    font-weight: 500;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
  }

  .deal-stats {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 8px;
  }

  .deal-stat {
    background: var(--off-white);
    border-radius: 8px;
    padding: 8px 10px;
    text-align: center;
  }

  .deal-stat-value {
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 800;
    color: var(--navy);
  }

  .deal-stat-label {
    font-size: 9px;
    font-weight: 600;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    color: var(--text-3);
    margin-top: 2px;
  }

  .deal-badge {
    display: inline-block;
    font-size: 10px;
    font-weight: 700;
    padding: 3px 8px;
    border-radius: 5px;
    margin-top: 10px;
  }

  /* ── INTELLIGENCE ───────────────────────── */
  .intelligence {
    background: var(--off-white);
  }

  .intel-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 52px;
    align-items: center;
    margin-top: 52px;
  }

  .intel-features {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 20px;
  }

  .intel-feature {
    display: flex;
    gap: 16px;
    align-items: start;
  }

  .intel-icon {
    width: 40px;
    height: 40px;
    border-radius: 10px;
    background: var(--navy);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 18px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }

  .intel-feature-text h4 {
    font-size: 16px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--navy);
    margin-bottom: 4px;
  }

  .intel-feature-text p {
    font-size: 13.5px;
    color: var(--text-2);
    line-height: 1.6;
  }

  .intel-proof {
    background: var(--navy);
    border-radius: 20px;
    padding: 32px 28px;
    color: white;
  }

  .intel-proof h3 {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 22px;
    color: white;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
  }

  .intel-proof-subtitle {
    font-size: 13px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.45);
    margin-bottom: 24px;
  }

  .intel-item {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    padding: 10px 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
    font-size: 13px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7);
  }

  .intel-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }

  .intel-check {
    width: 20px;
    height: 20px;
    background: var(--teal);
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 10px;
    color: var(--navy);
    font-weight: 900;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }

  /* ── ABOUT ──────────────────────────────── */
  .about {
    background: white;
  }

  .about-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 80px;
    align-items: center;
    margin-top: 52px;
  }

  .about-timeline {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 0;
  }

  .about-year {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 80px 1fr;
    gap: 20px;
    padding: 18px 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  }

  .about-year:last-child { border-bottom: none; }

  .about-year-label {
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 800;
    color: var(--teal);
    padding-top: 3px;
  }

  .about-year-content h4 {
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--navy);
    margin-bottom: 4px;
  }

  .about-year-content p {
    font-size: 13.5px;
    color: var(--text-2);
    line-height: 1.6;
  }

  .about-text {
    font-size: 16px;
    color: var(--text-2);
    line-height: 1.75;
  }

  .about-text strong { color: var(--text-1); }

  .about-text p { margin-bottom: 20px; }

  .about-quote {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(13,27,42,0.97), rgba(26,47,74,0.97));
    border-radius: 16px;
    padding: 24px 26px;
    margin-top: 24px;
    border-left: 3px solid var(--teal);
  }

  .about-quote p {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 17px;
    font-style: italic;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.85);
    line-height: 1.6;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
  }

  .about-quote cite {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--teal);
    font-style: normal;
  }

  /* ── PARTNERSHIP ────────────────────────── */
  .partnership {
    background: var(--navy);
  }

  .partner-options {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 20px;
    margin-top: 52px;
  }

  .partner-card {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04);
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    border-radius: 16px;
    padding: 28px 24px;
    transition: background 0.2s, border-color 0.2s;
  }

  .partner-card:first-child {
    background: rgba(0,194,160,0.08);
    border-color: rgba(0,194,160,0.25);
  }

  .partner-card:hover {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.07);
  }

  .partner-card:first-child:hover {
    background: rgba(0,194,160,0.12);
  }

  .partner-option-label {
    font-size: 10px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--teal);
    margin-bottom: 10px;
  }

  .partner-card h3 {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 22px;
    color: white;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
  }

  .partner-card p {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55);
    line-height: 1.65;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
  }

  .partner-card-cta {
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--teal);
    text-decoration: none;
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 6px;
  }

  .partner-card-cta:hover { color: white; }

  /* ── CTA ────────────────────────────────── */
  .cta-section {
    background: var(--navy-3);
    text-align: center;
    padding: 120px 40px;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .cta-section::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 60% at 50% 50%, rgba(0,194,160,0.1) 0%, transparent 70%);
  }

  .cta-section .container { position: relative; z-index: 1; }

  .cta-label {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--teal);
    margin-bottom: 20px;
  }

  .cta-title {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 52px;
    font-weight: 900;
    color: white;
    line-height: 1.1;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
  }

  .cta-subtitle {
    font-size: 18px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5);
    line-height: 1.6;
    margin-bottom: 44px;
    max-width: 560px;
    margin-left: auto;
    margin-right: auto;
  }

  .cta-buttons {
    display: flex;
    gap: 16px;
    justify-content: center;
    margin-bottom: 52px;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }

  .btn-cta-primary {
    background: var(--teal);
    color: var(--navy);
    font-size: 16px;
    font-weight: 800;
    padding: 18px 36px;
    border-radius: 12px;
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.2s;
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
  }

  .btn-cta-primary:hover { background: var(--teal-2); transform: translateY(-2px); }

  .btn-cta-secondary {
    background: transparent;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8);
    font-size: 16px;
    font-weight: 600;
    padding: 18px 36px;
    border-radius: 12px;
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: border-color 0.2s, color 0.2s;
  }

  .btn-cta-secondary:hover { border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); color: white; }

  .cta-contact-strip {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 40px;
    padding-top: 32px;
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
  }

  .cta-contact-item {
    text-align: center;
  }

  .cta-contact-label {
    font-size: 10px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
    margin-bottom: 4px;
  }

  .cta-contact-value {
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.75);
  }

  .cta-contact-value a {
    color: inherit;
    text-decoration: none;
  }

  .cta-contact-value a:hover { color: var(--teal); }

  /* ── FOOTER ─────────────────────────────── */
  footer {
    background: var(--navy);
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
    padding: 28px 40px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
  }

  .footer-brand {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
  }

  .footer-logo {
    width: 28px;
    height: 28px;
    background: rgba(0,194,160,0.15);
    border-radius: 6px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 10px;
    font-weight: 900;
    color: var(--teal);
  }

  .footer-name {
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5);
  }

  .footer-right {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.25);
  }

  /* ── RESPONSIVE ─────────────────────────── */
  @media (max-width: 900px) {
    nav { padding: 0 20px; }
    .nav-links { display: none; }
    .hero { padding: 100px 24px 64px; }
    .hero-inner { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 48px; }
    .hero-title { font-size: 40px; }
    .hero-stats { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
    section { padding: 64px 24px; }
    .problem-grid,
    .partner-options { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .phases { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
    .deals-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
    .intel-grid,
    .about-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 40px; }
    .section-title { font-size: 30px; }
    .cta-title { font-size: 36px; }
    .cta-contact-strip { flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 24px; }
    footer { flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; text-align: center; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- ─── NAV ─────────────────────────────────── -->
<nav>
  <a href="#" class="nav-brand">
    <div class="nav-logo">DI</div>
    <span class="nav-name">Deal Intelligence</span>
  </a>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#how-it-works">System</a></li>
    <li><a href="#deals">Active Deals</a></li>
    <li><a href="#about">About</a></li>
    <li><a href="#partnership">Partnership</a></li>
    <li><a href="#contact" class="nav-cta">Get the Report →</a></li>
  </ul>
</nav>


<!-- ─── HERO ─────────────────────────────────── -->
<section class="hero">
  <div class="hero-bg"></div>
  <div class="hero-grid-lines"></div>
  <div class="hero-inner">
    <div>
      <div class="hero-eyebrow">Six Years in Development</div>
      <h1 class="hero-title">The Only Buyer<br>in the Room Who<br>Did the <em>Homework.</em></h1>
      <p class="hero-subtitle">A proprietary commercial real estate acquisition system — automated from market scan to signed Letter of Intent. Zero bank dependency. Every deal owner-financed.</p>
      <div class="hero-actions">
        <a href="#contact" class="btn-primary">Get the Full Report →</a>
        <a href="#how-it-works" class="btn-secondary">See How It Works</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div>
      <div class="hero-stats">
        <div class="hero-stat">
          <div class="hero-stat-value teal">8</div>
          <div class="hero-stat-label">Active Deal Files</div>
        </div>
        <div class="hero-stat">
          <div class="hero-stat-value">3</div>
          <div class="hero-stat-label">Target Markets</div>
        </div>
        <div class="hero-stat">
          <div class="hero-stat-value gold">$14M</div>
          <div class="hero-stat-label">In Asset Value</div>
        </div>
        <div class="hero-stat">
          <div class="hero-stat-value">$0</div>
          <div class="hero-stat-label">Bank Financing Needed</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>


<!-- ─── THE PROBLEM ──────────────────────────── -->
<section class="problem" id="problem">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="section-eyebrow">The Intelligence Gap</div>
    <h2 class="section-title">Most Investors Are Blind<br>to the Best Deals.</h2>
    <p class="section-desc">The commercial real estate market is full of motivated sellers — they're just invisible to buyers who don't know where to look, what to read, or how to structure the offer.</p>

    <div class="problem-grid">
      <div class="problem-card">
        <div class="problem-icon">📊</div>
        <h3>Days-on-Market Is a Signal, Not a Warning</h3>
        <p>A property listed 400+ days isn't broken — it hasn't found the right buyer with the right structure. The average DOM across our 8 active deals is 437 days. That's not a red flag. That's leverage.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="problem-card">
        <div class="problem-icon">🏦</div>
        <h3>Bank Financing Walls Out Most Buyers</h3>
        <p>Restaurant buildings. Raw land. Special purpose properties. Banks routinely decline these. That's not a deal-killer — it's a filter. The buyers who clear it have no competition. We clear it every time.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="problem-card">
        <div class="problem-icon">🧠</div>
        <h3>Seller Psychology Is Publicly Available</h3>
        <p>DOM history, price reductions, brokerage patterns, listing language — every motivated seller leaves fingerprints. Most buyers don't look. We built a system that reads every signal, on every deal, automatically.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>


<!-- ─── HOW IT WORKS ─────────────────────────── -->
<section class="how-it-works" id="how-it-works">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="section-eyebrow">The Five-Phase Pipeline</div>
    <h2 class="section-title light">From Raw Platform Data<br>to a Signed Letter of Intent.</h2>
    <p class="section-desc light">Every deal runs through the same five-phase pipeline — discovery, scoring, seller profiling, outreach intelligence, and contractual framing — automatically, in under 24 hours.</p>

    <div class="phases">
      <div class="phase">
        <div class="phase-num">1</div>
        <h4>Discovery</h4>
        <p>Multi-platform scan for motivated seller signals: high DOM, price reductions, seller financing terms, target property types</p>
      </div>
      <div class="phase">
        <div class="phase-num">2</div>
        <h4>Deal Scoring</h4>
        <p>100-point scoring model: DOM weight, price-to-market ratio, financing signals, seller motivation language, property quality</p>
      </div>
      <div class="phase">
        <div class="phase-num">3</div>
        <h4>Seller Profiling</h4>
        <p>Psychological archetype mapping: Retiring Operator, Failed Speculator, Exhausted Holder, Portfolio Exit, Distressed Owner</p>
      </div>
      <div class="phase">
        <div class="phase-num">4</div>
        <h4>Outreach Intel</h4>
        <p>3-call close scripts, email templates, full stakeholder contact tree, 21-day multi-channel cadence — calibrated to archetype</p>
      </div>
      <div class="phase">
        <div class="phase-num">5</div>
        <h4>LOI Ready</h4>
        <p>Pre-filled Letter of Intent with deal-specific numbers: price, down, seller note, rate, amortization, balloon, monthly payment</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>


<!-- ─── ACTIVE DEALS ──────────────────────────── -->
<section class="deals" id="deals">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="section-eyebrow">The Active Pipeline</div>
    <h2 class="section-title">Eight Deals. Three Markets.<br>Every One Profiled and LOI-Ready.</h2>
    <p class="section-desc">These aren't hypothetical — they're active listings with analyzed sellers, complete outreach scripts, and pre-populated Letters of Intent ready to send.</p>

    <div class="deals-grid">
      <div class="deal-card">
        <div class="deal-card-header">
          <div class="deal-num" style="background:#0d1b2a;">01</div>
          <div class="deal-score" style="color:#00c2a0;">92</div>

          </div>

          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="deal-badge" style="background:rgba(123,104,238,0.1);color:#7b68ee;">Owner Carry</div>
      </div>

      <div class="deal-card">
        <div class="deal-card-header">
          <div class="deal-num" style="background:#d4a017;color:#0d1b2a;">03</div>
          <div class="deal-score" style="color:#f5a623;">71</div>
        </div>
        <div class="deal-name">Sands Motel</div>
        <div class="deal-market">Yucca Valley, CA</div>
        <div class="deal-stats">
          <div class="deal-stat">

          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="deal-badge" style="background:rgba(245,166,35,0.1);color:#c8851c;">Tired Operator</div>
      </div>

      <div class="deal-card">
        <div class="deal-card-header">
          <div class="deal-num" style="background:#2d8a4e;color:white;">04</div>
          <div class="deal-score" style="color:#2d8a4e;">68</div>
        </div>
        <div class="deal-name">Relax Hotel &amp; Spa</div>
        <div class="deal-market">Desert Hot Springs, CA</div>
        <div class="deal-stats">
          <div class="deal-stat">
            <div class="deal-stat-value">POA</div>
            <div class="deal-stat-label">Price</div>
          </div>
          <div class="deal-stat">
            <div class="deal-stat-value">310+</div>
            <div class="deal-stat-label">DOM</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="deal-badge" style="background:rgba(45,138,78,0.1);color:#2d8a4e;">Owner Carry</div>
      </div>

      <div class="deal-card" style="border-color:rgba(230,57,70,0.2);">
        <div class="deal-card-header">
          <div class="deal-num" style="background:#e63946;">05</div>
          <div class="deal-score" style="color:#e63946;">88</div>
        </div>
        <div class="deal-name">Golden Triangle Assemblage</div>
````
