````html
</section>


<!-- ─── INTELLIGENCE ─────────────────────────── -->
<section class="intelligence">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="intel-grid">
      <div>
        <div class="section-eyebrow">The Intelligence Layer</div>
        <h2 class="section-title">We Know What the Seller<br>Needs Before We Call.</h2>
        <p class="section-desc" style="margin-bottom:36px;">Every deal comes with a complete psychological profile of the seller. We know their archetype, their pain, and exactly what to say — without ever revealing that we know.</p>

        <div class="intel-features">
          <div class="intel-feature">
            <div class="intel-icon">🗺️</div>
            <div class="intel-feature-text">
              <h4>Seller Pain Maps</h4>
              <p>Archetype identification, pain signal analysis, and a calibrated opening line for every deal — built before the first call is made.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="intel-feature">
            <div class="intel-icon">📞</div>
            <div class="intel-feature-text">
              <h4>3-Call Close Sequence</h4>
              <p>Contact & Qualify → Explore & Align → Propose & Structure. A script for each call, each adapted to the seller's specific psychology.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="intel-feature">
            <div class="intel-icon">🌐</div>
            <div class="intel-feature-text">
              <h4>Multi-Channel Outreach</h4>
              <p>Phone, email, LinkedIn, text, direct-to-seller. A 21-day cadence with channel-specific templates. If the phone doesn't close it, one of these does.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="intel-feature">
            <div class="intel-icon">📋</div>
            <div class="intel-feature-text">
              <h4>LOI Pre-Populated</h4>
              <p>Every deal has a ready-to-send Letter of Intent with calculated terms. No scrambling after a verbal yes — the paperwork is already done.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div>
        <div class="intel-proof">
          <h3>What's in Every Deal File</h3>
          <div class="intel-proof-subtitle">29-page report · 8 complete deal packages</div>
          <div class="intel-item"><div class="intel-check">✓</div>Deal card with 100-point score</div>
          <div class="intel-item"><div class="intel-check">✓</div>Money-making implementation plan (3 steps)</div>
          <div class="intel-item"><div class="intel-check">✓</div>Seller pain map and archetype identification</div>
          <div class="intel-item"><div class="intel-check">✓</div>3-call close script (stealth buyer voice)</div>
          <div class="intel-item"><div class="intel-check">✓</div>Email template + LinkedIn outreach note</div>
          <div class="intel-item"><div class="intel-check">✓</div>Stakeholder contact tree (3 tiers)</div>
          <div class="intel-item"><div class="intel-check">✓</div>21-day multi-channel cadence</div>
          <div class="intel-item"><div class="intel-check">✓</div>Pre-filled LOI with deal-specific numbers</div>
          <div style="margin-top:20px;padding-top:16px;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);">
            <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.3);margin-bottom:8px;">Stealth Principle</div>
            <p style="font-size:13px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);line-height:1.65;">Every script is calibrated to the seller's exact pain points — but never reveals that we know them. We show up as a curious buyer who happened to find the listing. The intelligence stays internal.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>


<!-- ─── ABOUT ─────────────────────────────────── -->
<section class="about" id="about">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="about-grid">
      <div>
        <div class="section-eyebrow">The Creator</div>
        <h2 class="section-title">Six Years of Iteration.<br>One System That Works.</h2>

        <div class="about-text">
          <p>I didn't set out to build a real estate technology system. I set out to buy a cash-flowing property with no money down. That first deal — owner-financed, motivated seller, zero bank involvement — taught me everything I needed to know about where the real opportunity lives.</p>
          <p>Every project after that became a laboratory. What could I systematize? What could I automate? What took me 40 hours to research could be done in 40 minutes — if the right tools existed. So I built them.</p>
        </div>

        <div class="about-quote">
          <p>"The scope of what's possible with automation isn't scope creep — it's the whole point. When you can analyze everything from every angle, why wouldn't you? Especially when the decision involves significant capital at risk."</p>
          <cite>— On why comprehensive analysis is never too much</cite>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div>
        <div class="about-timeline">
          <div class="about-year">
            <div class="about-year-label">Year 1–2</div>
            <div class="about-year-content">
              <h4>Manual Discovery</h4>
              <p>Cold calls to 180+ DOM sellers. Spreadsheets. Learning what motivated sellers actually sound like — and what deal structures they respond to.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="about-year">
            <div class="about-year-label">Year 3–4</div>
            <div class="about-year-content">
              <h4>Building Reusable Tools</h4>
              <p>County assessor research templates. Broker profiling workflows. Seller psychology frameworks. Each tool built once, reused on every deal after.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="about-year">
            <div class="about-year-label">Year 5–6</div>
            <div class="about-year-content">
              <h4>AI-Powered Automation</h4>
              <p>Multi-agent pipelines replaced manual research. The entire acquisition workflow — discovery through LOI — now runs automatically for any target market.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="about-year">
            <div class="about-year-label">Now</div>
            <div class="about-year-content">
              <h4>Deal Intelligence v1.0</h4>
              <p>Fully operational. 8 active deal files. 3 markets. The first formal deployment of a system that took six years to build — and gets smarter with every deal closed.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>


<!-- ─── PARTNERSHIP ──────────────────────────── -->
<section class="partnership" id="partnership">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="section-eyebrow">The Opportunity</div>
    <h2 class="section-title light">This System Produces What<br>Most Buyers Spend Months Assembling.</h2>
    <p class="section-desc light">Eight deals are ready to pursue right now. The infrastructure is built. The question is: who is positioned to execute?</p>

    <div class="partner-options">
      <div class="partner-card">
        <div class="partner-option-label">Option A · Recommended</div>
        <h3>Capital Partner</h3>
        <p>You provide acquisition capital — down payments, earnest money, operating reserves. I deploy the system, execute outreach, and manage the close. We structure equity participation in each closed deal.</p>
        <a href="#contact" class="partner-card-cta">Let's Structure This →</a>
      </div>
      <div class="partner-card">
        <div class="partner-option-label">Option B</div>
        <h3>System Licensee</h3>
        <p>Acquire the right to use Deal Intelligence for your own acquisition pipeline. Full training, ongoing system access, and per-deal consultation included. Build your own deal flow on proven infrastructure.</p>
        <a href="#contact" class="partner-card-cta">Learn More →</a>
      </div>
      <div class="partner-card">
        <div class="partner-option-label">Option C</div>
        <h3>Strategic Partner</h3>
        <p>You bring market access, relationships, or operational expertise. I bring intelligence and deal structuring. We build a joint pipeline targeting specific markets, property types, or deal sizes.</p>
        <a href="#contact" class="partner-card-cta">Let's Talk →</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>


<!-- ─── CTA ───────────────────────────────────── -->
<section class="cta-section" id="contact">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="cta-label">Ready to Deploy This Together?</div>
    <h2 class="cta-title">Say Yes to the Deal<br>No One Else Saw.</h2>
    <p class="cta-subtitle">The 29-page Deal Intelligence Report covers every deal in depth. Review it, pick the one that resonates, and let's talk. The first deal we close together demonstrates the system better than any briefing can.</p>

    <div class="cta-buttons">
      <a href="mailto:jeromyjsmith@gmail.com?subject=Deal Intelligence — I'd Like the Full Report" class="btn-cta-primary">
        Request the Full Report →
      </a>
      <a href="mailto:jeromyjsmith@gmail.com?subject=Deal Intelligence — Let's Schedule a Call" class="btn-cta-secondary">
        Schedule a Call
      </a>
    </div>

    <div class="cta-contact-strip">
      <div class="cta-contact-item">
        <div class="cta-contact-label">Prepared By</div>
        <div class="cta-contact-value">Jeromy Jordan Smith</div>
      </div>
      <div style="width:1px;height:32px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08);"></div>
      <div class="cta-contact-item">
        <div class="cta-contact-label">Email</div>
        <div class="cta-contact-value"><a href="mailto:jeromyjsmith@gmail.com">jeromyjsmith@gmail.com</a></div>
      </div>
      <div style="width:1px;height:32px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08);"></div>
      <div class="cta-contact-item">
        <div class="cta-contact-label">Phone</div>
        <div class="cta-contact-value">720-998-2888</div>
      </div>
      <div style="width:1px;height:32px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08);"></div>
      <div class="cta-contact-item">
        <div class="cta-contact-label">Schedule</div>
        <div class="cta-contact-value"><a href="mailto:jeromyjsmith@gmail.com?subject=Deal Intelligence — Let's Schedule a Google Meet">Schedule a Google Meet</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>


<!-- ─── FOOTER ────────────────────────────────── -->
<footer>
  <div class="footer-brand">
    <div class="footer-logo">DI</div>
    <span class="footer-name">Deal Intelligence</span>
  </div>
  <div class="footer-right">Confidential — For Stakeholder Review · March 2026</div>
</footer>

<script>
  // Smooth scroll for nav links
  document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="#"]').forEach(anchor => {
    anchor.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
      const target = document.querySelector(this.getAttribute('href'));
      if (target) {
        e.preventDefault();
        target.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
      }
    });
  });

  // Nav background on scroll
  const nav = document.querySelector('nav');
  window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
    nav.style.background = window.scrollY > 50
      ? 'rgba(10,21,32,0.98)'
      : 'rgba(13,27,42,0.95)';
  });
</script>

</body>
</html>
````

## File: docs/site/proposal.html
````html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Deal Intelligence — Investor Briefing</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,700;0,900;1,400&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root {
    --navy: #0d1b2a;
    --navy-2: #1a2f4a;
    --teal: #00c2a0;
    --gold: #f5a623;
    --red: #e63946;
    --white: #ffffff;
    --off-white: #f8f9fa;
    --border: #e5e8ec;
    --text-1: #0d1b2a;
    --text-2: #3a4a5c;
    --text-3: #6b7a8d;
  }

  * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

  body {
    font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, sans-serif;
    background: white;
    color: var(--text-1);
    -webkit-print-color-adjust: exact;
    print-color-adjust: exact;
  }

  @page {
    size: 8.5in 11in;
    margin: 0;
  }

  .page {
    width: 8.5in;
    height: 11in;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    page-break-after: always;
    break-after: page;
  }

  @media print {
    .page { overflow: visible; break-after: page; }
    body { background: white; }
    .no-print { display: none !important; }
  }

  @media screen {
    body { background: #ddd; padding: 40px 0; }
    .page {
      margin: 0 auto 40px;
      box-shadow: 0 8px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.18);
    }
  }

  /* ── COVER ─────────────────────────────────── */
  .cover {
    background: var(--navy);
    color: white;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    padding: 0.7in 0.75in;
  }

  .cover-eyebrow {
    font-size: 9px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 4px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--teal);
    margin-bottom: 0.4in;
  }

  .cover-logo-mark {
    width: 52px;
    height: 52px;
    background: var(--teal);
    border-radius: 12px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 22px;
    font-weight: 900;
    color: var(--navy);
    letter-spacing: -1px;
    margin-bottom: 28px;
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
  }

  .cover-title {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 52px;
    font-weight: 900;
    line-height: 1.05;
    color: white;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }

  .cover-title em {
    color: var(--teal);
    font-style: normal;
  }

  .cover-subtitle {
    font-size: 15px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55);
    font-weight: 400;
    line-height: 1.55;
    max-width: 5.5in;
    margin-bottom: 0.55in;
  }

  .cover-rule {
    width: 60px;
    height: 3px;
    background: var(--teal);
    margin-bottom: 0.55in;
  }

  .cover-meta {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 24px;
    margin-bottom: auto;
    padding-bottom: 0.5in;
  }

  .cover-meta-item {
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12);
    padding-top: 12px;
  }

  .cover-meta-label {
    font-size: 8px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.35);
    margin-bottom: 5px;
  }

  .cover-meta-value {
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.85);
  }

  .cover-footer {
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
    padding-top: 16px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
  }

  .cover-footer-left {
    font-size: 9px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
    font-weight: 500;
  }

  .cover-conf-badge {
    font-size: 8px;
    font-weight: 800;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--navy);
    background: var(--gold);
    padding: 4px 10px;
    border-radius: 4px;
  }

  /* ── INNER PAGES ──────────────────────────── */
  .page-inner {
    padding: 0.6in 0.75in;
    height: 100%;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
  }

  .page-header {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    padding-bottom: 14px;
    border-bottom: 2px solid var(--navy);
    margin-bottom: 28px;
  }

  .page-header-brand {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
  }

  .page-header-mark {
    width: 28px;
    height: 28px;
    background: var(--teal);
    border-radius: 6px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 900;
    color: var(--navy);
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
  }

  .page-header-name {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--navy);
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
  }

  .page-header-section {
    font-size: 10px;
    color: var(--text-3);
    font-weight: 500;
  }

  .page-footer {
    margin-top: auto;
    padding-top: 16px;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    font-size: 8.5px;
    color: var(--text-3);
  }

  .eyebrow {
    font-size: 9px;
    font-weight: 800;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--teal);
    margin-bottom: 6px;
  }

  .section-title {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 28px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--navy);
    line-height: 1.2;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
  }

  .section-rule {
    width: 40px;
    height: 3px;
    background: var(--teal);
    margin-bottom: 22px;
  }

  .body-text {
    font-size: 10.5px;
    color: var(--text-2);
    line-height: 1.75;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }

  .body-text strong {
    color: var(--text-1);
    font-weight: 700;
  }

  .pull-quote {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(13,27,42,0.97), rgba(26,47,74,0.97));
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 18px 22px;
    margin: 20px 0;
    border-left: 3px solid var(--teal);
  }

  .pull-quote p {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-style: italic;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.85);
    line-height: 1.6;
  }

  .pull-quote cite {
    display: block;
    font-size: 8.5px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--teal);
    margin-top: 8px;
    font-style: normal;
  }

  .timeline {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 0;
    margin: 18px 0;
  }

  .timeline-item {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 90px 1fr;
    gap: 16px;
    padding: 12px 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  }

  .timeline-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }

  .timeline-year {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 800;
    color: var(--teal);
    padding-top: 2px;
  }

  .timeline-content {
    font-size: 10px;
    color: var(--text-2);
    line-height: 1.6;
  }

  .timeline-content strong {
    display: block;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--text-1);
    margin-bottom: 3px;
  }

  .cols-2 {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 24px;
  }

  .cols-60-40 {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1.5fr 1fr;
    gap: 24px;
  }

  .phase-list {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 12px;
    margin: 18px 0;
  }

  .phase-item {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 32px 1fr;
    gap: 12px;
    align-items: start;
  }

  .phase-num {
    width: 32px;
    height: 32px;
    background: var(--navy);
    border-radius: 8px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 900;
    color: white;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    margin-top: 1px;
  }

  .phase-content {
    font-size: 10px;
    color: var(--text-2);
    line-height: 1.6;
  }

  .phase-content strong {
    display: block;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--text-1);
    margin-bottom: 2px;
  }

  .stat-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
    gap: 1px;
    background: var(--border);
    border-radius: 12px;
    overflow: hidden;
    margin: 18px 0;
  }

  .stat-item {
    background: white;
    padding: 16px 14px;
    text-align: center;
  }

  .stat-value {
    font-size: 28px;
    font-weight: 900;
    color: var(--navy);
    letter-spacing: -1px;
    line-height: 1;
    margin-bottom: 4px;
  }

  .stat-value.teal { color: var(--teal); }
  .stat-value.gold { color: var(--gold); }

  .stat-label {
    font-size: 8px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--text-3);
  }

  .deal-table {
    width: 100%;
    border-collapse: collapse;
    font-size: 9.5px;
    margin: 14px 0;
  }

  .deal-table thead tr {
    background: var(--navy);
    color: white;
  }

  .deal-table th {
    padding: 8px 10px;
    text-align: left;
    font-size: 8px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  .deal-table td {
    padding: 8px 10px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    color: var(--text-2);
  }

  .deal-table tr:hover td { background: rgba(0,194,160,0.04); }

  .score-badge {
    display: inline-block;
    font-weight: 800;
    font-size: 10px;
    padding: 2px 8px;
    border-radius: 4px;
    background: var(--navy);
    color: white;
  }

  .options-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 14px;
    margin: 18px 0;
  }

  .option-card {
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 16px 14px;
    text-align: center;
  }

  .option-card:first-child { border-color: var(--teal); }

  .option-num {
    font-size: 9px;
    font-weight: 800;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--text-3);
    margin-bottom: 6px;
  }

  .option-title {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--navy);
    margin-bottom: 8px;
  }

  .option-desc {
    font-size: 9.5px;
    color: var(--text-2);
    line-height: 1.55;
  }

  .cta-block {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(13,27,42,0.97), rgba(26,47,74,0.97));
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 22px 24px;
    text-align: center;
    margin-top: 20px;
  }

  .cta-block h3 {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 20px;
    color: white;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
  }

  .cta-block p {
    font-size: 10px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55);
    margin-bottom: 16px;
    line-height: 1.6;
  }

  .cta-contact {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 24px;
  }

  .cta-contact-item {
    text-align: center;
  }

  .cta-contact-label {
    font-size: 8px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--teal);
    margin-bottom: 3px;
  }

  .cta-contact-value {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: white;
  }

  .highlight-box {
    background: rgba(0,194,160,0.08);
    border: 1px solid rgba(0,194,160,0.25);
    border-radius: 8px;
    padding: 12px 14px;
    margin: 12px 0;
  }

  .highlight-box p {
    font-size: 10px;
    color: var(--text-1);
    line-height: 1.6;
  }

  .check-list {
    list-style: none;
    margin: 12px 0;
  }

  .check-list li {
    font-size: 10.5px;
    color: var(--text-2);
    padding: 5px 0;
    padding-left: 18px;
    position: relative;
    line-height: 1.5;
  }

  .check-list li::before {
    content: "✓";
    position: absolute;
    left: 0;
    color: var(--teal);
    font-weight: 700;
  }

  .page-num {
    font-size: 9px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--text-3);
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════
     PAGE 1: COVER
══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="page cover">
  <div class="cover-eyebrow">Investor Briefing · Confidential · March 2026</div>

  <div class="cover-logo-mark">DI</div>

  <div class="cover-title">Deal<br><em>Intelligence</em></div>

  <div class="cover-subtitle">A proprietary commercial real estate acquisition system — six years in development, now fully automated. Designed to identify, analyze, profile, and close owner-financed properties with zero bank dependency.</div>

  <div class="cover-rule"></div>

  <div class="cover-meta">
    <div class="cover-meta-item">
      <div class="cover-meta-label">Active Markets</div>
      <div class="cover-meta-value">3 Regions · 8 Deals</div>
    </div>
    <div class="cover-meta-item">
      <div class="cover-meta-label">Total Target Value</div>
      <div class="cover-meta-value">$14.1M in Assets</div>
    </div>
    <div class="cover-meta-item">
      <div class="cover-meta-label">Bank Financing Required</div>
      <div class="cover-meta-value" style="color:var(--teal);">$0 — All Owner-Carry</div>
    </div>

      <div class="cover-meta-label">System Development</div>
      <div class="cover-meta-value">6 Years Continuous</div>
    </div>
    <div class="cover-meta-item">
      <div class="cover-meta-label">Prepared By</div>
      <div class="cover-meta-value">Jeromy Jordan Smith</div>
    </div>
    <div class="cover-meta-item">
      <div class="cover-meta-label">Prepared For</div>
      <div class="cover-meta-value">Stakeholder Review</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="cover-footer">
    <div class="cover-footer-left">Deal Intelligence · Proprietary &amp; Confidential · Do Not Distribute</div>
    <div class="cover-conf-badge">Confidential</div>
  </div>
</div>


<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════
     PAGE 2: THE ORIGIN STORY
══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="page">
  <div class="page-inner">
    <div class="page-header">
      <div class="page-header-brand">
        <div class="page-header-mark">DI</div>
        <div class="page-header-name">Deal Intelligence</div>
      </div>
      <div class="page-header-section">The Origin Story</div>
    </div>

    <div class="eyebrow">Six Years to Get Here</div>
    <div class="section-title">I Didn't Set Out to Build a System.<br>I Set Out to Buy a Gas Station.</div>
    <div class="section-rule"></div>

    <div class="cols-60-40">
      <div>
        <p class="body-text">I didn't set out to build a real estate technology company. I set out to acquire a cash-flowing property with no money down — specifically, an owner-financed commercial asset where the seller carries the note. That first deal taught me two things that would define the next six years:</p>

        <p class="body-text"><strong>First:</strong> The intelligence gap between sophisticated buyers and sellers is massive. Sellers with properties sitting unsold for 300+ days are sitting on negotiable deals — they just need the right buyer to frame the right offer. Most buyers never show up because they don't know where to look or how to read the signals.</p>

        <p class="body-text"><strong>Second:</strong> Almost all of that intelligence is publicly available. County assessor records. State SOS filings. Days-on-market history. Broker license records. Seller psychology patterns embedded in listing language. The raw material exists — what was missing was the system to aggregate and weaponize it.</p>

        <div class="pull-quote">
          <p>"Every project after that first deal became an experiment. What could I systematize? What could I automate? What could I teach a machine to see that I was spending hours finding manually?"</p>
          <cite>— The core question that drove six years of iteration</cite>
        </div>

        <p class="body-text">Today, Deal Intelligence is that system. It runs a full acquisition pipeline — from raw platform search to a pre-populated Letter of Intent — for any target market, any property type, in under 24 hours. And every deal it closes feeds pattern data back into the system, making the next search faster and the next offer sharper.</p>
      </div>

      <div>
        <div style="font-size:9px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--text-3);margin-bottom:12px;">The Build Timeline</div>
        <div class="timeline">
          <div class="timeline-item">
            <div class="timeline-year">Yr 1–2</div>
            <div class="timeline-content">
              <strong>Manual Discovery</strong>
              Built spreadsheets. Learned to read DOM data as a seller motivation signal. Developed the first cold-call framework for 180+ day listings. Success rate improved with each attempt.
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="timeline-item">
            <div class="timeline-year">Yr 3–4</div>
            <div class="timeline-content">
              <strong>Templating &amp; Tools</strong>
              Systematized the research process. Built reusable templates for county assessor lookup, SOS entity research, broker profiling, and seller psychology mapping. Each tool saved hours per deal.
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="timeline-item">
            <div class="timeline-year">Yr 5–6</div>
            <div class="timeline-content">
              <strong>AI &amp; Automation</strong>
              AI changed everything. Multi-agent pipelines replaced manual research. The system now analyzes listings, profiles sellers, generates scripts, maps contact trees, and pre-populates LOIs — automatically.
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="timeline-item">
            <div class="timeline-year">Now</div>
            <div class="timeline-content">
              <strong>Deal Intelligence v1.0</strong>
              Fully operational. 8 active deal files across 3 markets. Complete outreach infrastructure per deal. This briefing is the first formal stakeholder presentation of the system in production.
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="highlight-box">
          <p><strong>The Compounding Principle:</strong> Every deal closed generates pattern data. Every pattern improves the next search. The system gets smarter with each acquisition — this is a compounding intelligence advantage, not a one-time tool.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="page-footer">
      <div>Deal Intelligence · Investor Briefing · Confidential</div>
      <div class="page-num">2</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>


<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════
     PAGE 3: THE SYSTEM
══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="page">
  <div class="page-inner">
    <div class="page-header">
      <div class="page-header-brand">
        <div class="page-header-mark">DI</div>
        <div class="page-header-name">Deal Intelligence</div>
      </div>
      <div class="page-header-section">How the System Works</div>
    </div>

    <div class="eyebrow">The Five-Phase Pipeline</div>
    <div class="section-title">From Raw Platform Data to<br>a Signed Letter of Intent.</div>
    <div class="section-rule"></div>

    <div class="cols-2">
      <div>
        <div class="phase-list">
          <div class="phase-item">
            <div class="phase-num">1</div>
            <div class="phase-content">
              <strong>Discovery — Market Scan</strong>
              Multi-platform search for properties with long days-on-market (180+ days), seller financing signals, and target property types: gas stations, car washes, mobile home parks, flex industrial, restaurants, and multifamily. The system surfaces what motivated sellers look like before anyone calls.
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="phase-item">
            <div class="phase-num">2</div>
            <div class="phase-content">
              <strong>Deal Scoring — 100-Point Analysis</strong>
              Every listing is scored on: DOM weight, price-to-market ratio, financing term signals, seller motivation language, property type quality, and market conditions. Scores rank deals by acquisition priority — the highest scores are the fastest paths to a close.
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="phase-item">
            <div class="phase-num">3</div>
            <div class="phase-content">
              <strong>Seller Profiling — Psychological Mapping</strong>
              We identify the seller's archetype: Retiring Operator, Failed Speculator, Portfolio Exit, Distressed Owner, Completely Exhausted. Each archetype has a distinct pain profile, negotiation posture, and optimal outreach approach. This is the intelligence layer that most buyers never access.
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="phase-item">
            <div class="phase-num">4</div>
            <div class="phase-content">
              <strong>Outreach Intelligence — Multi-Channel Scripts</strong>
              For each deal: a 3-call close sequence (calibrated to seller archetype), email templates, LinkedIn notes, a full stakeholder contact tree (Tier 1 broker → Tier 2 brokerage → Tier 3 seller direct), and a 21-day outreach cadence across all channels. The system knows what to say, to whom, and when.
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="phase-item">
            <div class="phase-num">5</div>
            <div class="phase-content">
              <strong>Contractual Framework — LOI Ready</strong>
              Pre-populated Letter of Intent for each deal: purchase price, down payment, seller note amount, interest rate, amortization, balloon term, monthly payment, and earnest money deposit. Every number is calculated. The deal is ready to put in writing before the first call.
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div>
        <div style="font-size:9px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--text-3);margin-bottom:12px;">What Makes This Different</div>

        <div class="highlight-box" style="margin-bottom:12px;">
          <p><strong>The Stealth Principle.</strong> Every outreach script is calibrated to the seller's exact pain points — but never reveals that we know them. We show up as a humble buyer who happened to find the listing. The intelligence stays internal. The conversation stays disarming.</p>
        </div>

        <div class="highlight-box" style="margin-bottom:12px;">
          <p><strong>No Bank Required.</strong> Every deal in this system is structured for owner financing. The seller carries the note. The buyer makes monthly payments. No bank approval, no appraisal delays, no conventional financing walls. The deal math works because both sides win.</p>
        </div>

        <div class="highlight-box" style="margin-bottom:12px;">
          <p><strong>Scope Without Creep.</strong> Traditional research means weeks of manual work. Automation means the full pipeline — discovery through LOI — runs in under 24 hours per market. Scope is no longer a constraint. We analyze everything because we can.</p>
        </div>

        <div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(13,27,42,0.97),rgba(26,47,74,0.97));border-radius:10px;padding:16px 18px;">
          <div style="font-size:8px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--teal);margin-bottom:10px;">System Output Per Deal</div>
          <ul class="check-list" style="margin:0;">
            <li style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.7);">Deal card with 100-point score</li>
            <li style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.7);">Money-making plan (3 implementation steps)</li>
            <li style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.7);">Seller pain map (archetype + signals)</li>
            <li style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.7);">3-call phone script (stealth buyer voice)</li>
            <li style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.7);">Email template + LinkedIn note</li>
            <li style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.7);">Stakeholder contact tree (3 tiers)</li>
            <li style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.7);">21-day multi-channel outreach cadence</li>
            <li style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.7);">Pre-filled LOI with deal-specific numbers</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="page-footer">
      <div>Deal Intelligence · Investor Briefing · Confidential</div>
      <div class="page-num">3</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

    </div>

    <div class="eyebrow">The Opportunity</div>
    <div class="section-title">This System Produces What Most<br>Buyers Spend Months Assembling.</div>
    <div class="section-rule"></div>

    <p class="body-text">Six years of iteration produced something that didn't exist when I started: a fully automated acquisition intelligence system for owner-financed commercial real estate. The 8 deals in this briefing are not hypothetical. They are active, scored, profiled, scripted, and LOI-ready. The only variable remaining is execution — and that's where a partnership becomes the highest-leverage move available.</p>

    <p class="body-text">The question is not whether the deals are real. The question is: <strong>who is positioned to close them?</strong></p>

    <div class="options-grid">
      <div class="option-card">
        <div class="option-num">Option A</div>
        <div class="option-title">Capital Partner</div>
        <div class="option-desc">You provide acquisition capital (down payments, earnest money deposits, operating reserves). I deploy the system, execute the outreach, and manage the close. We structure equity participation in each closed deal.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="option-card">
        <div class="option-title">System Licensee</div>
        <div class="option-num">Option B</div>
        <div class="option-desc">You acquire the right to use Deal Intelligence for your own acquisition pipeline. Full training, ongoing system access, and per-deal consultation. Ideal for active investors who want the infrastructure without building it from scratch.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="option-card">
        <div class="option-title">Strategic Partner</div>
        <div class="option-num">Option C</div>
        <div class="option-desc">You bring market access, relationships, or operational expertise. I bring the intelligence and deal structuring system. We build a joint pipeline targeting specific markets, property types, or deal sizes aligned with your thesis.</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="highlight-box">
      <p><strong>Why Now?</strong> The owner-financed CRE market has never been more favorable for buyers willing to structure creatively. Interest rate pressure has motivated sellers who couldn't move assets in 2023–2024. DOM data shows record-level desperation across all target property types. The deals exist. The system to find and close them exists. The window is open.</p>
    </div>

    <p class="body-text" style="margin-bottom:6px;">What I'm asking for is straightforward: <strong>review the enclosed Deal Intelligence Report</strong> (the full 29-page deal analysis), identify the deal or structure that resonates with you, and let's have a conversation. The first deal we close together will demonstrate the system better than any briefing document can.</p>

    <div class="cta-block">
      <h3>Ready to Review the Deal Intelligence Report?</h3>
      <p>The full 29-page report covers every deal in depth: deal cards, money-making plans, seller pain maps, outreach scripts, stakeholder contact trees, and pre-filled LOIs. Everything you need to make a decision is already built.</p>
      <div class="cta-contact">
        <div class="cta-contact-item">
          <div class="cta-contact-label">Prepared By</div>
          <div class="cta-contact-value">Jeromy Jordan Smith</div>
        </div>
        <div style="width:1px;height:36px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.1);"></div>
        <div class="cta-contact-item">
          <div class="cta-contact-label">Email</div>
          <div class="cta-contact-value">jeromyjsmith@gmail.com</div>
        </div>
        <div style="width:1px;height:36px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.1);"></div>
        <div class="cta-contact-item">
````

## File: docs/crexi-platform.md
````markdown
# CREXI Platform Reference

## Overview

CREXI (Commercial Real Estate Exchange, Inc.) is an AI-powered CRE marketplace
with $815B+ in active listings, 50M+ lifetime users, and 153M+ property records.

## Products

| Product | Purpose | Cost |
|---------|---------|------|
| Marketplace | Free listing search and lead generation | Free |
| Intelligence | Property records, comps, ownership data, analytics | ~$299/mo |
| PRO | Marketing, lead gen, deal workflow, CRM | Custom |
| Auction | Competitive bidding (96% close rate) | Transaction-based |

## Data Available (Free Tier)

- Property name, description, images
- Asking price, cap rate, NOI
- Address, property type, subtype
- Square footage, acreage, units
- Broker name and brokerage
- Investment highlights
- Lease type, tenancy info

## Data Available (Intelligence - Paid)

- Days on market history
- Pre-foreclosure status
- Loan maturity dates, CMBS data
- Ownership contact info (1,000+ credits/mo)
- Sales comps (46M+ verified)
- Lease comps (1.7M spaces)
- Tax and demographic data
- Zoning and permitting

## Technical Notes

- SPA with dynamic JavaScript rendering
- Behind Cloudflare WAF protection
- No public read API (official API is for pushing listings only)
- URL parameter-based filtering system
- Internal API exists but is undocumented

## Anti-Bot Protections

- Cloudflare WAF + TLS fingerprinting
- Browser fingerprinting (Canvas, WebGL, Audio)
- Behavioral analysis (mouse, click patterns)
- IP reputation scoring and rate limiting
- Cloudflare Turnstile challenges
````

## File: docs/deal-criteria.md
````markdown
# Deal Criteria

## Target Profile

Properties that can be acquired with owner financing (no or low money down)
that generate immediate cash flow.

## Ideal Deal Characteristics

- **Owner financing available** (seller carries the note)
- **Cash flow positive** from day one
- **Motivated seller** (high DOM, price reductions, retirement, estate)
- **Essential service** property type (housing, fuel, storage)
- **Below-market pricing** relative to comparables
- **Cap rate > 8%** (higher = better for buyer)
- **Value-add potential** (below-market rents, vacancies to fill, deferred maintenance)

## Target Property Types (Priority Order)

1. **Mobile Home Parks** — Low management, steady cash flow, affordable housing demand
2. **Self Storage** — Recession-resistant, low maintenance, scalable
3. **Gas Stations** — Essential service, captive C-store revenue
4. **Car Washes** — Simple operations, recurring revenue
5. **Multifamily (small)** — Cash flow, appreciation, tax benefits
6. **Motels** — Deep value-add if distressed

## The Strategy (From the Playbook)

1. Go to CREXI.com
2. Search for owner-financed listings OR listings with high days-on-market
3. Target properties listed 5+ months ago that haven't sold
4. Call the seller/broker and propose: "I'd like to make payments to you
   at your asking price"
5. Focus on sellers with specific pain:
   - Retiring (wants income stream, not tax hit)
   - Estate/heirs (wants simple exit)
   - Tired landlord (wants relief from management)
   - Failed to sell (exhausted conventional buyers)

## Deal Structure Template

```
Purchase Price:  [Asking price or negotiated]
Down Payment:    0-20% (negotiate lowest possible)
Seller Note:     80-100% of purchase price
Interest Rate:   5-7% (win-win: seller earns more than savings, buyer gets below-bank rate)
Term:            20-30 year amortization
Balloon:         5-10 years (refinance or sell before balloon)
Monthly Payment: Calculated from above
```

## Quick Math Check

Before pursuing any deal, verify:
- Monthly NOI > Monthly debt service payment (DSCR > 1.0)
- Annual cash flow after debt service > $0
- Cap rate > interest rate on seller note (positive leverage)

## Disqualifiers

- Cap rate < 5% (unless premium market with appreciation play)
- NOI cannot be verified or is "pro forma" only
- Environmental issues (gas station contamination, etc.)
- Litigation pending against property
- Seller unwilling to provide any financing
- Property in severe physical decline beyond repair budget
````

````html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Deal Intelligence — The Most Intelligent Way to Acquire Cash-Flowing Properties</title>
<meta name="description" content="A proprietary six-year intelligence system for finding and closing owner-financed commercial real estate — zero bank dependency, automated from search to signed LOI.">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,700;0,900;1,400&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800;900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root {
    --navy: #0d1b2a;
    --navy-2: #1a2f4a;
    --navy-3: #0a1520;
    --teal: #00c2a0;
    --teal-2: #00a88a;
    --gold: #f5a623;
    --red: #e63946;
    --white: #ffffff;
    --off-white: #f8f9fb;
    --border: #e5e8ec;
    --text-1: #0d1b2a;
    --text-2: #3a4a5c;
    --text-3: #6b7a8d;
  }

  * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

  body {
    font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif;
    color: var(--text-1);
    background: white;
    -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
    overflow-x: hidden;
  }

  /* ── NAV ─────────────────────────────────── */
  nav {
    position: fixed;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    right: 0;
    z-index: 100;
    background: rgba(13,27,42,0.95);
    backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
    padding: 0 40px;
    height: 64px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
  }

  .nav-brand {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    text-decoration: none;
  }

  .nav-logo {
    width: 36px;
    height: 36px;
    background: var(--teal);
    border-radius: 8px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 900;
    color: var(--navy);
  }

  .nav-name {
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: white;
    letter-spacing: 0.3px;
  }

  .nav-links {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 32px;
    list-style: none;
  }

  .nav-links a {
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 500;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6);
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: color 0.2s;
  }

  .nav-links a:hover { color: white; }

  .nav-cta {
    background: var(--teal);
    color: var(--navy) !important;
    font-weight: 700 !important;
    padding: 8px 20px;
    border-radius: 8px;
    font-size: 13px !important;
    transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.2s !important;
  }

  .nav-cta:hover {
    background: var(--teal-2) !important;
    transform: translateY(-1px);
    color: var(--navy) !important;
  }

  /* ── HERO ─────────────────────────────────── */
  .hero {
    background: var(--navy-3);
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    padding: 120px 40px 80px;
  }

  .hero-bg {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background:
      radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 50% at 70% 50%, rgba(0,194,160,0.12) 0%, transparent 70%),
      radial-gradient(ellipse 40% 60% at 20% 80%, rgba(245,166,35,0.06) 0%, transparent 60%);
  }

  .hero-grid-lines {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background-image:
      linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,0.02) 1px, transparent 1px),
      linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.02) 1px, transparent 1px);
    background-size: 60px 60px;
  }

  .hero-inner {
    max-width: 1200px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    width: 100%;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 80px;
    align-items: center;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
  }

  .hero-eyebrow {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--teal);
    margin-bottom: 20px;
  }

  .hero-eyebrow::before {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    width: 20px;
    height: 2px;
    background: var(--teal);
  }

  .hero-title {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 60px;
    font-weight: 900;
    color: white;
    line-height: 1.05;
    margin-bottom: 22px;
  }

  .hero-title em {
    color: var(--teal);
    font-style: normal;
  }

  .hero-subtitle {
    font-size: 17px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55);
    line-height: 1.65;
    margin-bottom: 36px;
    max-width: 480px;
  }

  .hero-actions {
    display: flex;
    gap: 14px;
    align-items: center;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }

  .btn-primary {
    background: var(--teal);
    color: var(--navy);
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 700;
    padding: 14px 28px;
    border-radius: 10px;
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.2s;
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;

  }

  .btn-primary:hover { background: var(--teal-2); transform: translateY(-2px); }

  .btn-secondary {
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7);
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 500;
    padding: 14px 20px;
    border-radius: 10px;
    text-decoration: none;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15);
    transition: border-color 0.2s, color 0.2s;
  }

  .btn-secondary:hover { border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4); color: white; }

  .hero-stats {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 1px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
    border-radius: 16px;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .hero-stat {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03);
    padding: 28px 24px;
    text-align: center;
  }

  .hero-stat-value {
    font-size: 44px;
    font-weight: 900;
    letter-spacing: -2px;
    line-height: 1;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
    color: white;
  }

  .hero-stat-value.teal { color: var(--teal); }
  .hero-stat-value.gold { color: var(--gold); }

  .hero-stat-label {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
  }

  /* ── SECTION COMMONS ───────────────────── */
  section {
    padding: 96px 40px;
  }

  .container {
    max-width: 1200px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    width: 100%;
  }

  .section-eyebrow {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--teal);

  }

  .section-title.light { color: white; }

    font-size: 17px;

  }

  .section-desc.light { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); }

  /* ── THE PROBLEM ────────────────────────── */
  .problem {
    background: var(--off-white);
  }

  .problem-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 24px;

  }

  .problem-card {
    background: white;

  /* ── HOW IT WORKS ───────────────────────── */
  .how-it-works {

  .phases {
    display: grid;

    gap: 16px;
    margin-top: 52px;

  .phases::before {
    content: '';

    height: 2px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    z-index: 0;

  .phase {
    text-align: center;

    z-index: 1;

  .phase-num {
    width: 64px;
    height: 64px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
    border-radius: 50%;

    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;

    font-weight: 900;
    color: white;

  .phase:hover .phase-num {

  .deal-market {

  .deal-stats {

  .deal-stat {

  .deal-stat-value {
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 800;

  .deal-stat-label {
    font-size: 9px;
    font-weight: 600;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    color: var(--text-3);
    margin-top: 2px;

  .deal-badge {
    display: inline-block;
    font-size: 10px;
    font-weight: 700;
    padding: 3px 8px;
    border-radius: 5px;
    margin-top: 10px;
  }

  /* ── INTELLIGENCE ───────────────────────── */
  .intelligence {
    background: var(--off-white);
  }

  .intel-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 52px;

  .intel-features {

  .intel-feature {
    display: flex;

  .intel-icon {
    width: 40px;

    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;

  .intel-feature-text h4 {
    font-size: 16px;

  }

  .intel-feature-text p {

  }

  .intel-proof {
    background: var(--navy);
    border-radius: 20px;
    padding: 32px 28px;
    color: white;
  }

  .intel-proof h3 {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 22px;
    color: white;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
  }

  .intel-proof-subtitle {
    font-size: 13px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.45);
    margin-bottom: 24px;
  }

  .intel-item {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    padding: 10px 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
    font-size: 13px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7);
  }

  .intel-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }

  .intel-check {
    width: 20px;
    height: 20px;
    background: var(--teal);
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 10px;
    color: var(--navy);
    font-weight: 900;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }

  /* ── ABOUT ──────────────────────────────── */
  .about {
    background: white;
  }

  .about-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 80px;
    align-items: center;
    margin-top: 52px;
  }

  .about-timeline {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 0;
  }

  .about-year {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 80px 1fr;
    gap: 20px;
    padding: 18px 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  }

  .about-year:last-child { border-bottom: none; }

  .about-year-label {
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 800;
    color: var(--teal);
    padding-top: 3px;
  }

  .about-year-content h4 {
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 700;

  }

  .about-year-content p {
    font-size: 13.5px;
    color: var(--text-2);
    line-height: 1.6;
  }

  .about-text {
    font-size: 16px;
    color: var(--text-2);
    line-height: 1.75;
  }

  .about-text strong { color: var(--text-1); }

  .about-text p { margin-bottom: 20px; }

  .about-quote {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(13,27,42,0.97), rgba(26,47,74,0.97));
    border-radius: 16px;
    padding: 24px 26px;
    margin-top: 24px;
    border-left: 3px solid var(--teal);
  }

  .about-quote p {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 17px;
    font-style: italic;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.85);
    line-height: 1.6;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
  }

  .about-quote cite {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--teal);
    font-style: normal;
  }

  /* ── PARTNERSHIP ────────────────────────── */
  .partnership {
    background: var(--navy);
  }

  .partner-options {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 20px;
    margin-top: 52px;
  }

  .partner-card {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04);
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    border-radius: 16px;
    padding: 28px 24px;
    transition: background 0.2s, border-color 0.2s;
  }

  .partner-card:first-child {
    background: rgba(0,194,160,0.08);
    border-color: rgba(0,194,160,0.25);
  }

  .partner-card:hover {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.07);
  }

  .partner-card:first-child:hover {
    background: rgba(0,194,160,0.12);
  }

  .partner-option-label {
    font-size: 10px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--teal);
    margin-bottom: 10px;
  }

  .partner-card h3 {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 22px;
    color: white;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
  }

  .partner-card p {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55);
    line-height: 1.65;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
  }

  .partner-card-cta {
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--teal);
    text-decoration: none;
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 6px;
  }

  .partner-card-cta:hover { color: white; }

  /* ── CTA ────────────────────────────────── */
  .cta-section {
    background: var(--navy-3);
    text-align: center;
    padding: 120px 40px;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .cta-section::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 60% at 50% 50%, rgba(0,194,160,0.1) 0%, transparent 70%);
  }

  .cta-section .container { position: relative; z-index: 1; }

  .cta-label {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--teal);
    margin-bottom: 20px;
  }

  .cta-title {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 52px;
    font-weight: 900;
    color: white;
    line-height: 1.1;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
  }

  .cta-subtitle {
    font-size: 18px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5);
    line-height: 1.6;
    margin-bottom: 44px;
    max-width: 560px;
    margin-left: auto;
    margin-right: auto;
  }

  .cta-buttons {
    display: flex;
    gap: 16px;
    justify-content: center;
    margin-bottom: 52px;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }

  .btn-cta-primary {
    background: var(--teal);
    color: var(--navy);
    font-size: 16px;
    font-weight: 800;
    padding: 18px 36px;
    border-radius: 12px;
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.2s;
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
  }

  .btn-cta-primary:hover { background: var(--teal-2); transform: translateY(-2px); }

  .btn-cta-secondary {
    background: transparent;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8);
    font-size: 16px;
    font-weight: 600;
    padding: 18px 36px;
    border-radius: 12px;
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: border-color 0.2s, color 0.2s;
  }

  .btn-cta-secondary:hover { border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); color: white; }

  .cta-contact-strip {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 40px;
    padding-top: 32px;
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
  }

  .cta-contact-item {
    text-align: center;
  }

  .cta-contact-label {
    font-size: 10px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
    margin-bottom: 4px;
  }

  .cta-contact-value {
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.75);
  }

  .cta-contact-value a {
    color: inherit;
    text-decoration: none;
  }

  .cta-contact-value a:hover { color: var(--teal); }

  /* ── FOOTER ─────────────────────────────── */
  footer {
    background: var(--navy);
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
    padding: 28px 40px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
  }

  .footer-brand {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
  }

  .footer-logo {
    width: 28px;
    height: 28px;
    background: rgba(0,194,160,0.15);
    border-radius: 6px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 10px;
    font-weight: 900;
    color: var(--teal);
  }

  .footer-name {
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5);
  }

  .footer-right {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.25);
  }

  /* ── RESPONSIVE ─────────────────────────── */
  @media (max-width: 900px) {
    nav { padding: 0 20px; }
    .nav-links { display: none; }
    .hero { padding: 100px 24px 64px; }
    .hero-inner { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 48px; }
    .hero-title { font-size: 40px; }
    .hero-stats { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
    section { padding: 64px 24px; }
    .problem-grid,
    .partner-options { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .phases { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
    .deals-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
    .intel-grid,
    .about-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 40px; }
    .section-title { font-size: 30px; }
    .cta-title { font-size: 36px; }
    .cta-contact-strip { flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 24px; }
    footer { flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; text-align: center; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- ─── HERO ─────────────────────────────────── -->

      <h1 class="hero-title">The Only Buyer<br>in the Room Who<br>Did the <em>Homework.</em></h1>

<!-- ─── THE PROBLEM ──────────────────────────── -->
<section class="problem" id="problem">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="section-eyebrow">The Intelligence Gap</div>
    <h2 class="section-title">Most Investors Are Blind<br>to the Best Deals.</h2>
    <p class="section-desc">The commercial real estate market is full of motivated sellers — they're just invisible to buyers who don't know where to look, what to read, or how to structure the offer.</p>

    <div class="problem-grid">
      <div class="problem-card">
        <div class="problem-icon">📊</div>
        <h3>Days-on-Market Is a Signal, Not a Warning</h3>
        <p>A property listed 400+ days isn't broken — it hasn't found the right buyer with the right structure. The average DOM across our 8 active deals is 437 days. That's not a red flag. That's leverage.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="problem-card">
        <div class="problem-icon">🏦</div>
        <h3>Bank Financing Walls Out Most Buyers</h3>
        <p>Restaurant buildings. Raw land. Special purpose properties. Banks routinely decline these. That's not a deal-killer — it's a filter. The buyers who clear it have no competition. We clear it every time.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="problem-card">
        <div class="problem-icon">🧠</div>
        <h3>Seller Psychology Is Publicly Available</h3>
        <p>DOM history, price reductions, brokerage patterns, listing language — every motivated seller leaves fingerprints. Most buyers don't look. We built a system that reads every signal, on every deal, automatically.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>


<!-- ─── HOW IT WORKS ─────────────────────────── -->
<section class="how-it-works" id="how-it-works">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="section-eyebrow">The Five-Phase Pipeline</div>
    <h2 class="section-title light">From Raw Platform Data<br>to a Signed Letter of Intent.</h2>
    <p class="section-desc light">Every deal runs through the same five-phase pipeline — discovery, scoring, seller profiling, outreach intelligence, and contractual framing — automatically, in under 24 hours.</p>

    <div class="phases">
      <div class="phase">
        <div class="phase-num">1</div>
        <h4>Discovery</h4>
        <p>Multi-platform scan for motivated seller signals: high DOM, price reductions, seller financing terms, target property types</p>
      </div>
      <div class="phase">
        <div class="phase-num">2</div>
        <h4>Deal Scoring</h4>
        <p>100-point scoring model: DOM weight, price-to-market ratio, financing signals, seller motivation language, property quality</p>
      </div>
      <div class="phase">
        <div class="phase-num">3</div>
        <h4>Seller Profiling</h4>
        <p>Psychological archetype mapping: Retiring Operator, Failed Speculator, Exhausted Holder, Portfolio Exit, Distressed Owner</p>
      </div>
      <div class="phase">
        <div class="phase-num">4</div>
        <h4>Outreach Intel</h4>
        <p>3-call close scripts, email templates, full stakeholder contact tree, 21-day multi-channel cadence — calibrated to archetype</p>
      </div>
      <div class="phase">
        <div class="phase-num">5</div>
        <h4>LOI Ready</h4>
        <p>Pre-filled Letter of Intent with deal-specific numbers: price, down, seller note, rate, amortization, balloon, monthly payment</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ─── INTELLIGENCE ─────────────────────────── -->
<section class="intelligence">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="intel-grid">
      <div>
        <div class="section-eyebrow">The Intelligence Layer</div>
        <h2 class="section-title">We Know What the Seller<br>Needs Before We Call.</h2>
        <p class="section-desc" style="margin-bottom:36px;">Every deal comes with a complete psychological profile of the seller. We know their archetype, their pain, and exactly what to say — without ever revealing that we know.</p>

        <div class="intel-features">
          <div class="intel-feature">
            <div class="intel-icon">🗺️</div>
            <div class="intel-feature-text">
              <h4>Seller Pain Maps</h4>
              <p>Archetype identification, pain signal analysis, and a calibrated opening line for every deal — built before the first call is made.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="intel-feature">
            <div class="intel-icon">📞</div>
            <div class="intel-feature-text">
              <h4>3-Call Close Sequence</h4>
              <p>Contact & Qualify → Explore & Align → Propose & Structure. A script for each call, each adapted to the seller's specific psychology.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="intel-feature">
            <div class="intel-icon">🌐</div>
            <div class="intel-feature-text">
              <h4>Multi-Channel Outreach</h4>
              <p>Phone, email, LinkedIn, text, direct-to-seller. A 21-day cadence with channel-specific templates. If the phone doesn't close it, one of these does.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="intel-feature">
            <div class="intel-icon">📋</div>
            <div class="intel-feature-text">
              <h4>LOI Pre-Populated</h4>
              <p>Every deal has a ready-to-send Letter of Intent with calculated terms. No scrambling after a verbal yes — the paperwork is already done.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div>
        <div class="intel-proof">
          <h3>What's in Every Deal File</h3>
          <div class="intel-proof-subtitle">29-page report · 8 complete deal packages</div>
          <div class="intel-item"><div class="intel-check">✓</div>Deal card with 100-point score</div>
          <div class="intel-item"><div class="intel-check">✓</div>Money-making implementation plan (3 steps)</div>
          <div class="intel-item"><div class="intel-check">✓</div>Seller pain map and archetype identification</div>
          <div class="intel-item"><div class="intel-check">✓</div>3-call close script (stealth buyer voice)</div>
          <div class="intel-item"><div class="intel-check">✓</div>Email template + LinkedIn outreach note</div>
          <div class="intel-item"><div class="intel-check">✓</div>Stakeholder contact tree (3 tiers)</div>
          <div class="intel-item"><div class="intel-check">✓</div>21-day multi-channel cadence</div>
          <div class="intel-item"><div class="intel-check">✓</div>Pre-filled LOI with deal-specific numbers</div>
          <div style="margin-top:20px;padding-top:16px;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);">
            <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.3);margin-bottom:8px;">Stealth Principle</div>
            <p style="font-size:13px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);line-height:1.65;">Every script is calibrated to the seller's exact pain points — but never reveals that we know them. We show up as a curious buyer who happened to find the listing. The intelligence stays internal.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>


<!-- ─── ABOUT ─────────────────────────────────── -->
<section class="about" id="about">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="about-grid">
      <div>
        <div class="section-eyebrow">The Creator</div>
        <h2 class="section-title">Six Years of Iteration.<br>One System That Works.</h2>

        <div class="about-text">
          <p>I didn't set out to build a real estate technology system. I set out to buy a cash-flowing property with no money down. That first deal — owner-financed, motivated seller, zero bank involvement — taught me everything I needed to know about where the real opportunity lives.</p>
          <p>Every project after that became a laboratory. What could I systematize? What could I automate? What took me 40 hours to research could be done in 40 minutes — if the right tools existed. So I built them.</p>
        </div>

        <div class="about-quote">
          <p>"The scope of what's possible with automation isn't scope creep — it's the whole point. When you can analyze everything from every angle, why wouldn't you? Especially when the decision involves significant capital at risk."</p>
          <cite>— On why comprehensive analysis is never too much</cite>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div>
        <div class="about-timeline">
          <div class="about-year">
            <div class="about-year-label">Year 1–2</div>
            <div class="about-year-content">
              <h4>Manual Discovery</h4>
              <p>Cold calls to 180+ DOM sellers. Spreadsheets. Learning what motivated sellers actually sound like — and what deal structures they respond to.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="about-year">
            <div class="about-year-label">Year 3–4</div>
            <div class="about-year-content">
              <h4>Building Reusable Tools</h4>
              <p>County assessor research templates. Broker profiling workflows. Seller psychology frameworks. Each tool built once, reused on every deal after.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="about-year">
            <div class="about-year-label">Year 5–6</div>
            <div class="about-year-content">
              <h4>AI-Powered Automation</h4>
              <p>Multi-agent pipelines replaced manual research. The entire acquisition workflow — discovery through LOI — now runs automatically for any target market.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="about-year">
            <div class="about-year-label">Now</div>
            <div class="about-year-content">
              <h4>Deal Intelligence v1.0</h4>
              <p>Fully operational. 8 active deal files. 3 markets. The first formal deployment of a system that took six years to build — and gets smarter with every deal closed.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>


<!-- ─── PARTNERSHIP ──────────────────────────── -->
<section class="partnership" id="partnership">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="section-eyebrow">The Opportunity</div>
    <h2 class="section-title light">This System Produces What<br>Most Buyers Spend Months Assembling.</h2>
    <p class="section-desc light">Eight deals are ready to pursue right now. The infrastructure is built. The question is: who is positioned to execute?</p>

    <div class="partner-options">
      <div class="partner-card">
        <div class="partner-option-label">Option A · Recommended</div>
        <h3>Capital Partner</h3>
        <p>You provide acquisition capital — down payments, earnest money, operating reserves. I deploy the system, execute outreach, and manage the close. We structure equity participation in each closed deal.</p>
        <a href="#contact" class="partner-card-cta">Let's Structure This →</a>
      </div>
      <div class="partner-card">
        <div class="partner-option-label">Option B</div>
        <h3>System Licensee</h3>
        <p>Acquire the right to use Deal Intelligence for your own acquisition pipeline. Full training, ongoing system access, and per-deal consultation included. Build your own deal flow on proven infrastructure.</p>
        <a href="#contact" class="partner-card-cta">Learn More →</a>
      </div>
      <div class="partner-card">
        <div class="partner-option-label">Option C</div>
        <h3>Strategic Partner</h3>
        <p>You bring market access, relationships, or operational expertise. I bring intelligence and deal structuring. We build a joint pipeline targeting specific markets, property types, or deal sizes.</p>
        <a href="#contact" class="partner-card-cta">Let's Talk →</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

        <div class="cta-contact-value">720-998-2888</div>
      </div>
      <div style="width:1px;height:32px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08);"></div>
      <div class="cta-contact-item">
        <div class="cta-contact-label">Schedule</div>
        <div class="cta-contact-value"><a href="mailto:jeromyjsmith@gmail.com?subject=Deal Intelligence — Let's Schedule a Google Meet">Schedule a Google Meet</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>


<!-- ─── FOOTER ────────────────────────────────── -->
<footer>
  <div class="footer-brand">
    <div class="footer-logo">DI</div>
    <span class="footer-name">Deal Intelligence</span>
  </div>
  <div class="footer-right">Confidential — For Stakeholder Review · March 2026</div>
</footer>

<script>
  // Smooth scroll for nav links
  document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="#"]').forEach(anchor => {
    anchor.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
      const target = document.querySelector(this.getAttribute('href'));
      if (target) {
        e.preventDefault();
        target.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
      }
    });
  });

  // Nav background on scroll
  const nav = document.querySelector('nav');
  window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
    nav.style.background = window.scrollY > 50
      ? 'rgba(10,21,32,0.98)'
      : 'rgba(13,27,42,0.95)';
  });
</script>

</body>
</html>
````

## File: docs/proposal.html
````html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Deal Intelligence — Investor Briefing</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,700;0,900;1,400&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root {
    --navy: #0d1b2a;
    --navy-2: #1a2f4a;
    --teal: #00c2a0;
    --gold: #f5a623;
    --red: #e63946;
    --white: #ffffff;
    --off-white: #f8f9fa;
    --border: #e5e8ec;
    --text-1: #0d1b2a;
    --text-2: #3a4a5c;
    --text-3: #6b7a8d;
  }

  * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

  body {
    font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, sans-serif;
    background: white;
    color: var(--text-1);
    -webkit-print-color-adjust: exact;
    print-color-adjust: exact;
  }

  @page {
    size: 8.5in 11in;
    margin: 0;
  }

  .page {
    width: 8.5in;
    height: 11in;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    page-break-after: always;
    break-after: page;
  }

  @media print {
    .page { overflow: visible; break-after: page; }
    body { background: white; }
    .no-print { display: none !important; }
  }

  @media screen {
    body { background: #ddd; padding: 40px 0; }
    .page {
      margin: 0 auto 40px;
      box-shadow: 0 8px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.18);
    }
  }

  /* ── COVER ─────────────────────────────────── */
  .cover {
    background: var(--navy);
    color: white;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    padding: 0.7in 0.75in;
  }

  .cover-eyebrow {
    font-size: 9px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 4px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--teal);
    margin-bottom: 0.4in;
  }

  .cover-logo-mark {
    width: 52px;
    height: 52px;
    background: var(--teal);
    border-radius: 12px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 22px;
    font-weight: 900;
    color: var(--navy);
    letter-spacing: -1px;
    margin-bottom: 28px;
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
  }

  .cover-title {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 52px;
    font-weight: 900;
    line-height: 1.05;
    color: white;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }

  .cover-title em {
    color: var(--teal);
    font-style: normal;
  }

  .cover-subtitle {
    font-size: 15px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55);
    font-weight: 400;
    line-height: 1.55;
    max-width: 5.5in;
    margin-bottom: 0.55in;
  }

  .cover-rule {
    width: 60px;
    height: 3px;
    background: var(--teal);
    margin-bottom: 0.55in;
  }

  .cover-meta {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 24px;
    margin-bottom: auto;
    padding-bottom: 0.5in;
  }

  .cover-meta-item {
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12);
    padding-top: 12px;
  }

  .cover-meta-label {
    font-size: 8px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    text-transform: uppercase;

  }

  .cover-meta-value {
    font-size: 13px;

  .cover-footer {

  .cover-footer-left {

  .cover-conf-badge {

  /* ── INNER PAGES ──────────────────────────── */
  .page-inner {

  .page-header {

  }

  .timeline {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 0;

  }

  .timeline-item {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 90px 1fr;
    gap: 16px;
    padding: 12px 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  }

  .timeline-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }

  .timeline-year {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 800;
    color: var(--teal);
    padding-top: 2px;
  }

  .timeline-content {
    font-size: 10px;
    color: var(--text-2);
    line-height: 1.6;
  }

  .timeline-content strong {
    display: block;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 700;

  }

  .cols-2 {
    display: grid;

    gap: 24px;
  }

  .cols-60-40 {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1.5fr 1fr;
    gap: 24px;
  }

  .phase-list {
    display: flex;

  .phase-item {

  .phase-num {

  .stat-grid {

  .deal-table {

  .cta-block h3 {

  .cta-block p {

  .cta-contact-label {

  .cta-contact-value {

  .highlight-box {

  }

  .highlight-box p {

  }

  .check-list {

  .check-list li {
````
