````html
<!-- Deal 05 · Page B: Outreach Script -->
<div class="page" style="--deal-color: #e63946;">
  <div class="deal-band"></div>
  <div class="page-inner--tight" style="padding-top:0.55in;">
    <div class="page-header">
      <div class="page-header-brand">
        <div class="page-header-mark" style="background:var(--red);color:white;">05</div>
        <div class="page-header-name">Deal File #05 · Golden Triangle Assemblage</div>
      </div>
      <div class="page-header-right">Outreach Script · Stealth Buyer Approach</div>
    </div>

    <div class="section-eyebrow">Call Strategy — Exhausted Speculator Archetype</div>
    <div style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:var(--navy);margin-bottom:4px;">You've Done the Research. Now Disappear Into It.</div>
    <div class="section-rule"></div>

    <div class="cols-2 mb-18">
      <div>
        <div class="label-xs mb-8">Call 1 — Contact &amp; Qualify (under 5 min)</div>
        <div class="script-block">
          <div class="script-label">Opener</div>
          "Hi, I came across a land parcel listed on 14th Street in Denver — in the Golden Triangle area. Is that still active?"
          <div style="margin-top:12px;"></div>
          <div class="script-label">After They Confirm</div>
          "Great. I'm an investor focused on development sites in Denver. I don't typically work through banks — I prefer to work directly with sellers on structure. Would the owner be open to a conversation about how they'd like to handle the sale?"
          <div class="script-note">Stop talking. Let them respond. If they say "what do you mean by structure?" — you say: "I pay the full asking price, but through a payment arrangement to the seller rather than a lump sum through escrow." Then go quiet again.</div>
          <div style="margin-top:12px;"></div>
          <div class="script-label">Close Call 1</div>
          "What's a good time to set up a longer call to walk through what they're looking for?"
        </div>

        <div class="label-xs mb-8" style="margin-top:14px;">Call 2 — Explore (listen 80%)</div>
        <div class="script-block">
          <div class="script-label">Key Questions Only</div>
          "What does the ideal outcome look like for them — is it a specific timeline, a lump sum, monthly income over time?" &nbsp;&bull;&nbsp; "Any development plans already started, or is it a clean site?" &nbsp;&bull;&nbsp; "What's held the deal up — has it been the buyer profile, the terms, something else?"
          <div class="script-note">Don't answer your own questions. Don't explain. Don't fill silence. The silence is where they tell you what they actually need.</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div>
        <div class="label-xs mb-8">Internal Intel — What We Know Going In</div>
        <div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(13,27,42,0.97),rgba(26,47,74,0.97));border-radius:10px;padding:14px 16px;margin-bottom:12px;">
          <div style="font-size:8px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--red);margin-bottom:8px;">◆ FOR INTERNAL USE — NOT THE SCRIPT</div>
          <div style="font-size:9.5px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6);line-height:1.6;">
            ▸ 518 days = 17 months of $0-income land carry<br>
            ▸ Owner financing already confirmed = they know banks won't finance raw land for a buyer<br>
            ▸ $1.11M for development land across from Denver Justice Center = underpriced if entitled<br>
            ▸ Likely had development plans that stalled — they're carrying this alone<br>
            ▸ Archetype: Exhausted Speculator — wants relief, not necessarily top dollar
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="label-xs mb-8">Don't Say This</div>
        <div class="card" style="padding:12px 14px;">
          <div style="font-size:9.5px;color:var(--text-2);line-height:1.65;">
            <span style="color:#e63946;font-weight:700;">✗</span> "I see you've been listed for over a year"<br>
            <span style="color:#e63946;font-weight:700;">✗</span> "I know development plans fell through"<br>
            <span style="color:#e63946;font-weight:700;">✗</span> "Banks won't finance raw land so I figured..."<br>
            <span style="color:#e63946;font-weight:700;">✗</span> Anything that signals you've studied their situation
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="label-xs mb-8" style="margin-top:12px;">Call 3 Anchor — The Proposal</div>
        <div class="card card--tinted" style="padding:12px 14px;">
          <div style="font-size:9.5px;color:var(--text-2);line-height:1.6;">"Here's what I'm thinking — full asking price at $1.11M, seller carry at 6%, 25-year amortization, 7-year balloon. You get monthly income. I take the development risk. No bank, no escrow delays." <span style="color:var(--navy);font-style:italic;">Then give them Option B: 10% down + slightly lower rate. Two options — both work for you.</span></div>
        </div>

        <div class="label-xs mb-8" style="margin-top:12px;">Pre-Call Research Checklist</div>
        <div class="card card--tinted" style="padding:12px 14px;font-size:9.5px;color:var(--text-2);line-height:1.7;">
          ☐ Denver County Assessor — owner name, entity, purchase date, price<br>
          ☐ CO SOS entity search — LLC or personal? Active?<br>
          ☐ PropStream — any liens, tax delinquency, equity position<br>
          ☐ LinkedIn — who owns this? Career history, any development background?
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="page-footer">
      <div class="page-footer-brand">Deal Intelligence · Deal File #05</div>
      <div class="page-footer-conf">Confidential &bull; Do Not Distribute</div>
      <div class="page-footer-num">15</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

            <div style="color:var(--text-2);line-height:1.5;">Main line: [firm website → "Contact"] &nbsp;·&nbsp; Ask for [broker first name] by name &nbsp;·&nbsp; Admin: info@[firm].com</div>

            <div style="color:var(--text-2);line-height:1.5;">Denver County Assessor → entity name &nbsp;·&nbsp; CO SOS → registered agent &nbsp;·&nbsp; PropStream skip trace → owner cell &nbsp;·&nbsp; BeenVerified → personal contact</div>

I'm an investor interested in the site and I prefer to work directly with sellers on structure. Would you have 10 minutes for a quick call?"</div>

    <div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(13,27,42,0.97),rgba(26,47,74,0.97));border-radius:10px;padding:11px 15px;">
      <div style="font-size:7px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--red);margin-bottom:7px;">◆ GOLDEN TRIANGLE ASSEMBLAGE · LOI SUMMARY · CONFIDENTIAL</div>
      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(8,1fr);gap:5px;margin-bottom:7px;">
        <div style="text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:6.5px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.8px;margin-bottom:2px;">Price</div><div style="font-size:10.5px;font-weight:800;color:white;">$1.11M</div></div>

        <div style="text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:6.5px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.8px;margin-bottom:2px;">Seller Note</div><div style="font-size:10.5px;font-weight:800;color:white;">$1,054,500</div></div>
        <div style="text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:6.5px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.8px;margin-bottom:2px;">Rate</div><div style="font-size:10.5px;font-weight:800;color:var(--red);">6.0%</div></div>
        <div style="text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:6.5px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.8px;margin-bottom:2px;">Amort</div><div style="font-size:10.5px;font-weight:800;color:white;">25 yr</div></div>
        <div style="text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:6.5px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.8px;margin-bottom:2px;">Balloon</div><div style="font-size:10.5px;font-weight:800;color:white;">Yr 7</div></div>
        <div style="text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:6.5px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.8px;margin-bottom:2px;">Mo. Pmt</div><div style="font-size:10.5px;font-weight:800;color:var(--red);">~$6,800</div></div>

<!-- Deal 06 · Page B: Outreach Script -->
<div class="page" style="--deal-color: #e63946;">
  <div class="deal-band"></div>
  <div class="page-inner--tight" style="padding-top:0.55in;">
    <div class="page-header">
      <div class="page-header-brand">
        <div class="page-header-mark" style="background:var(--red);color:white;">06</div>
        <div class="page-header-name">Deal File #06 · 2150 N Broadway Restaurant</div>
      </div>
      <div class="page-header-right">Outreach Script · Stealth Buyer Approach</div>
    </div>

    <div class="section-eyebrow">Call Strategy — Failed Restaurant Owner Archetype</div>
    <div style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:var(--navy);margin-bottom:4px;">You Know Why It Hasn't Sold. Don't Let Them Know That.</div>
    <div class="section-rule"></div>

    <div class="cols-2 mb-18">
      <div>
        <div class="label-xs mb-8">Call 1 — Contact &amp; Qualify (under 5 min)</div>
        <div class="script-block">
          <div class="script-label">Opener</div>
          "Hi, I'm calling about a building on North Broadway in Denver — the restaurant property. Is that still available?"
          <div style="margin-top:12px;"></div>
          <div class="script-label">After They Confirm</div>
          "I'm an investor — I'm interested in the real estate, not the restaurant operations. I don't typically work through banks on properties like this. Has there been any conversation with the seller about working directly with a buyer on terms?"
          <div class="script-note">Stop here. Let them tell you what they know. If they ask what you mean by terms: "I pay the full asking price, but through a payment arrangement to the seller rather than a lump sum." Then go quiet.</div>
          <div style="margin-top:12px;"></div>
          <div class="script-label">Close Call 1</div>
          "What's a good time to set up a longer call? I have some specific questions about what the seller is looking for."
        </div>

        <div class="label-xs mb-8" style="margin-top:14px;">Call 2 — Explore (listen 80%)</div>
        <div class="script-block">
          <div class="script-label">Key Questions Only</div>
          "What does the seller's ideal outcome look like — timeline, lump sum, income over time?" &nbsp;&bull;&nbsp; "Has the building been in active use recently or has it been vacant for a stretch?" &nbsp;&bull;&nbsp; "When seller financing is mentioned in the listing — is that a 20-year note kind of thing, or something shorter?"
          <div class="script-note">Don't fill silence. Don't explain. If they ask why you want long terms, say: "I prefer to keep cash working in the deal rather than tied up in a payoff." That's all.</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div>
        <div class="label-xs mb-8">Internal Intel — What We Know Going In</div>
        <div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(13,27,42,0.97),rgba(26,47,74,0.97));border-radius:10px;padding:14px 16px;margin-bottom:12px;">
          <div style="font-size:8px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--red);margin-bottom:8px;">◆ FOR INTERNAL USE — NOT THE SCRIPT</div>
          <div style="font-size:9.5px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6);line-height:1.6;">
            ▸ 404 DOM = 13+ months — every conventional buyer has hit the financing wall<br>
            ▸ "SELLER FINANCING AVAILABLE!" in listing caps = they know banks need operating history<br>
            ▸ $1.95M stand-alone building on N Broadway = high-value RE, just zero qualified conventional buyers<br>
            ▸ Archetype: Failed Restaurant Owner — exhausted, wants out, can't give it away<br>
            ▸ Strategy: Show up at asking price with seller carry — you're the only viable offer
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="label-xs mb-8">Don't Say This</div>
        <div class="card" style="padding:12px 14px;">
          <div style="font-size:9.5px;color:var(--text-2);line-height:1.65;">

            <span style="color:#e63946;font-weight:700;">✗</span> "Banks don't finance vacant restaurant buildings"<br>

<!-- Deal 07 · Page B: Outreach Script -->
<div class="page" style="--deal-color: #00c2a0;">
  <div class="deal-band"></div>
  <div class="page-inner--tight" style="padding-top:0.55in;">
    <div class="page-header">
      <div class="page-header-brand">
        <div class="page-header-mark" style="background:var(--teal);color:var(--navy);">07</div>
        <div class="page-header-name">Deal File #07 · Village Drive Flex Industrial</div>
      </div>
      <div class="page-header-right">Outreach Script · Maximum Softness Required</div>
    </div>

    <div class="section-eyebrow">Call Strategy — Completely Exhausted Archetype · 1,138 Days</div>
    <div style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:var(--navy);margin-bottom:4px;">Three Years of No. Be the First Yes That Doesn't Feel Like a Trap.</div>
    <div class="section-rule"></div>

    <div class="cols-2 mb-18">
      <div>
        <div class="label-xs mb-8">Call 1 — Contact &amp; Qualify (keep it very brief)</div>
        <div class="script-block">
          <div class="script-label">Opener</div>
          "Hi, I came across a flex property listed on Village Drive in Sonora — is that still on the market?"
          <div style="margin-top:12px;"></div>
          <div class="script-label">After They Confirm</div>
          "I'm an investor. I look at flex industrial properties in smaller California markets — Sonora is a market I've been watching. Is the seller someone who'd be open to talking about how the deal could be structured, or are they pretty set on a conventional close?"
          <div class="script-note">This question pre-qualifies without pressure. If they're defensive or guarded, say: "No rush at all — I just like to understand what works before I take up anyone's time." Then offer to send an email instead of calling back.</div>
          <div style="margin-top:12px;"></div>
          <div class="script-label">Close Call 1</div>
          "What would make this easy for the seller? That's really what I'm trying to figure out."
        </div>

        <div class="label-xs mb-8" style="margin-top:14px;">Call 2 — Explore (listen 90% — this seller needs to talk)</div>
        <div class="script-block">
          <div class="script-label">3 Questions — Then Stop</div>
          "What's the space been used for — industrial, flex, mixed?" &nbsp;&bull;&nbsp; "Is the seller local, or are they managing this from elsewhere?" &nbsp;&bull;&nbsp; "Has there been any interest over the past year or so that came close but didn't close?"
          <div class="script-note" style="border-left-color:var(--teal);">This last question is gold. They'll tell you everything: what went wrong, who they dealt with, why they're still holding. Don't redirect. Don't offer solutions yet. Just say "I see" and let them keep going.</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div>
        <div class="label-xs mb-8">Internal Intel — What We Know Going In</div>
        <div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(13,27,42,0.97),rgba(26,47,74,0.97));border-radius:10px;padding:14px 16px;margin-bottom:12px;">
          <div style="font-size:8px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--teal);margin-bottom:8px;">◆ FOR INTERNAL USE — NOT THE SCRIPT</div>
          <div style="font-size:9.5px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6);line-height:1.6;">
            ▸ 1,138 DOM = 3.1 years — every buyer pool has been exhausted twice over<br>
            ▸ Flex industrial in Sonora = small buyer pool, mostly local or regional investors<br>
            ▸ $699,950 after 3 years = possibly negotiable, but lead with full price first<br>
            ▸ Seller is likely numb — don't trigger defensiveness with any smart-buyer signals<br>
            ▸ OPPORTUNITY: A seller this exhausted may accept terms no fresh listing would touch
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="label-xs mb-8">Don't Say This</div>
        <div class="card" style="padding:12px 14px;">
          <div style="font-size:9.5px;color:var(--text-2);line-height:1.65;">
            <span style="color:#e63946;font-weight:700;">✗</span> "I see this has been listed for a very long time"<br>
            <span style="color:#e63946;font-weight:700;">✗</span> "Why hasn't this sold?"<br>
            <span style="color:#e63946;font-weight:700;">✗</span> "Is there something going on with the property?"<br>
            <span style="color:#e63946;font-weight:700;">✗</span> Any number, date, or detail that reveals your research
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="label-xs mb-8" style="margin-top:12px;">Call 3 Anchor — The Proposal</div>
        <div class="card card--tinted" style="padding:12px 14px;">
          <div style="font-size:9.5px;color:var(--text-2);line-height:1.6;">"Here's what I'm thinking — full asking price at $699,950, seller carry, monthly payments directly to you. I take the property off your books. No bank, no appraisal, no delays." <span style="color:var(--navy);font-style:italic;">Don't negotiate price here. They're exhausted — full ask plus creative terms is the win-win. Get the deal done.</span></div>
        </div>

        <div class="label-xs mb-8" style="margin-top:12px;">Pre-Call Research Checklist</div>
        <div class="card card--tinted" style="padding:12px 14px;font-size:9.5px;color:var(--text-2);line-height:1.7;">
          ☐ Tuolumne County Assessor — ownership, tax status, delinquency<br>
          ☐ CA SOS entity search — any business registered at address<br>
          ☐ PACER / Tuolumne County courts — liens, judgments, foreclosure risk<br>
          ☐ PropStream — full title history, equity position
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="page-footer">
      <div class="page-footer-brand">Deal Intelligence · Deal File #07</div>
      <div class="page-footer-conf">Confidential &bull; Do Not Distribute</div>
      <div class="page-footer-num">17</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

            <div style="font-size:7px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--teal);margin-bottom:5px;">TIER 1 — LISTING BROKER (Call First — Be Gentle)</div>
            <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:3px;color:var(--text-2);">

              <div>Note: <b style="color:var(--teal);">After 3 yrs, broker may be checked out. Escalate to Tier 3 faster.</b></div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div style="background:rgba(13,27,42,0.02);padding:8px 11px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);">
            <div style="font-size:7px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--text-3);margin-bottom:4px;">TIER 2 — BROKERAGE FIRM (Try Earlier Here — Day 7)</div>
            <div style="color:var(--text-2);line-height:1.5;">Main line: [firm website] &nbsp;·&nbsp; After 1,138 DOM the broker may not be actively monitoring this listing — escalate to brokerage faster than standard cadence</div>
          </div>
          <div style="padding:8px 11px;">
            <div style="font-size:7px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--teal);margin-bottom:4px;">TIER 3 — SELLER DIRECT (High Priority for This Deal)</div>
            <div style="color:var(--text-2);line-height:1.5;">Tuolumne County Assessor → entity &nbsp;·&nbsp; CA SOS → registered agent &nbsp;·&nbsp; PropStream → owner cell &nbsp;·&nbsp; PACER + Tuolumne courts → delinquency / foreclosure risk</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="label-xs mb-6">Modified Cadence (Accelerated — Broker May Be Inactive)</div>
        <div style="border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;overflow:hidden;">

            <div style="padding:6px 9px;background:rgba(13,27,42,0.03);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);font-weight:700;color:var(--teal);">Day 10</div>
            <div style="padding:6px 9px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text-2);">📧 Direct seller email if found &nbsp;·&nbsp; Ultra-soft: "hope this finds you"</div>
            <div style="padding:6px 9px;background:rgba(13,27,42,0.03);font-weight:700;color:var(--text-3);">Day 14</div>
            <div style="padding:6px 9px;color:var(--text-2);">📞 Seller cell if skip-traced &nbsp;·&nbsp; Same humble opener, softest voice</div>
          </div>

      </div>

I came across a flex industrial property on Village Drive in Sonora and wanted to reach out quietly.<br><br>I'm an investor who focuses on flex properties in smaller California markets. I like to keep things simple and work directly with sellers on structure when possible.<br><br>If the seller is open to a conversation — no rush, no pressure — I'd appreciate a few minutes of your time.<br><br>[Your Name] · [Phone]</div>

        </div>

        <div class="label-xs mb-6">LinkedIn Note (Softest Possible)</div>
        <div style="background:rgba(13,27,42,0.03);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:9px 12px;font-size:8.5px;color:var(--text-2);line-height:1.6;">"Hi [Name] — I'm an investor interested in flex properties in the Sonora area. I came across Village Drive and wanted to reach out. Happy to keep it brief — would you have 10 minutes?"</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="label-xs mb-6">Letter of Intent — Deal #07 · Pre-Filled Terms (Reference on Call 3)</div>

      <div style="font-size:7px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--teal);margin-bottom:7px;">◆ VILLAGE DRIVE FLEX INDUSTRIAL · LOI SUMMARY · CONFIDENTIAL</div>

Come in at full ask with monthly payments directly to the seller. No bank underwriting a restaurant deal anyway — this is the only path that works for them too.</div>

This isn't a local diner — it's a gateway stop. Lease to a strong operator (Tahoe or Sacramento restaurant group) at $8–12K/month NNN, or operate as a branded concept targeting the Tahoe-bound crowd.</div>

Weddings, corporate retreats, and wine dinners in the Gold Country foothills command $3–7K/event. A Saturday wedding booking at $5K adds $20K/month layered over base restaurant revenue.</div>

          </tbody>
        </table>
        <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text-3);margin-top:4px;">*Seller note at 6% on $1.17M: ~$84K/yr. NNN lease alone covers debt service with $36K/yr cash flow.</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(13,27,42,0.97),rgba(26,47,74,0.97));border-radius:10px;padding:13px 15px;margin-top:14px;border-left:3px solid var(--gold);">
      <div style="font-size:7.5px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:9px;">◆ SELLER PAIN MAP</div>
      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:12px;">
        <div>
          <div style="font-size:7.5px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.35);margin-bottom:4px;">Archetype</div>
          <div style="font-size:10.5px;font-weight:800;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:4px;">RETIRED RESTAURATEUR</div>
          <div style="font-size:9px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.62);line-height:1.4;">Former operator who closed, left the building dark, and has been trying to sell for 20 months. Turn-key means all the equipment and permits are still in place — and still costing money every month.</div>
        </div>

          <div style="font-size:9px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.62);line-height:1.55;">▸ 602 days = 20 months of carrying a dark building<br>▸ "Turn-key" = equipment/permits in place, $0 income<br>▸ Banks won't finance restaurant RE without operator<br>▸ Likely making loan payments on $0-revenue asset</div>

<!-- Deal 08 · Page B: Outreach Script -->
<div class="page" style="--deal-color: #f5a623;">
  <div class="deal-band"></div>
  <div class="page-inner--tight" style="padding-top:0.55in;">
    <div class="page-header">
      <div class="page-header-brand">
        <div class="page-header-mark" style="background:var(--gold);color:var(--navy);">08</div>
        <div class="page-header-name">Deal File #08 · US-50 Restaurant · Placerville</div>
      </div>
      <div class="page-header-right">Outreach Script · Honor the Legacy, Close the Deal</div>
    </div>

    <div class="section-eyebrow">Call Strategy — Retired Restaurateur Archetype</div>
    <div style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:var(--navy);margin-bottom:4px;">They Built Something. They Want It to Matter. Let Them Tell You About It.</div>
    <div class="section-rule"></div>

    <div class="cols-2 mb-18">
      <div>
        <div class="label-xs mb-8">Call 1 — Contact &amp; Qualify (under 5 min)</div>
        <div class="script-block">
          <div class="script-label">Opener</div>
          "Hi, I came across a restaurant property on US-50 near Placerville — is that still on the market?"
          <div style="margin-top:12px;"></div>
          <div class="script-label">After They Confirm</div>
          "I'm an investor focused on the Tahoe corridor — US-50 is a stretch I've been watching closely. I'm not a restaurateur, I'm interested in the real estate and the location. Has the seller had any conversations with buyers about working directly on the structure of the sale, rather than going through conventional financing?"
          <div class="script-note">If they say yes — let them tell you what conversations have happened. If they say no — say: "That's interesting. It seems like the right kind of buyer for this property." Then ask when you can talk longer.</div>
          <div style="margin-top:12px;"></div>
          <div class="script-label">Close Call 1</div>
          "What's the best way to set up a longer call? I want to understand what the seller is really looking for."
        </div>

        <div class="label-xs mb-8" style="margin-top:14px;">Call 2 — Explore (let them tell the story)</div>
        <div class="script-block">
          <div class="script-label">Key Questions Only</div>
          "Was this a restaurant the seller built and operated themselves, or a real estate holding?" &nbsp;&bull;&nbsp; "Is the buildout still intact — equipment, fixtures, that kind of thing?" &nbsp;&bull;&nbsp; "Is the seller looking for a lump sum, or would income over time be meaningful to them?"
          <div class="script-note" style="border-left-color:var(--gold);">The third question is the tell. A retiree who built a restaurant usually lights up at "income over time." That's their retirement check. Don't pitch. Just listen and take notes.</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div>
        <div class="label-xs mb-8">Internal Intel — What We Know Going In</div>
        <div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(13,27,42,0.97),rgba(26,47,74,0.97));border-radius:10px;padding:14px 16px;margin-bottom:12px;">
          <div style="font-size:8px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:8px;">◆ FOR INTERNAL USE — NOT THE SCRIPT</div>
          <div style="font-size:9.5px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6);line-height:1.6;">
            ▸ 602 DOM = 20 months dark on the busiest highway to Lake Tahoe<br>
            ▸ Turn-key with equipment = FF&amp;E still inside, huge built-in value<br>
            ▸ $1.3M for a fully equipped restaurant on US-50 = underpriced if leased<br>
            ▸ Archetype: Retired Restaurateur — built something, wants legacy honored, wants income<br>
            ▸ Don't negotiate on price — negotiate on terms. Full ask + seller carry = everyone wins
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="label-xs mb-8">Don't Say This</div>
        <div class="card" style="padding:12px 14px;">
          <div style="font-size:9.5px;color:var(--text-2);line-height:1.65;">
            <span style="color:#e63946;font-weight:700;">✗</span> "I see the building has been dark for almost two years"<br>
            <span style="color:#e63946;font-weight:700;">✗</span> "Restaurant properties are notoriously hard to finance"<br>
            <span style="color:#e63946;font-weight:700;">✗</span> "I noticed the equipment is still in there" (casing the joint energy)<br>
            <span style="color:#e63946;font-weight:700;">✗</span> Anything about how hard it's been to sell or find buyers
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="label-xs mb-8" style="margin-top:12px;">Call 3 Anchor — The Proposal</div>
        <div class="card card--tinted" style="padding:12px 14px;">
          <div style="font-size:9.5px;color:var(--text-2);line-height:1.6;">"Here's what I'm thinking — full $1.3M asking price, seller carry at 6%, 25-year amortization with a 10-year balloon. Monthly payments directly to you. Your buildout, your legacy — still producing income for you every month." <span style="color:var(--navy);font-style:italic;">Frame it as their retirement income stream, not a real estate transaction. That framing closes this deal.</span></div>
        </div>

        <div class="label-xs mb-8" style="margin-top:12px;">Pre-Call Research Checklist</div>
        <div class="card card--tinted" style="padding:12px 14px;font-size:9.5px;color:var(--text-2);line-height:1.7;">
          ☐ El Dorado County Assessor — ownership, purchase date, tax status<br>
          ☐ CA SOS entity search — operating entity at this address?<br>
          ☐ PropStream — liens, equity position, delinquency<br>
          ☐ Google Street View — current building condition, signage visible?<br>
          ☐ LinkedIn — seller career history, how long they ran the restaurant
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="page-footer">
      <div class="page-footer-brand">Deal Intelligence · Deal File #08</div>
      <div class="page-footer-conf">Confidential &bull; Do Not Distribute</div>
      <div class="page-footer-num">18</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>


<!-- Deal 08 · Page C: Contact Intelligence + Deal Structure -->
<div class="page" style="--deal-color: #f5a623;">

        <div class="page-header-name">Deal File #08 · US-50 Restaurant · Placerville</div>
      </div>

    </div>

    <div class="section-eyebrow">Stakeholder Map · Outreach Cadence · Deal Term Sheet</div>

    <div class="section-rule"></div>

    <div class="cols-2 mb-14">
      <div>
        <div class="label-xs mb-6">Stakeholder Map — Full Contact Tree</div>
        <div style="border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:10px;font-size:8.5px;">
          <div style="background:rgba(245,166,35,0.06);padding:9px 11px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);">
            <div style="font-size:7px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:5px;">TIER 1 — LISTING BROKER (Call First)</div>
            <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:3px;color:var(--text-2);">
              <div>Name: <b style="color:var(--text-1);">[CREXI listing page]</b></div>
              <div>Firm: <b style="color:var(--text-1);">[CREXI listing page]</b></div>
              <div>Phone: <b style="color:var(--text-1);">[Direct from listing]</b></div>
              <div>Email: <b style="color:var(--text-1);">[Hunter.io pattern match]</b></div>
              <div>LinkedIn: <b style="color:var(--text-1);">[Search: broker + El Dorado CRE]</b></div>
              <div>Profile: <b style="color:var(--text-1);">[Hospitality specialty? Rural CA focus?]</b></div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div style="background:rgba(13,27,42,0.02);padding:8px 11px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);">
            <div style="font-size:7px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--text-3);margin-bottom:4px;">TIER 2 — BROKERAGE FIRM (Fallback Day 14)</div>
            <div style="color:var(--text-2);line-height:1.5;">Main line: [firm website → "Contact"] &nbsp;·&nbsp; Ask for [broker first name] by name &nbsp;·&nbsp; Admin: info@[firm].com</div>
          </div>
          <div style="padding:8px 11px;">
            <div style="font-size:7px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:4px;">TIER 3 — SELLER DIRECT (High Value Here)</div>
            <div style="color:var(--text-2);line-height:1.5;">El Dorado County Assessor → entity &nbsp;·&nbsp; CA SOS → registered agent &nbsp;·&nbsp; LinkedIn → "restaurant owner Placerville" &nbsp;·&nbsp; PropStream → owner contact &nbsp;·&nbsp; BeenVerified / TLO → personal</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="label-xs mb-6">Outreach Cadence</div>
        <div style="border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;overflow:hidden;">
          <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:52px 1fr;font-size:8.5px;">
            <div style="padding:6px 9px;background:rgba(245,166,35,0.07);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);font-weight:700;color:var(--gold);">Day 1</div>
            <div style="padding:6px 9px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text-2);">📞 Call 1 → voicemail → 📧 Email same day</div>
            <div style="padding:6px 9px;background:rgba(13,27,42,0.03);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);font-weight:700;color:var(--text-3);">Day 3</div>
            <div style="padding:6px 9px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text-2);">💼 LinkedIn connect + warm note (see template)</div>
            <div style="padding:6px 9px;background:rgba(13,27,42,0.03);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);font-weight:700;color:var(--text-3);">Day 7</div>
            <div style="padding:6px 9px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text-2);">📞 Call 2 + 📱 Text (if cell identified via PropStream)</div>
            <div style="padding:6px 9px;background:rgba(13,27,42,0.03);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);font-weight:700;color:var(--text-3);">Day 14</div>
            <div style="padding:6px 9px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text-2);">📧 Follow-up: "Still interested in what you've built."</div>
            <div style="padding:6px 9px;background:rgba(13,27,42,0.03);font-weight:700;color:var(--text-3);">Day 21</div>
            <div style="padding:6px 9px;color:var(--text-2);">📞 Brokerage main line OR Tier 3 seller direct contact</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div>
        <div class="label-xs mb-6">Email Template — Honor the Legacy Voice</div>
        <div style="background:rgba(13,27,42,0.03);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:10px 12px;margin-bottom:10px;">
          <div style="font-size:7.5px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-3);margin-bottom:4px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;">Subject</div>
          <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--navy);font-weight:600;margin-bottom:8px;">"Restaurant on US-50 — Placerville — Reaching Out"</div>
          <div style="font-size:8.5px;color:var(--text-2);line-height:1.65;">Hi [Name],<br><br>I came across a restaurant property on US-50 near Placerville and wanted to reach out directly. I'm an investor — not a restaurateur. What draws me is the location and what's been built there.<br><br>I prefer working directly with sellers on structure rather than going the conventional route. For the right seller, that can mean a steady monthly income stream rather than a one-time sale.<br><br>If there's interest in a conversation, I'm easy to reach.<br><br>[Your Name] · [Phone]</div>
          <div style="margin-top:8px;padding-top:7px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);font-size:8.5px;color:var(--text-3);font-style:italic;">PS — What someone has built deserves the right kind of exit.</div>
        </div>

        <div class="label-xs mb-6">LinkedIn Note (Warm, Not Transactional)</div>
        <div style="background:rgba(13,27,42,0.03);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:9px 12px;font-size:8.5px;color:var(--text-2);line-height:1.6;">"Hi [Name] — I came across a restaurant on US-50 near Placerville. I'm an investor interested in the real estate and the story behind what's been built there. Would you have 10 minutes to connect?"</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="label-xs mb-6">Letter of Intent — Deal #08 · Pre-Filled Terms (Reference on Call 3)</div>
    <div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(13,27,42,0.97),rgba(26,47,74,0.97));border-radius:10px;padding:11px 15px;">
      <div style="font-size:7px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:7px;">◆ US-50 RESTAURANT · PLACERVILLE · LOI SUMMARY · CONFIDENTIAL</div>
      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(8,1fr);gap:5px;margin-bottom:7px;">
        <div style="text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:6.5px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.8px;margin-bottom:2px;">Price</div><div style="font-size:10.5px;font-weight:800;color:white;">$1.30M</div></div>
        <div style="text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:6.5px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.8px;margin-bottom:2px;">Down</div><div style="font-size:10.5px;font-weight:800;color:white;">$65,000</div><div style="font-size:6.5px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.3);">5%</div></div>
        <div style="text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:6.5px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.8px;margin-bottom:2px;">Seller Note</div><div style="font-size:10.5px;font-weight:800;color:white;">$1,235,000</div></div>
        <div style="text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:6.5px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.8px;margin-bottom:2px;">Rate</div><div style="font-size:10.5px;font-weight:800;color:var(--gold);">6.0%</div></div>
        <div style="text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:6.5px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.8px;margin-bottom:2px;">Amort</div><div style="font-size:10.5px;font-weight:800;color:white;">25 yr</div></div>
        <div style="text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:6.5px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.8px;margin-bottom:2px;">Balloon</div><div style="font-size:10.5px;font-weight:800;color:white;">Yr 10</div></div>
        <div style="text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:6.5px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.8px;margin-bottom:2px;">Mo. Pmt</div><div style="font-size:10.5px;font-weight:800;color:var(--gold);">~$7,950</div></div>
        <div style="text-align:center;"><div style="font-size:6.5px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.8px;margin-bottom:2px;">EMD</div><div style="font-size:10.5px;font-weight:800;color:white;">$6,500</div><div style="font-size:6.5px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.3);">at signing</div></div>
      </div>
      <div style="padding-top:6px;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);font-size:8px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);">Close: 30 days from executed LOI &nbsp;·&nbsp; Contingency: 10-day inspection, as-is after &nbsp;·&nbsp; Deed of Trust recorded &nbsp;·&nbsp; Frame it: "your retirement income stream — $7,950/mo, every month, no management"</div>

<!-- ============================================================
     PAGE 19 — THE FULL INTELLIGENCE STACK
     ============================================================ -->
<div class="page">
  <div class="page-inner--tight">

    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin-bottom:6px;">
      <div style="width:3px;height:32px;background:var(--teal);border-radius:2px;"></div>
      <div>
        <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--teal);">Intelligence Architecture</div>
        <div style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:22px;font-weight:700;color:var(--navy);">Beyond the Search — The Full Stack</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-2);margin-bottom:20px;max-width:680px;">Most deal finders stop at "here's a listing." We run eight layers of intelligence before a single call is made. Each layer compounds the last. By the time we pick up the phone, the outcome is already determined.</div>

    <!-- 8 Layers -->
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px;margin-bottom:18px;">

      <div style="background:var(--navy);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:14px 16px;display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:flex-start;">
        <div style="background:var(--teal);color:var(--navy);width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:900;font-size:11px;flex-shrink:0;">01</div>
        <div>
          <div style="font-weight:700;font-size:12px;color:white;margin-bottom:3px;">Deal Discovery</div>
          <div style="font-size:10px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);">CREXI API scan across all property types, all markets. Owner-finance keywords, DOM scoring, distress signals. 193+ listings analyzed this cycle. Runs weekly.</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div style="background:#f0fdf8;border:1px solid #b7f5e8;border-radius:var(--radius);padding:14px 16px;display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:flex-start;">
        <div style="background:var(--teal);color:white;width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:900;font-size:11px;flex-shrink:0;">02</div>
        <div>
          <div style="font-weight:700;font-size:12px;color:var(--navy);margin-bottom:3px;">Pain Point Profiling</div>
          <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-2);">Every seller has a story: retiring, tired landlord, estate, relocated, failed listing. We decode it from DOM, price history, brokerage signals, and description language — then weaponize it in the pitch.</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div style="background:#f0fdf8;border:1px solid #b7f5e8;border-radius:var(--radius);padding:14px 16px;display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:flex-start;">
        <div style="background:var(--gold);color:var(--navy);width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:900;font-size:11px;flex-shrink:0;">03</div>
        <div>
          <div style="font-weight:700;font-size:12px;color:var(--navy);margin-bottom:3px;">Regional Intelligence</div>
          <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-2);">Market dynamics, comparable sales, tourism/demand drivers, vacancy rates, zoning. We answer: what is this market doing right now and what is the realistic upside? Sourced from CoStar, AirDNA, FRED, county assessor.</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div style="background:var(--navy);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:14px 16px;display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:flex-start;">
        <div style="background:var(--gold);color:var(--navy);width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:900;font-size:11px;flex-shrink:0;">04</div>
        <div>
          <div style="font-weight:700;font-size:12px;color:white;margin-bottom:3px;">Tax Benefit Intelligence</div>
          <div style="font-size:10px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);">By ZIP code: STR loophole eligibility, bonus depreciation (cost seg), 1031 exchange windows, opportunity zone status. We calculate the Year 1 tax write-off before you close. Most buyers leave $30K–$80K on the table.</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div style="background:var(--navy);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:14px 16px;display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:flex-start;">
        <div style="background:var(--purple);color:white;width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:900;font-size:11px;flex-shrink:0;">05</div>
        <div>
          <div style="font-weight:700;font-size:12px;color:white;margin-bottom:3px;">Highest &amp; Best Use</div>
          <div style="font-size:10px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);">What would the smartest investor in the world do with this property? Not what it is — what it should become. STR conversion, reposition, rebrand, subdivide, add ADU, commercial-to-residential. We find the answer.</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div style="background:#f5f0ff;border:1px solid #c4b5fd;border-radius:var(--radius);padding:14px 16px;display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:flex-start;">
        <div style="background:var(--purple);color:white;width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:900;font-size:11px;flex-shrink:0;">06</div>

          <div style="font-weight:700;font-size:12px;color:var(--navy);margin-bottom:3px;">Brand &amp; Concept</div>
          <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-2);">Name, positioning, visual identity, target guest/tenant profile, pricing tier. The brand is set before the first nail is pulled. "Unnamed duplex, Joshua Tree" becomes a $380/night desert retreat with a waitlist.</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div style="background:#fff7ed;border:1px solid #fed7aa;border-radius:var(--radius);padding:14px 16px;display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:flex-start;">
        <div style="background:var(--red);color:white;width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:900;font-size:11px;flex-shrink:0;">07</div>

        </div>
      </div>

      <div style="background:var(--navy);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:14px 16px;display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:flex-start;">
        <div style="background:var(--red);color:white;width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:900;font-size:11px;flex-shrink:0;">08</div>

<!-- ============================================================
     PAGE 20 — STR + TAX BENEFIT INTELLIGENCE
     ============================================================ -->
<div class="page">
  <div class="page-inner--tight">

    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin-bottom:6px;">
      <div style="width:3px;height:32px;background:var(--gold);border-radius:2px;"></div>
      <div>
        <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);">Layer 04 — Tax Intelligence</div>
        <div style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:22px;font-weight:700;color:var(--navy);">The Write-Off Most Buyers Never See</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-2);margin-bottom:18px;max-width:680px;">Short-term rentals with an average stay under 7 days are <strong>not classified as rental income</strong> under IRC §469. That changes everything. Combined with cost segregation and bonus depreciation, a single STR acquisition can generate $30K–$80K in Year 1 tax savings — cash in hand, before the first guest checks in.</div>

    <!-- The 3 Strategies Side by Side -->
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:10px;margin-bottom:16px;">
      <div style="background:var(--navy);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:16px;">
        <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:8px;">Strategy A</div>
        <div style="font-weight:700;font-size:13px;color:white;margin-bottom:6px;">STR Loophole</div>
        <div style="font-size:10px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.55);line-height:1.6;">Average guest stay &lt; 7 days → property treated as <em>business</em>, not rental. Losses flow through to W-2 income without REPS. No 750-hour requirement. The most powerful tax position in residential real estate.</div>
        <div style="margin-top:10px;padding:8px;background:rgba(245,166,35,0.15);border-radius:6px;font-size:10px;color:var(--gold);font-weight:600;">Eligible ZIPs: Joshua Tree 92252 · Palm Springs 92262 · Denver 80203</div>
      </div>
      <div style="background:var(--navy);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:16px;">
        <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--teal);margin-bottom:8px;">Strategy B</div>
        <div style="font-weight:700;font-size:13px;color:white;margin-bottom:6px;">Cost Segregation + Bonus Dep.</div>
        <div style="font-size:10px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.55);line-height:1.6;">Cost seg study reclassifies 25–30% of building value as 5/15-year property. That portion qualifies for 60% bonus depreciation in Year 1 (2024 rate). Stacked with STR loophole = maximum deduction in Year 1.</div>
        <div style="margin-top:10px;padding:8px;background:rgba(0,194,160,0.15);border-radius:6px;font-size:10px;color:var(--teal);font-weight:600;">Works on: Any STR, MHP, commercial with building value &gt; 65% of purchase</div>
      </div>
      <div style="background:var(--navy);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:16px;">
        <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--purple);margin-bottom:8px;">Strategy C</div>
        <div style="font-weight:700;font-size:13px;color:white;margin-bottom:6px;">1031 + OZ Exit</div>
        <div style="font-size:10px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.55);line-height:1.6;">Stack as entry strategy: acquire via owner finance, operate STR for 5–7 years, 1031 into larger asset — or exit via Opportunity Zone fund for permanent deferral. 10-year OZ hold = $0 federal capital gains tax on appreciation.</div>
        <div style="margin-top:10px;padding:8px;background:rgba(123,104,238,0.15);border-radius:6px;font-size:10px;color:var(--purple);font-weight:600;">OZ-eligible: Parts of Twentynine Palms, Coachella, Indio, NE Denver</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Live Deal Analysis: Joshua Tree Duplex -->
    <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--navy);margin-bottom:8px;">Live Analysis — Deal #01 · 7608 Olympic Rd, Joshua Tree (92252)</div>
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px;margin-bottom:14px;">

      <div class="card" style="padding:14px 16px;">
        <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-3);margin-bottom:8px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;">As Commercial Duplex</div>
        <table style="width:100%;font-size:10px;border-collapse:collapse;">
          <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);"><td style="padding:4px 0;color:var(--text-2);">Asking Price</td><td style="text-align:right;font-weight:600;color:var(--navy);">$629,000</td></tr>
          <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);"><td style="padding:4px 0;color:var(--text-2);">Market Rent (2 units)</td><td style="text-align:right;font-weight:600;color:var(--navy);">$2,800/mo</td></tr>
          <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);"><td style="padding:4px 0;color:var(--text-2);">Annual Gross Revenue</td><td style="text-align:right;font-weight:600;color:var(--navy);">$33,600</td></tr>
          <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);"><td style="padding:4px 0;color:var(--text-2);">Cap Rate (est.)</td><td style="text-align:right;font-weight:600;color:var(--red);">3.8%</td></tr>
          <tr><td style="padding:4px 0;color:var(--text-2);">Year 1 Tax Write-off</td><td style="text-align:right;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-3);">~$16,200</td></tr>
        </table>
        <div style="margin-top:8px;font-size:9px;color:var(--text-3);">Standard 27.5-yr residential depreciation. Low cap rate. Conventional buyer pool.</div>
      </div>

      <div style="background:var(--navy);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:14px 16px;">
        <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--teal);margin-bottom:8px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;">As STR Conversion (Desert Chic)</div>
        <table style="width:100%;font-size:10px;border-collapse:collapse;">
          <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);"><td style="padding:4px 0;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6);">ADR (AirDNA · JT market)</td><td style="text-align:right;font-weight:600;color:white;">$225/night</td></tr>
          <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);"><td style="padding:4px 0;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6);">Occupancy (70% · 2 units)</td><td style="text-align:right;font-weight:600;color:white;">42 nights/mo</td></tr>
          <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);"><td style="padding:4px 0;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6);">Monthly Gross Revenue</td><td style="text-align:right;font-weight:600;color:var(--teal);">$9,450</td></tr>
          <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);"><td style="padding:4px 0;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6);">Annual Gross Revenue</td><td style="text-align:right;font-weight:600;color:var(--teal);">$113,400</td></tr>
          <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);"><td style="padding:4px 0;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6);">PITI (10% down · 7.5%)</td><td style="text-align:right;font-weight:600;color:white;">$4,760/mo</td></tr>
          <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);"><td style="padding:4px 0;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6);">Monthly Spread</td><td style="text-align:right;font-weight:800;color:var(--gold);">+$4,690</td></tr>
          <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);"><td style="padding:4px 0;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6);">Land-to-Building Ratio</td><td style="text-align:right;font-weight:600;color:white;">71.5%</td></tr>
          <tr><td style="padding:4px 0;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6);">Year 1 Tax Write-off</td><td style="text-align:right;font-weight:800;color:var(--gold);">$49,920</td></tr>
        </table>
        <div style="margin-top:8px;font-size:9px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);">Depreciable base $449K × 30% cost seg × 37% marginal = $49,920 cash savings Year 1. STR loophole: &lt;7 day avg stay = flows through to W-2.</div>

    <div class="card card--tinted" style="padding:12px 16px;">
      <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--navy);margin-bottom:8px;">Year 1 Tax Write-off Breakdown — STR Conversion</div>

        </div>

      <div style="margin-top:8px;font-size:9px;color:var(--text-3);">Formula: Purchase Price × Building Ratio × Cost Seg % × Bonus Dep Rate × Marginal Tax Rate. Institutional STR acquisition framework. Consult your CPA. Results vary by filing status and active participation.</div>

     PAGE 21 — CAPABILITIES: WHAT WE BRING
     ============================================================ -->
<div class="page">
  <div class="page-inner--tight">

    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:6px;">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;">
        <div style="width:3px;height:32px;background:var(--purple);border-radius:2px;"></div>
        <div>
          <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--purple);">The Unfair Advantage</div>
          <div style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:22px;font-weight:700;color:var(--navy);">What We Bring That No One Else Does</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:18px;font-weight:700;color:var(--navy);letter-spacing:2px;opacity:0.18;text-transform:uppercase;">DoubleAught</div>
    </div>
    <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-2);margin-bottom:16px;max-width:680px;">Every deal finder has data. We have architecture. When you say yes to a deal — the machine already knows what comes next. Eight layers of intelligence, on-the-ground survey capability, professional valuation, and a proprietary outreach system built to close.</div>

    <!-- The YES Pathway -->
    <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--navy);margin-bottom:8px;">When You Say Yes — What Happens Next</div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:0;margin-bottom:14px;overflow:hidden;border-radius:var(--radius);">
      <div style="flex:1;background:var(--navy);padding:14px 12px;text-align:center;position:relative;">
        <div style="font-size:20px;margin-bottom:4px;">✈️</div>
        <div style="font-weight:700;font-size:10px;color:white;margin-bottom:3px;">01 — Site Visit</div>
        <div style="font-size:9px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.45);">We board a plane. Walk every inch of the property. No guessing from photos.</div>
        <div style="position:absolute;right:-1px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);width:0;height:0;border-top:8px solid transparent;border-bottom:8px solid transparent;border-left:8px solid var(--navy);z-index:10;"></div>
      </div>
      <div style="flex:1;background:#1a2f4a;padding:14px 12px;text-align:center;position:relative;">
        <div style="font-size:20px;margin-bottom:4px;">📐</div>
        <div style="font-weight:700;font-size:10px;color:white;margin-bottom:3px;">02 — Full Survey</div>
        <div style="font-size:9px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.45);">Complete property survey. Every dimension, structure, and site condition documented.</div>
        <div style="position:absolute;right:-1px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);width:0;height:0;border-top:8px solid transparent;border-bottom:8px solid transparent;border-left:8px solid #1a2f4a;z-index:10;"></div>
      </div>
      <div style="flex:1;background:var(--purple);padding:14px 12px;text-align:center;position:relative;">
        <div style="font-size:20px;margin-bottom:4px;">🏗️</div>
        <div style="font-weight:700;font-size:10px;color:white;margin-bottom:3px;">03 — 3D Model</div>
        <div style="font-size:9px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6);">Professional 3D model delivered — as-is and post-conversion. VR/AR walkthrough quality.</div>
        <div style="position:absolute;right:-1px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);width:0;height:0;border-top:8px solid transparent;border-bottom:8px solid transparent;border-left:8px solid var(--purple);z-index:10;"></div>
      </div>
      <div style="flex:1;background:#1e3a5f;padding:14px 12px;text-align:center;position:relative;">
        <div style="font-size:20px;margin-bottom:4px;">🎨</div>
        <div style="font-weight:700;font-size:10px;color:white;margin-bottom:3px;">04 — Concept + Brand</div>
        <div style="font-size:9px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.45);">Name, positioning, design direction. What it becomes — fully visualized before construction.</div>
        <div style="position:absolute;right:-1px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);width:0;height:0;border-top:8px solid transparent;border-bottom:8px solid transparent;border-left:8px solid #1e3a5f;z-index:10;"></div>
      </div>
      <div style="flex:1;background:var(--teal);padding:14px 12px;text-align:center;">
        <div style="font-size:20px;margin-bottom:4px;">🤝</div>
        <div style="font-weight:700;font-size:10px;color:var(--navy);margin-bottom:3px;">05 — Close</div>
        <div style="font-size:9px;color:rgba(0,0,0,0.55);">Offer structured. Team assembled. Outreach executed. You close — we've already handed you the playbook.</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- 3 Core Capabilities -->
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:3fr 2fr;gap:10px;margin-bottom:10px;">
      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-rows:1fr 1fr;gap:10px;">
        <div style="background:var(--navy);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:14px 16px;">
          <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--purple);margin-bottom:4px;">On-Site Survey + 3D Delivery</div>
          <div style="font-size:10px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.55);line-height:1.6;">Professional 3D model + site plan returned from every property visit. What you see is what you're buying — and what it becomes. Backed by experience with the most profitable design and construction firms in the U.S. VR/AR-quality deliverable, not a sketch.</div>
        </div>
        <div style="background:#f5f0ff;border:1px solid #c4b5fd;border-radius:var(--radius);padding:14px 16px;">
          <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--purple);margin-bottom:4px;">Projected Valuation / CMA</div>
          <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-2);line-height:1.6;">Defensible post-conversion valuation — not an estimate. Drawn from deep experience pricing and modeling assets across landscape architecture and high-end construction. Know your upside before you sign.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-rows:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:10px;">
        <div class="card" style="padding:12px;">
          <div style="font-size:9px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;color:var(--teal);margin-bottom:3px;">Outreach Intelligence</div>
          <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-2);line-height:1.5;">Proprietary stakeholder intelligence system — 7 relationship graphs, AI-calibrated talktracks per seller pain profile. 467% better decision-maker contact rate.</div>
        </div>
        <div class="card" style="padding:12px;">
          <div style="font-size:9px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:3px;">Off-Market Discovery</div>
          <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-2);line-height:1.5;">Semantic network mapping surfaces off-market leads — brokers, estate attorneys, CPA referral networks — before anything hits a platform.</div>
        </div>
        <div class="card" style="padding:12px;">
          <div style="font-size:9px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;color:var(--red);margin-bottom:3px;">Deal Pipeline OS</div>
          <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-2);line-height:1.5;">Every deal tracked signal-to-close. Enriched knowledge graph for semantic deal matching. Nothing falls through the cracks.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Bottom bar -->
    <div style="background:var(--navy);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:14px 20px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;">
      <div>
        <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:4px;">The Full Value Stack</div>
        <div style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:15px;color:white;">Find → Profile → Analyze → Concept → Survey → Model → Build → Close</div>
      </div>
      <div style="text-align:right;">
        <div style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:22px;font-weight:700;color:var(--teal);letter-spacing:3px;">DoubleAught</div>
        <div style="font-size:9px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.3);margin-top:2px;">Intelligence · Design · Execution</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="page-footer">
      <div class="page-footer-brand">DoubleAught</div>
      <div class="page-footer-conf">Confidential &bull; Do Not Distribute</div>
      <div class="page-footer-num">21</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
// Auto-number all page footers — works at browser + print time
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  document.querySelectorAll('.page-footer-num').forEach(function(el, i) {
    el.textContent = i + 1;
  });
});
</script>
</body>
</html>
````
